translations.english: A likely story. They won't even do their own dirty work now, eh? Well, you won't get the better of me!
translations.chinese: 花言巧语。他们现在连自己的脏活都不乐意做了是吧？好啊，你打不过我的！

translations.english: Now tell me where my brother is!
translations.chinese: 我兄弟到底在哪儿！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F57]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now tell me where my brother is! | ZH: 我兄弟到底在哪儿！ | SID: 00F51D

translations.english: Are you working with the Battle-Borns? Speak now before I put you in the ground!
translations.chinese: 你是战狂的同伙？快说，不然就把你埋了！

translations.english: Who are you? What are you doing here?
translations.chinese: 你是谁，在这儿做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Who are you? What are you doing here? | ZH: 你是谁，在这儿做什么？ | SID: 00F9C2

translations.chinese: 我在这儿！我就知道能找到你！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm here! I knew I'd find you! | ZH: 我在这儿！我就知道能找到你！ | SID: 006C72

translations.english: I am not going to let that happen!
translations.chinese: 我不能让这种事发生！

translations.english: Because they've got Thorald locked away somewhere, and if they find me here I'll disappear too!
translations.chinese: 因为他们把索拉德关到某个地方了，如果他们发现我在这里，我也会失踪！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F5A]

translations.english: There's no time. We've got to get you out of here! Come on, let's go!
translations.chinese: 没时间了。我们得带你走！来，快走！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F5B]

translations.english: I can't do this all on my own. Are you... are you offering to help me?
translations.chinese: 我一个人做不来。你要……主动帮忙？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F5E]

translations.chinese: 有消息了吗？找到什么东西了？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F5F]

translations.english: Please, anything you can do to help find my Thorald...
translations.chinese: 求你了，无论如何要帮我找到索拉德……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F60]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, anything you can do to help find my Thorald... | ZH: 求你了，无论如何要帮我找到索拉德…… | SID: 001DE3

translations.english: What's there to say? You go against the Empire, you wind up dead. Thorald got what was coming to him.
translations.chinese: 有什么好说的？反抗帝国，死路一条。索拉德已经遭了报应。

translations.english: Best not to ask too many questions about it. People might get the wrong idea about you.
translations.chinese: 最好不要问得太多。人们可能会对你产生误解。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F61]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Best not to ask too many questions about it. People might get the wrong idea about you. | ZH: 最好不要问得太多。人们可能会对你产生误解。 | SID: 00B4C2

translations.english: I found out the Thalmor have him. And they don't let anyone go.
translations.chinese: 我发现梭默把他抓了。他们是不会放任何人离开的。

translations.english: Between the two of us, his family is better off thinking he's dead.
translations.chinese: 咱俩私下说啊，他们家最好觉得他已经死了。

translations.english: Thorald and I have history, all right? We used to be friends. So I looked into it when he disappeared.
translations.chinese: 索拉德跟我有交情，知道吗？我们以前是朋友。所以他失踪的时候我调查了一下。

translations.english: So I've kept my mouth shut. Like I said, his family is better off believing he's gone, because he's never coming back.
translations.chinese: 所以我什么都不能说。就像我说的，他们家最好觉得他死了，因为他再也回不来了。

translations.english: I think you know what really happened to Thorald Gray-Mane. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 我想你知道索拉德·灰鬃到底怎么了。（说服）

translations.english: He fought on the wrong side, and he paid for it. That's all I have to say.
translations.chinese: 他为错误的一方而战，现在付出了代价。我只能说这些了。

translations.english: I think you know what really happened to Thorald Gray-Mane. (Persuade)

translations.english: Oh come on, leave it alone. He's gone. There's no use in talking about it anymore.
translations.chinese: 哦，得了吧，不要插手了。他死了。再说什么也没用了。

translations.english: I wish everyone could just get past that and get on with their lives.
translations.chinese: 希望每个人都忘记过去，好好过日子吧。

translations.english: He knew what he was getting into. I don't... I don't blame anyone.
translations.chinese: 他知道自己要面对什么。我不……不怪任何人。

translations.english: It's been a while now. I miss him, but it's clear he's not coming back.
translations.chinese: 已经有一段时间了。我很想他，但很显然他不会回来了。

translations.english: Is there anything you can tell me about Thorald?
translations.chinese: 关于索拉德你能告诉我些什么？

translations.english: Tell me, Vignar. Was all this worth it?
translations.chinese: 告诉我，维吉纳。这值么？

translations.english: How many of those corpses lining our streets wear the faces of men who once called you friend? What about their families?
translations.chinese: 在我们的街道上，有多少尸体是你曾经的友人？他们的家庭该怎么办？

translations.english: Peace! Everyone stand down. That's an order. Stand down!
translations.chinese: 平静一下！所有人都退下。这是命令。退下！

translations.english: Enough! That's enough. I surrender... I surrender.
translations.chinese: 够了！够了。我投降……投降。

translations.english: A convenient position to hold now. But mark my words, old man, in the days to come, Ulfric will spread his rebellion thin. And what then?
translations.chinese: 这位置现在是很方便。但是记住我的话，老头。将来乌弗瑞克将会把他的叛逆思想散布开来。然后呢？

translations.english: We need the Empire, as much as it needs us. We Nords are the Empire! Our blood built it. Our blood sustains it! You of all people should know that.
translations.chinese: 我们需要帝国，就像它需要我们一样。我们诺德人就是帝国！我们的鲜血缔造了它，我们的鲜血支撑着它！你们都很清楚。

translations.english: We should be fighting those witch-elves, not bending knee to them. The Emperor is nothing more than a puppet of the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 我们应该和那些精灵巫师们战斗，而不是卑躬屈膝。皇帝只不过是梭默的傀儡。

translations.english: If this was my Empire, I'd be able to worship whoever I damned well pleased. You wish to see an Empire without Talos? Without its soul?
translations.chinese: 如果这是我的帝国，我就应该自由崇拜我想崇拜的神。你愿意看到应该没有了塔洛斯，没有了灵魂的帝国？

translations.english: Skyrim needs a High King who will fight for her, and Whiterun needs a Jarl who will do the same.
translations.chinese: 天际需要一个能为她而战的至高王，而白漫需要同样的领主。

translations.english: You think this is personal?
translations.chinese: 你觉得这是私人恩怨？

translations.english: The Empire has no place in Skyrim... not any more. And you? You have no place in Whiterun anymore.
translations.chinese: 帝国在天际再没有立足之地……再也没有了。而你？你也已在白漫没有位置了。

translations.english: These Stormcloaks are ridiculous. They won't shop here because they think I'll sell them poisoned tonics. I should just go back to Cyrodiil.
translations.chinese: 这些风暴斗篷也太可笑了。他们不在这里购物，以为我会卖给他们下了毒的补剂。我看我还是回希罗帝尔吧。

translations.chinese: 啊，波特玛。独孤城前太后，史上最危险的死灵法师之一。

translations.english: Queen of Solitude, granddaughter of Emperor Uriel Septim II, five hundred years ago. Her fight for succession nearly tore the empire apart.
translations.chinese: 五百年前的独孤王后，尤瑞尔·塞普汀二世之孙。她对帝国皇位继承的争夺几乎闹得帝国分崩离析。

translations.english: Any resident of Solitude can tell you, she was the deadliest person ever to come out of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 独孤城任何人都能告诉你，她是天际最致命的人。

translations.english: After twenty years of fighting, she had raised armies of the dead, led by vampire generals. If she returns to power, nobody could stop her.
translations.chinese: 经过二十年的战争，她召集了由吸血鬼将军率领的亡灵军团。如果她重新掌握力量，没人能阻止她。

translations.english: She was always so close to being Empress, but despite her machinations, it was never to be hers.
translations.chinese: 她曾经一度接近女皇宝座，但尽管她机关算尽，还是差了一步之遥。

translations.english: A curious figure. Unrepentantly evil and nasty, of course, but also astonishingly brilliant, and obviously quite a necromancer at her end.
translations.chinese: 怪人一个。她拥有毫无悔意的邪恶和肮脏，当然，也出奇地聪明，她死时很明显是个死灵法师。

translations.english: Ironically, if she were alive today, she'd be the only living member of the Septim bloodline. By all rights, she would now be Empress.
translations.chinese: 讽刺的是，如果她今天还活着，她就是塞普汀家族最后的活口了。不管怎样，她现在终于可以当女皇了。

translations.chinese: 嘘，维萨拉。你非常勇敢。如果不是你的话，阿斯垂德可能已经死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Look, we've got to deal with this situation. You've got to deal with this situation.
translations.chinese: 听着，我们要处理一下这个情况。你得去处理一下。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028C65]
Translations:

translations.english: Achh... Thank you, dear. You are most kind. The jester's cut feels as bad as it looks, I'm afraid.
translations.chinese: 啊……谢谢你，亲爱的。你真好。不过我觉得这小丑留下的伤和看上去一样糟糕。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: It's all up to you now... Listener.
translations.chinese: 现在全看你了……聆听者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028C7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's all up to you now... Listener. | ZH: 现在全看你了……聆听者。 | SID: 0050AE

translations.english: Bested by a fool. Who's the fool now, hmm?
translations.chinese: 被小丑打败的人不是小丑又是什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028C7E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Bested by a fool. Who's the fool now, hmm? | ZH: 被小丑打败的人不是小丑又是什么？ | SID: 00D617

translations.english: She's right. I'll be forever in your debt, dearest brother. Now be quiet. Just... just rest.
translations.chinese: 她说得对。我永远欠你的，亲爱的兄弟。现在还是安静修养吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028C7F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She's right. I'll be forever in your debt, dearest brother. Now be quiet. Just... just rest. | ZH: 她说得对。我永远欠你的，亲爱的兄弟。现在还是安静修养吧。 | SID: 00F14F

translations.english: I want you to find that miserable little fool and end his life!
translations.chinese: 我要你找到那个可怜的小丑然后结果了他！

translations.english: After the attack, Arnbjorn flew into a rage. When Cicero left... Arnbjorn went after him. They disappeared into the wild.
translations.chinese: 袭击之后艾恩乔恩勃然大怒。西塞罗逃走的时候……艾恩乔恩就追出去了。两个人消失在野外。

translations.english: But first... find my husband. Make sure he's all right.
translations.chinese: 但首先……要找到我丈夫。确保他安全。

translations.english: Search Cicero's room. Maybe there's something in there that sheds some light on where he might have gone.
translations.chinese: 去搜查西塞罗的房间。或许有东西能告诉我们他的去向。

translations.english: Let me know the minute you find something. I've got to see to Veezara, and calm everyone down.
translations.chinese: 有发现就来通知我。我得去看看维萨拉，抚慰一下大家的情绪。

translations.english: What do you want me to do?
translations.chinese: 你想让我做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028C80]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: After the attack, Arnbjorn flew into a rage. When Cicero left... Arnbjorn went after him. They disappeared into the wild. | ZH: 袭击之后艾恩乔恩勃然大怒。西塞罗逃走的时候……艾恩乔恩就追出去了。两个人消失在野外。 | SID: 005522

- INFO:RNAM | EN: What do you want me to do? | ZH: 你想让我做什么？ | SID: 00F583

translations.english: Damn it, this never should have happened! We knew better. We knew better, and still we let our guards down. Agh!
translations.chinese: 该死，怎么会发生这种事！我们本来都清楚，但还是放松了警惕。唉！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028C81]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn it, this never should have happened! We knew better. We knew better, and still we let our guards down. Agh! | ZH: 该死，怎么会发生这种事！我们本来都清楚，但还是放松了警惕。唉！ | SID: 00D991

translations.english: Just try to relax, Veezara. Let the elixir do its work. You'll feel better, shortly.
translations.chinese: 放松点，维萨拉。让药发挥作用。你很快就会感觉好起来的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028C82]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just try to relax, Veezara. Let the elixir do its work. You'll feel better, shortly. | ZH: 放松点，维萨拉。让药发挥作用。你很快就会感觉好起来的。 | SID: 009D75

translations.english: Move along, citizen.
translations.chinese: 公民，离远点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028D49]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Move along, citizen. | ZH: 公民，离远点。 | SID: 00D1C7

translations.english: That he worries about being chased from Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 他担心会被赶出白漫城。

translations.english: I know that he still worships Talos. That he hates the Thalmor almost as much as the Stormcloaks do.
translations.chinese: 我知道他还在信仰塔洛斯。他和风暴斗篷一样恨梭默。

translations.english: That he... that I'm... that I don't have the same mother as my brother and sister.
translations.chinese: 他……我……我和哥哥姐姐不是一个母亲。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028D4F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: That he worries about being chased from Whiterun. | ZH: 他担心会被赶出白漫城。 | SID: 00635B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I know that he still worships Talos. That he hates the Thalmor almost as much as the Stormcloaks do. | ZH: 我知道他还在信仰塔洛斯。他和风暴斗篷一样恨梭默。 | SID: 007EAA
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: That he... that I'm... that I don't have the same mother as my brother and sister. | ZH: 他……我……我和哥哥姐姐不是一个母亲。 | SID: 00CBDC

translations.english: Regrettably, I cannot reach your plane so directly.
translations.chinese: 很遗憾，我无法直接降临你们的位面。

translations.english: I am Mephala, the Lady of Whispers.
translations.chinese: 我是低语女神，梅法拉。

translations.english: The boy was good at sussing out secrets. You, I expect to take a more active role.
translations.chinese: 那个男孩善于探秘。而我希望你能够发挥更积极的作用。

translations.english: I tug at the web of connections between mortals. Love, hatred, loyalty, betrayal.
translations.chinese: 我用爱恨情仇、忠诚背叛将凡人编织在网中。

translations.english: But I forgive you for not knowing who I am. Few hear my whispers anymore.
translations.chinese: 但我原谅你的无知。毕竟很少有人听到我的低语。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028D50]
Translations:

translations.english: And the Whispering Lady.
translations.chinese: 还有那位低语女士。

translations.english: This castle is old. Lots of places nobody's been in a long while.
translations.chinese: 这座城堡很古老。有许多无人问津的地方。

translations.english: Places where you can overhear things. See things.
translations.chinese: 能偷听、偷窥的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028D79]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And the Whispering Lady. | ZH: 还有那位低语女士。 | SID: 002463
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: This castle is old. Lots of places nobody's been in a long while. | ZH: 这座城堡很古老。有许多无人问津的地方。 | SID: 0043D6
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Places where you can overhear things. See things. | ZH: 能偷听、偷窥的地方。 | SID: 00C345

translations.english: I thought I was caught, but she started telling me even more secrets.
translations.chinese: 我以为我被发现了。但她开始告诉我更多秘密。

translations.english: I've gotten good at listening to keyholes. At the door in the basement, I hear her talking to me.
translations.chinese: 我很擅长用锁眼偷听说话。我在地下室的那扇门前听到她跟我说话。

translations.english: She won't tell me her name.
translations.chinese: 她不肯告诉我名字。

translations.english: But I can't open the door.
translations.chinese: 但我打不开门。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028D7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I thought I was caught, but she started telling me even more secrets. | ZH: 我以为我被发现了。但她开始告诉我更多秘密。 | SID: 009539
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I've gotten good at listening to keyholes. At the door in the basement, I hear her talking to me. | ZH: 我很擅长用锁眼偷听说话。我在地下室的那扇门前听到她跟我说话。 | SID: 00B7FB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: She won't tell me her name. | ZH: 她不肯告诉我名字。 | SID: 00C7BE
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: But I can't open the door. | ZH: 但我打不开门。 | SID: 00E4C7

translations.english: In the basement. Trust me, you'll see it.
translations.chinese: 在地下室。相信我，你能看到的。

translations.english: I bet she'll talk to you, too.
translations.chinese: 我打赌她也会跟你说话。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028D7E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: In the basement. Trust me, you'll see it. | ZH: 在地下室。相信我，你能看到的。 | SID: 008665
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I bet she'll talk to you, too. | ZH: 我打赌她也会跟你说话。 | SID: 00F54B

translations.english: First, you must open this door.
translations.chinese: 首先，你得打开这扇门。

translations.english: A piece of my power has been locked away behind it, and even my eyes cannot see past the seals.
translations.chinese: 我的一部分力量就锁在门后，就连我的眼睛也看不穿封印。

translations.english: I'd much rather it be in the hands of an ambitious and talented person such as yourself.
translations.chinese: 我宁愿把它交给你这样雄心勃勃又富有才华的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028D7F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: First, you must open this door. | ZH: 首先，你得打开这扇门。 | SID: 0056C7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: A piece of my power has been locked away behind it, and even my eyes cannot see past the seals. | ZH: 我的一部分力量就锁在门后，就连我的眼睛也看不穿封印。 | SID: 007DE8
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'd much rather it be in the hands of an ambitious and talented person such as yourself. | ZH: 我宁愿把它交给你这样雄心勃勃又富有才华的人。 | SID: 00D1FA

translations.english: What do you think? Are we going to let Ulfric dictate terms to us before the negotiations even start?
translations.chinese: 你怎么看？我们要在谈判前就要让乌弗瑞克对着我们发号施令？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028DA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What do you think? Are we going to let Ulfric dictate terms to us before the negotiations even start? | ZH: 你怎么看？我们要在谈判前就要让乌弗瑞克对着我们发号施令？ | SID: 00DBBA

translations.english: To think that we would sit down with that... Thalmor bitch. I say she walks or we walk.
translations.chinese: 想我们要坐下和那个……梭默婊子谈。要么她滚，要么我们走。

translations.english: By Ysmir's beard, the nerve of those Imperial bastards, eh?
translations.chinese: 伊斯米尔的胡子，这群帝国混账的脸皮够厚的吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028DA4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: To think that we would sit down with that... Thalmor bitch. I say she walks or we walk. | ZH: 想我们要坐下和那个……梭默婊子谈。要么她滚，要么我们走。 | SID: 00439B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: By Ysmir's beard, the nerve of those Imperial bastards, eh? | ZH: 伊斯米尔的胡子，这群帝国混账的脸皮够厚的吧？ | SID: 006239

translations.english: Hagraven or horker, it matters not. We've got the arrows to fell any game.
translations.chinese: 甭管是鬼婆还是海象。我们有足够的箭矢来打各种东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028DD0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hagraven or horker, it matters not. We've got the arrows to fell any game. | ZH: 甭管是鬼婆还是海象。我们有足够的箭矢来打各种东西。 | SID: 00501A

translations.english: So what can I get you?
translations.chinese: 你想要点什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028DD2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So what can I get you? | ZH: 你想要点什么？ | SID: 00BE97

translations.english: Look at you! Betcha think you're something, huh?
translations.chinese: 看看你！你一定觉得自己很了不起吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028DD3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Look at you! Betcha think you're something, huh? | ZH: 看看你！你一定觉得自己很了不起吧？ | SID: 005375

translations.english: All right, you convinced me. Doubt I'd be much good to you, anyway. The little fop cut me pretty deep.
translations.chinese: 好吧，就听你的。反正我也帮不上你。那个小丑把我伤得挺重的。

translations.english: But I slashed him good. Pretty sure I severed an artery. Don't know what you're going to find in there... but you can probably just follow the blood.
translations.chinese: 但我也打伤他了。应该是割到了他的动脉。不知道能在里面发现什么……但你可以顺着血迹走。

translations.english: I know the phrase. I'll get Cicero - you go home.
translations.chinese: 我知道密语。我来解决西塞罗，你先回吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028E27]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: All right, you convinced me. Doubt I'd be much good to you, anyway. The little fop cut me pretty deep. | ZH: 好吧，就听你的。反正我也帮不上你。那个小丑把我伤得挺重的。 | SID: 0017DE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But I slashed him good. Pretty sure I severed an artery. Don't know what you're going to find in there... but you can probably just follow the blood. | ZH: 但我也打伤他了。应该是割到了他的动脉。不知道能在里面发现什么……但你可以顺着血迹走。 | SID: 00259F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I know the phrase. I'll get Cicero - you go home. | ZH: 我知道密语。我来解决西塞罗，你先回吧。 | SID: 00CEC8

translations.english: Oh, it's ancient. Apparently one of the first Sanctuaries in Skyrim. It hasn't been used by the Brotherhood in close to a hundred years.
translations.chinese: 哦，那个圣所有年头了。是天际的第一座圣所。兄弟会已经有将近一百年没有用过那里了。

translations.english: If you say Cicero has gone there, it stands to reason that he's familiar with the place. That means you'll be fighting him on his own ground.
translations.chinese: 你既然说西塞罗去过那里，他肯定对那里很熟悉。所以你是要在他的地盘上和他斗了。

translations.english: Tread carefully.
translations.chinese: 谨慎行事。

translations.english: What do we know about the Dawnstar Sanctuary?
translations.chinese: 你对晨星圣所有什么了解？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028E29]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh, it's ancient. Apparently one of the first Sanctuaries in Skyrim. It hasn't been used by the Brotherhood in close to a hundred years. | ZH: 哦，那个圣所有年头了。是天际的第一座圣所。兄弟会已经有将近一百年没有用过那里了。 | SID: 0019AE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If you say Cicero has gone there, it stands to reason that he's familiar with the place. That means you'll be fighting him on his own ground. | ZH: 你既然说西塞罗去过那里，他肯定对那里很熟悉。所以你是要在他的地盘上和他斗了。 | SID: 00C6F0
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Tread carefully. | ZH: 谨慎行事。 | SID: 00F99A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What do we know about the Dawnstar Sanctuary? | ZH: 你对晨星圣所有什么了解？ | SID: 003486

translations.english: In there! Through the door. Some old Sanctuary, by the looks of it. I would have followed him, but I don't know the phrase.
translations.chinese: 在那里！门后头。看起来应该是个以前的圣所。我本想追进去，但是我不知道密语。

translations.english: Where's Cicero now?
translations.chinese: 西塞罗现在在哪？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028E2A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: In there! Through the door. Some old Sanctuary, by the looks of it. I would have followed him, but I don't know the phrase. | ZH: 在那里！门后头。看起来应该是个以前的圣所。我本想追进去，但是我不知道密语。 | SID: 00203D
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Where's Cicero now? | ZH: 西塞罗现在在哪？ | SID: 00F300

translations.english: Good hunting. I'll see you back at the Sanctuary.
translations.chinese: 好好打猎。我们圣所见。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028E2B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good hunting. I'll see you back at the Sanctuary. | ZH: 好好打猎。我们圣所见。 | SID: 00D88F

translations.english: Should have figured Astrid would send you.
translations.chinese: 我就知道阿斯垂德会派你过来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028E2C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Should have figured Astrid would send you. | ZH: 我就知道阿斯垂德会派你过来。 | SID: 003D3A

translations.english: Cicero's problem isn't his madness. It's an adherence to an ancient, outmoded way of life. The Night Mother's ways... simply are not our ways.
translations.chinese: 西塞罗的问题不在于疯狂。而是对古老过时道路的坚持。也就是夜母的道路……但这不是我们的活法。

translations.english: Look, the Dark Brotherhood is a family. This Sanctuary is a family. And, we've always welcomed those... shunned by society.
translations.chinese: 黑暗兄弟会是一个家庭。这个圣所就是家。而且，我们也一直欢迎……被社会抛弃的人士。

translations.english: He just couldn't accept that. And now he'll have to pay the price.
translations.chinese: 既然他无法接受，那就必须付出代价。

translations.english: Werewolves, wizards, eternal ten year-old vampires... what does it matter? In truth, I've rarely met a lunatic I haven't liked.
translations.chinese: 狼人、巫师、永远十岁的吸血鬼……但有什么关系？事实上，我没遇上过几个让我讨厌的疯子。

translations.english: Isn't there any way to work this out?
translations.chinese: 就没有其他解决办法了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00028E2D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Cicero's problem isn't his madness. It's an adherence to an ancient, outmoded way of life. The Night Mother's ways... simply are not our ways. | ZH: 西塞罗的问题不在于疯狂。而是对古老过时道路的坚持。也就是夜母的道路……但这不是我们的活法。 | SID: 003F4F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Look, the Dark Brotherhood is a family. This Sanctuary is a family. And, we've always welcomed those... shunned by society. | ZH: 黑暗兄弟会是一个家庭。这个圣所就是家。而且，我们也一直欢迎……被社会抛弃的人士。 | SID: 005258
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: He just couldn't accept that. And now he'll have to pay the price. | ZH: 既然他无法接受，那就必须付出代价。 | SID: 00E491
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Werewolves, wizards, eternal ten year-old vampires... what does it matter? In truth, I've rarely met a lunatic I haven't liked. | ZH: 狼人、巫师、永远十岁的吸血鬼……但有什么关系？事实上，我没遇上过几个让我讨厌的疯子。 | SID: 00F597
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Isn't there any way to work this out? | ZH: 就没有其他解决办法了吗？ | SID: 00BCAA

translations.english: Ha ha ha ha ha.
translations.chinese: 哈哈哈哈。

translations.english: What gave it away?
translations.chinese: 你怎么找来的？

translations.english: Yeah, got to admit that little jester is good with that butter knife. But don't worry, I gave as good as I got.
translations.chinese: 是啊，不得不说那小丑玩黄油刀玩得很溜。但别担心，我已经尽力伤他了。

translations.english: You're hurt.
translations.chinese: 你受伤了。

translations.chinese: 很好。我快忙不过来了。需要你帮忙。

translations.english: I'm here to help.
translations.chinese: 我来帮忙了。

translations.english: We're taking the city. Meet the brothers gathering for the attack. Fight well or die well. Talos be with you.
translations.chinese: 我们要攻城了。去找其他准备进攻的兄弟们会合。不成功就成仁。愿塔洛斯与你同在。

translations.english: How can I help?
translations.chinese: 我能帮上什么？

translations.english: In fact, the night she disappeared, she was supposed to meet Alva.
translations.chinese: 其实，她失踪那晚，本来是要去见阿尔瓦的。

translations.english: Alva told me later that she never showed up. I never got to tell her good bye.
translations.chinese: 阿尔瓦后来告诉我，她没有去。我都没来得及跟她告别。

translations.english: She began to spend a lot of time with Alva. Yet just a week before, she despised her.
translations.chinese: 她开始经常和阿尔瓦在一起。然而就在一周前，她还很鄙视她。

translations.english: You found me! Laelette was trying to find me too, but I'm glad you found me first.
translations.chinese: 你找到我了！拉莱特也想找到我，但很高兴你领先了。

translations.english: Laelette was told to burn mommy and me, but she didn't want to.
translations.chinese: 有人让拉莱特来烧死我和妈妈，但她不想。

translations.english: She kissed me on the neck, and I got so cold that the fire didn't even hurt.
translations.chinese: 她亲了我的脖子，我冷得连被火烧都不疼了。

translations.english: Laelette thought she could take me and keep me, but she can't. I'm all burned up.
translations.chinese: 拉莱特以为能带我走，但她做不到。我累坏了。

translations.english: I'm tired. I'm going to sleep for a while now.
translations.chinese: 我太累了。我要先睡一会儿。

translations.english: She wanted to play with me forever and ever.
translations.chinese: 她想永远和我一起玩。

translations.english: Now there's a mystery.
translations.chinese: 现在是个谜。

translations.english: I'm pretty sure she up and joined the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 我很肯定她是加入风暴斗篷了。

translations.english: She ran away when the war started. Her husband, Thonnir, was devastated. No note or nothin'.
translations.chinese: 战争一开始她就跑了。她丈夫索尼尔十分悲痛。音信全无啊。

EDID: [00029952]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I thought I was clear regarding the dangers that awaited you within the Dreamstride. | ZH: 我以为我已经充分提醒过你梦中漫步的危险了。 | SID: 00FABD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: However, this hardly matters any longer as you appear to have exited unscathed. | ZH: 不过你毫发无损地出来了，也就不重要了。 | SID: 00FD39

translations.english: After what you just experienced, you are not amazed? I am at a loss for words.
translations.chinese: 经历这些你不惊讶吗？我是不知道说什么好了。

agentText:

translations.english: We used to think the pirates had an army of battlemages at their side.
translations.chinese: 我们曾以为海盗里有一支战斗法师队伍。

translations.english: He also has a fearsome control of Destruction magic.
translations.chinese: 他还精于可怕的毁灭魔法。

translations.english: As it turns out, it was just one. Haldyn. I've since learned more about him.
translations.chinese: 事实证明，只有一个人。哈尔丁。后来我详细调查过他。

translations.english: I wish you the best of luck.
translations.chinese: 希望你好运吧。

translations.english: The most dangerous sort of man -- quick to anger, but patient in exacting vengeance.
translations.chinese: 他是最危险的那种人，暴躁易怒，但又耐得下心伺机报复。

translations.english: A very powerful family in Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 风舵城的一个强大家族。

translations.english: They run a private shipping operation, and would love to have the docks to themselves.
translations.chinese: 他们经营着一家私人航运，希望能拥有自己的码头。

translations.english: Wouldn't surprise me if they were in league with the pirates, somehow.
translations.chinese: 如果是他们和海盗勾结，我是不会惊讶的。

agentText:

translations.english: If it were to somehow end up in my hands, I wouldn't argue.
translations.chinese: 如果能落在我的手里，也就确凿了。

translations.english: She's meticulous to a fault, and keeps a logbook with every transaction she makes.
translations.chinese: 她生性严谨。每笔交易都有日记记录。

translations.english: Not yet, no. But perhaps an intrepid person such as yourself could help with that.
translations.chinese: 还没有。但也许你这样的勇士能帮上忙。

translations.english: They have a dark elf who oversees their operations. Suvaris Atheron.
translations.chinese: 他们有个监工的暗精灵。苏瓦利斯·奥瑟伦。

translations.english: I know this place looks horrible -- please don't hold it against the Company.
translations.chinese: 我知道这地方看起来很糟，但请不要因此厌恶公司。

agentText:

EDID: [00029A96]

translations.english: Please excuse the mess.
translations.chinese: 这里很乱，请见谅。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029A97]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please excuse the mess. | ZH: 这里很乱，请见谅。 | SID: 0044D9

translations.english: If you get me the logbook, I'll have proof of Shatter-Shield's treachery.
translations.chinese: 如果你能把日记找来，我就能掌握碎盾氏族背叛的证据了。

agentText:

translations.english: Let me know when you've learned more about the pirates.
translations.chinese: 等你找到海盗的情报就来告诉我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029A99]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me know when you've learned more about the pirates. | ZH: 等你找到海盗的情报就来告诉我。 | SID: 006174

translations.english: She's probably the one you ought to talk to.
translations.chinese: 你应该和她谈谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029A9A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She's probably the one you ought to talk to. | ZH: 你应该和她谈谈。 | SID: 0044B9

translations.english: We're so grateful for your help.
translations.chinese: 非常感谢你的帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029A9B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're so grateful for your help. | ZH: 非常感谢你的帮助。 | SID: 002ACB

translations.english: Ye gods! You think Alva is a vampire?
translations.chinese: 神啊！你说阿尔瓦是吸血鬼？

translations.english: You think Alva...but that means...
translations.chinese: 你是说阿尔瓦……但这就是说……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029AA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Ye gods! You think Alva is a vampire? | ZH: 神啊！你说阿尔瓦是吸血鬼？ | SID: 009CCE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You think Alva...but that means... | ZH: 你是说阿尔瓦……但这就是说…… | SID: 00C8A8

translations.english: The Greybeards can tell you much more than I can. They're the masters of the Way of the Voice and taught Tiber Septim himself.
translations.chinese: 灰胡子能说的远比我多。他们是吼声之道的大师，还曾经教导过泰伯·塞普汀。

translations.english: I don't know much. Only the old tales about the ancient heroes who would use the Voice to defeat the enemies of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我知道的不太多。只知道古老的传说中古代英雄会用吼声打败天际的敌人。

translations.english: They say the Emperors used to be Dragonborn, but that all ended when Martin died during the Oblivion Crisis.
translations.chinese: 他们说皇帝曾经都是龙裔，直到马丁在湮灭危机中死去。

translations.english: No doubt those Greybeards up at High Hrothgar will talk your ear off about it.
translations.chinese: 不用说，霍斯加修道院的灰胡子肯定会把这事儿和你唠叨个没完。

translations.english: The only thing I remember is the old story of Tiber Septim being called Dragonborn by the Nords, before they switched sides and joined the Empire.
translations.chinese: 我只记得一个老故事，泰伯·塞普汀被诺德人叫做龙裔，直到后来他们加入了帝国一方。

translations.english: They live in seclusion on the slopes of the Throat of the World, the great mountain of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 他们居住在天际最高山世界之喉的山坡上。

translations.english: They're masters of the Way of the Voice. If you really are Dragonborn, they're the ones who can teach you how to use your power.
translations.chinese: 他们是吼声之道的大师。如果你真是龙裔，他们能教导你如何使用自己的力量。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: They're masters of the Way of the Voice. If you really are Dragonborn, they're the ones who can teach you how to use your power. | ZH: 他们是吼声之道的大师。如果你真是龙裔，他们能教导你如何使用自己的力量。 | SID: 00B285

translations.english: Near as I can tell, a bunch of ancient Nord hermits who live on top of a mountain.
translations.chinese: 据我所知，他们是一群住在高山之上的诺德隐士。

translations.english: Never heard of them talking to anybody before. If they really do want to talk to you, you'd better go find out what they want. You never know.
translations.chinese: 从没听说他们和谁讲过话。如果他们真的和你说话，那你最好弄清他们的意图，毕竟，世事难料啊。

translations.english: In the old tales, Nord heroes would use the power of their Voice to Shout down the gates of cities and strike down their enemies.
translations.chinese: 在古老传说中，诺德英雄们会用吼声之力打破城门、击败敌军。

translations.english: But only the Greybeards study the Way of the Voice any more. If you can Shout... you need to talk to them.
translations.chinese: 但如今只有灰胡子还在研习吼声之道。如果你能使用龙吼……那就该去和他们谈谈。

agentText:

translations.english: Old Nord folk tales always talk about Shouting their enemies to pieces. I always thought it was just a myth.
translations.chinese: 在古诺德故事里人们总说要把敌人喊成碎片。我一直以为这只是神话。

translations.english: Go talk to the Greybeards, see what they can tell you.
translations.chinese: 去和灰胡子谈谈，看看他们怎么说。

translations.english: If you think you might be able to do that kind of thing, the Legion could certainly use your help.
translations.chinese: 如果你自认为可以做到，那军团当然需要你的帮助。

translations.english: I'm just the Housecarl. If you need something, you should speak to Kraldar.
translations.chinese: 我只是侍卫。如果有什么需要，请找卡拉达。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029CE5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm just the Housecarl. If you need something, you should speak to Kraldar. | ZH: 我只是侍卫。如果有什么需要，请找卡拉达。 | SID: 004923

translations.english: We may not have as much to offer as Whiterun or Solitude, but we'll do what we can to make your stay a pleasant one.
translations.chinese: 我们也许不能像白漫独孤那样提供丰富的东西，但也会尽所能让你在这里过得愉快。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029CE6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We may not have as much to offer as Whiterun or Solitude, but we'll do what we can to make your stay a pleasant one. | ZH: 我们也许不能像白漫独孤那样提供丰富的东西，但也会尽所能让你在这里过得愉快。 | SID: 00C7F3

translations.english: Winterhold doesn't offer much, but we like living here. Been here all our lives.
translations.chinese: 冬堡什么都没有，但我们喜欢住在这里。一辈子都在。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D04]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Winterhold doesn't offer much, but we like living here. Been here all our lives. | ZH: 冬堡什么都没有，但我们喜欢住在这里。一辈子都在。 | SID: 00DEF6

translations.english: If you're here for the College, don't let the folks in town bother you. Just try and keep to yourself.
translations.chinese: 如果你是来拜访学院的，别让镇上的人打扰到你。尽量别跟其他人说话。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: The Mages at the College keep to themselves for the most part, so we don't see much of them.
translations.chinese: 学院的法师们大多不与人往来，所以我们很少能见到他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D06]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Mages at the College keep to themselves for the most part, so we don't see much of them. | ZH: 学院的法师们大多不与人往来，所以我们很少能见到他们。 | SID: 00F06C

translations.english: Turns out who runs Winterhold doesn't change much. Can't say I'm surprised.
translations.chinese: 结果谁管着冬堡都没太大变化。我也不太惊讶。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D07]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Turns out who runs Winterhold doesn't change much. Can't say I'm surprised. | ZH: 结果谁管着冬堡都没太大变化。我也不太惊讶。 | SID: 00E390

translations.english: If you've business with the College, you're welcome to stay here. It's where most of our business comes from, in fact.
translations.chinese: 如果你和学院有往来，欢迎你留在这里。事实上，这也是我们大部分业务的来源。

agentText:

translations.english: Unlike some folks here in town, we have nothing against the College or the people that come and go.
translations.chinese: 我们不像镇上的某些人，不反对学院或来去学院的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D09]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unlike some folks here in town, we have nothing against the College or the people that come and go. | ZH: 我们不像镇上的某些人，不反对学院或来去学院的人。 | SID: 00D0FF

translations.english: Don't worry about Nelacar. He has a permanent room here at the Inn, but he keeps to himself and doesn't cause any trouble.
translations.chinese: 不用在意内拉卡。他在旅店有固定的房间，但不跟人来往，也不会惹麻烦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D0A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't worry about Nelacar. He has a permanent room here at the Inn, but he keeps to himself and doesn't cause any trouble. | ZH: 不用在意内拉卡。他在旅店有固定的房间，但不跟人来往，也不会惹麻烦。 | SID: 00DEEA

translations.english: Let me know if you need anything. We're here to provide.
translations.chinese: 有什么需要就告诉我们，我们会提供的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D0B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me know if you need anything. We're here to provide. | ZH: 有什么需要就告诉我们，我们会提供的。 | SID: 00C26D

translations.english: Without us looking out for Winterhold, it's doomed. Simply doomed.
translations.chinese: 没有我们的守护，冬堡就完了。很容易就完了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D0C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Without us looking out for Winterhold, it's doomed. Simply doomed. | ZH: 没有我们的守护，冬堡就完了。很容易就完了。 | SID: 00E124

translations.english: Korir will be the first to tell you that if it weren't for that College, we'd all be better off. I agree with him.
translations.chinese: 科利尔总会先告诉你，如果没有那所学院，我们的生活会更好。我同意他的观点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029D0D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Korir will be the first to tell you that if it weren't for that College, we'd all be better off. I agree with him. | ZH: 科利尔总会先告诉你，如果没有那所学院，我们的生活会更好。我同意他的观点。 | SID: 00D538

translations.english: Winterhold might yet thrive if that College had never been built.
translations.chinese: 如果没有那所学院，冬堡也许还会兴旺发达下去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00029DCC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Winterhold might yet thrive if that College had never been built. | ZH: 如果没有那所学院，冬堡也许还会兴旺发达下去。 | SID: 0085A1

translations.english: We do the best we can, even though we have next to nothing. But we Nords don't give up, not ever.
translations.chinese: 即使一无所有，我们也会尽力做到最好。诺德人不言放弃，永远不会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 你去杀巨人，再把锤子交给我。我们一起回拉加施布尔，我告诉所有人说是我干的。

translations.chinese: 干得漂亮。你拥有真正的战斗精神。比我做得还要好。

translations.english: Of course, I can't let you leave here alive. Wouldn't want anyone finding out.
translations.chinese: 不过，我不能让你活着离开。我可不想被人发现。

translations.english: Yamarz has fallen. It is now up to you to return the giant's hammer to Atub.
translations.chinese: 亚马兹已死。由你把巨人之锤交给阿图布。

translations.english: The tribe may yet survive, but only if you are willing to do what is right.
translations.chinese: 部落能否延续，都取决于你的抉择了。

translations.chinese: 我无意冒犯。我就是个卑微的农民，不是你那样伟大的冒险者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ABCB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I mean no offense. I am but a humble farmer, not a great wanderer, like you. | ZH: 我无意冒犯。我就是个卑微的农民，不是你那样伟大的冒险者。 | SID: 00DC19

translations.english: You! You'll help me! You help people, right? That's what you do?
translations.chinese: 你！你会帮我的！你很乐于助人对吧？你一向这样的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AC67]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You! You'll help me! You help people, right? That's what you do? | ZH: 你！你会帮我的！你很乐于助人对吧？你一向这样的！ | SID: 0083B9

translations.english: So he has been punished? And what of us? What fate shall we suffer?
translations.chinese: 所以他被制裁了？那我们呢？我们的命运如何？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So he has been punished? And what of us? What fate shall we suffer? | ZH: 所以他被制裁了？那我们呢？我们的命运如何？ | SID: 00226D

translations.english: What? Why would he do such a thing?
translations.chinese: 什么？他怎么会怎样？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? Why would he do such a thing? | ZH: 什么？他怎么会怎样？ | SID: 004D33

translations.english: You have earned my favor for now, mortal, and so I give you a little gift. Use it well.
translations.chinese: 你赢得了我的青睐，凡人。送你一份小礼物。好好使用吧。

translations.english: You have helped rid the Orcs of Yamarz in a way that avoids the destruction of their tribe.
translations.chinese: 你帮助兽人们摆脱了亚马兹，使部落免于毁灭。

translations.english: They will become stronger for it. And you... You have proven your strength.
translations.chinese: 他们会因此变得更加强大……而你已经证明了自己的力量。

translations.english: You have done admirably, little one.
translations.chinese: 做得好，小家伙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: You have earned my favor for now, mortal, and so I give you a little gift. Use it well. | ZH: 你赢得了我的青睐，凡人。送你一份小礼物。好好使用吧。 | SID: 0094EE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: You have helped rid the Orcs of Yamarz in a way that avoids the destruction of their tribe. | ZH: 你帮助兽人们摆脱了亚马兹，使部落免于毁灭。 | SID: 009E76

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: You have done admirably, little one. | ZH: 做得好，小家伙。 | SID: 00F6E9

translations.english: You, place that hammer on the shrine. You're the only one who's proven worthy in all of this...
translations.chinese: 喂，把锤子放在祭坛上。你是唯一证明了自己价值的人……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You, place that hammer on the shrine. You're the only one who's proven worthy in all of this... | ZH: 喂，把锤子放在祭坛上。你是唯一证明了自己价值的人…… | SID: 00BA73

translations.english: Ah, that is good to hear, then.
translations.chinese: 啊，那太好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, that is good to hear, then. | ZH: 啊，那太好了。 | SID: 004C53

translations.english: I see. He did not survive. He... He died well?
translations.chinese: 我明白了。他没活下来。他……死的光荣吗？

translations.english: But... What of Yamarz?
translations.chinese: 不过……亚马兹呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I see. He did not survive. He... He died well? | ZH: 我明白了。他没活下来。他……死的光荣吗？ | SID: 007E64
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: But... What of Yamarz? | ZH: 不过……亚马兹呢？ | SID: 00AE50

translations.english: You'll have to prove yourselves, but I'm willing to give you a chance. Gularzob's in charge now. Let's hope he's a better chief.
translations.chinese: 你们必须证明自己，不过，我愿意给你们一个机会。古拉佐伯从现在起领导你们，希望他是个好酋长。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'll have to prove yourselves, but I'm willing to give you a chance. Gularzob's in charge now. Let's hope he's a better chief. | ZH: 你们必须证明自己，不过，我愿意给你们一个机会。古拉佐伯从现在起领导你们，希望他是个好酋长。 | SID: 00B167

translations.english: Yamarz was a coward and a weakling. His deceitful ways have cost you all greatly.
translations.chinese: 亚马兹是个弱小的懦夫。他的卑劣行径让你们损失惨重。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACC9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yamarz was a coward and a weakling. His deceitful ways have cost you all greatly. | ZH: 亚马兹是个弱小的懦夫。他的卑劣行径让你们损失惨重。 | SID: 00520E

translations.english: Are you all right? I heard the commotion. Who was Cicero talking to? Where's the accomplice? Reveal yourself, traitor!
translations.chinese: 你怎么样？我听到了骚动。西塞罗在和谁说话？共犯是谁？自己站出来，叛徒！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACF8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are you all right? I heard the commotion. Who was Cicero talking to? Where's the accomplice? Reveal yourself, traitor! | ZH: 你怎么样？我听到了骚动。西塞罗在和谁说话？共犯是谁？自己站出来，叛徒！ | SID: 00031D

translations.english: Volunruud? Well, that is interesting. I know this place...
translations.chinese: 沃伦鲁德？有趣。我知道那地方……

translations.english: He's in some place called Volunruud.
translations.chinese: 他在一个叫沃伦鲁德的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACF9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Volunruud? Well, that is interesting. I know this place... | ZH: 沃伦鲁德？有趣。我知道那地方…… | SID: 00DA71
- INFO:RNAM | EN: He's in some place called Volunruud. | ZH: 他在一个叫沃伦鲁德的地方。 | SID: 000906

translations.english: Then what in Sithis' name is going on? Cicero spoke to the Night Mother, but she spoke to you? Is this just more of the fool's rambling?
translations.chinese: 到底是怎么回事？西塞罗在和夜母交谈，然后夜母和你说话了？是那个笨蛋在胡言乱语吗？

translations.english: Yes, I'm fine.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我没事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACFA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then what in Sithis' name is going on? Cicero spoke to the Night Mother, but she spoke to you? Is this just more of the fool's rambling? | ZH: 到底是怎么回事？西塞罗在和夜母交谈，然后夜母和你说话了？是那个笨蛋在胡言乱语吗？ | SID: 002FC5
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes, I'm fine. | ZH: 嗯，我没事。 | SID: 0084FF

translations.english: And... what did she say?
translations.chinese: 那……她和你说什么了？

translations.english: By Sithis.
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上。

translations.english: Yes.
translations.chinese: 没错。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACFB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And... what did she say? | ZH: 那……她和你说什么了？ | SID: 001CF4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: By Sithis. | ZH: 西帝斯在上。 | SID: 003817
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes. | ZH: 没错。 | SID: 00CD66

translations.english: What? The Listener? What are you going on about? What is this lunacy?
translations.chinese: 什么？聆听者？你在说什么？这是怎么一回事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACFD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? The Listener? What are you going on about? What is this lunacy? | ZH: 什么？聆听者？你在说什么？这是怎么一回事？ | SID: 001D91

translations.english: It's true, it's true! The Night Mother has spoken! The silence has been broken! The Listener has been chosen!
translations.chinese: 是真的，是真的！夜母说话了！沉寂被打破了！聆听者已经诞生了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACFE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's true, it's true! The Night Mother has spoken! The silence has been broken! The Listener has been chosen! | ZH: 是真的，是真的！夜母说话了！沉寂被打破了！聆听者已经诞生了！ | SID: 00CC1E

translations.english: By the almighty Divines. You've come. You've actually come. This dreadful Black Sacrament thing... it worked.
translations.chinese: 圣灵在上。你来了，你真的来了。可怕的黑色圣礼……成功了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002ACFF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By the almighty Divines. You've come. You've actually come. This dreadful Black Sacrament thing... it worked. | ZH: 圣灵在上。你来了，你真的来了。可怕的黑色圣礼……成功了。 | SID: 000FA0

translations.english: There are indeed. Three, to be exact.
translations.chinese: 确实有。而且有三个。

translations.english: There's Deekus, a shipwreck scavenger. Ma'randru-jo, a traveling caravaner. And Anoriath, a hunter.
translations.chinese: 沉船拾荒者蒂库斯、旅行商人玛'兰德鲁-约、还有个猎人阿诺利亚斯。

translations.english: Are there any more contracts available?
translations.chinese: 还有其他契约吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD00]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: There are indeed. Three, to be exact. | ZH: 确实有。而且有三个。 | SID: 0062F8
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: There's Deekus, a shipwreck scavenger. Ma'randru-jo, a traveling caravaner. And Anoriath, a hunter. | ZH: 沉船拾荒者蒂库斯、旅行商人玛'兰德鲁-约、还有个猎人阿诺利亚斯。 | SID: 00EF2F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Are there any more contracts available? | ZH: 还有其他契约吗？ | SID: 00AA77

translations.english: Hmph. How about, instead of giving you another contract, I simply deride you for not finishing the one you still have?
translations.chinese: 嗯。与其给你新契约，我是不是应该先嘲笑你没把手头的契约完成？

translations.english: Astrid sent me for another contract.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德派我来接新的契约。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD02]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. How about, instead of giving you another contract, I simply deride you for not finishing the one you still have? | ZH: 嗯。与其给你新契约，我是不是应该先嘲笑你没把手头的契约完成？ | SID: 00EE11
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Astrid sent me for another contract. | ZH: 阿斯垂德派我来接新的契约。 | SID: 005B8E

translations.english: So it would appear. Though I'd suspect she'd want you to complete your other contracts first. Do those, then we'll talk about something new.
translations.chinese: 是吗。不过我猜她应该是希望你先完成手头上的。等做完再来谈新的吧。

translations.english: Astrid sent me for another contract.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德派我来接新的契约。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD03]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So it would appear. Though I'd suspect she'd want you to complete your other contracts first. Do those, then we'll talk about something new. | ZH: 是吗。不过我猜她应该是希望你先完成手头上的。等做完再来谈新的吧。 | SID: 00B588
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Astrid sent me for another contract. | ZH: 阿斯垂德派我来接新的契约。 | SID: 001140

translations.english: Hmm?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

translations.english: No. No! Listen, I don't know what's going on here, but you take your orders from me. Are we clear on that?
translations.chinese: 不。不！听着，我不知道发生了什么。但你得听我的命令。懂吗？

translations.english: I... I need time to think about all this. Go see Nazir - do some work for him. I'll find you when I'm ready to discuss the matter further.
translations.chinese: 我……需要时间好好想想。去找纳兹尔，帮他做几个活儿。等我准备好进一步讨论这件事的时候，我会找你的。

translations.english: The Night Mother may have spoken to you, but I am still the leader of this Family. I will not have my authority so easily dismissed.
translations.chinese: 也许夜母真的和你说话了，但我还是这个家的领袖。我不允许我的权威这么轻易被推翻。

translations.english: So I should go to Volunruud? I should talk to this man?
translations.chinese: 那我该去沃伦鲁德和那个人谈谈吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD04]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Hmm? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 0067CF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: No. No! Listen, I don't know what's going on here, but you take your orders from me. Are we clear on that? | ZH: 不。不！听着，我不知道发生了什么。但你得听我的命令。懂吗？ | SID: 0090F2
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I... I need time to think about all this. Go see Nazir - do some work for him. I'll find you when I'm ready to discuss the matter further. | ZH: 我……需要时间好好想想。去找纳兹尔，帮他做几个活儿。等我准备好进一步讨论这件事的时候，我会找你的。 | SID: 00DB15
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: The Night Mother may have spoken to you, but I am still the leader of this Family. I will not have my authority so easily dismissed. | ZH: 也许夜母真的和你说话了，但我还是这个家的领袖。我不允许我的权威这么轻易被推翻。 | SID: 00E0DC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So I should go to Volunruud? I should talk to this man? | ZH: 那我该去沃伦鲁德和那个人谈谈吗？ | SID: 00A916

translations.english: Of course, Astrid. What is it?
translations.chinese: 当然，阿斯垂德。什么事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD05]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Of course, Astrid. What is it? | ZH: 当然，阿斯垂德。什么事？ | SID: 008F34

translations.english: Has the time come? Will I now serve the Night Mother?
translations.chinese: 时机到了吗？我现在能为夜母效劳了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD06]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Has the time come? Will I now serve the Night Mother? | ZH: 时机到了吗？我现在能为夜母效劳了吗？ | SID: 00974E

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD07]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 001C3F

translations.english: By Sithis, this ends now! Back away, fool! Whatever you've been planning is over!
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上，一切都结束了！站下来，小丑！不管你在谋划什么，都结束了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD08]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By Sithis, this ends now! Back away, fool! Whatever you've been planning is over! | ZH: 西帝斯在上，一切都结束了！站下来，小丑！不管你在谋划什么，都结束了！ | SID: 005BCD

translations.english: I spoke only to the Night Mother! I spoke to the Night Mother, but she didn't speak to me. Oh no. She spoke only to him! To the Listener!
translations.chinese: 我只是在和夜母说话！我和夜母说话，但她不和我说话。哦，不对。她和他说话了！聆听者！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD0C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I spoke only to the Night Mother! I spoke to the Night Mother, but she didn't speak to me. Oh no. She spoke only to him! To the Listener! | ZH: 我只是在和夜母说话！我和夜母说话，但她不和我说话。哦，不对。她和他说话了！聆听者！ | SID: 00EDCE

translations.english: Amaund Motierre? I have no idea who that is.
translations.chinese: 阿蒙德·莫提雷？没听说过。

translations.english: But Volunruud... that I have heard of. And I know where it is.
translations.chinese: 但是我听说过沃伦鲁德。我也知道位置。

translations.english: I must speak to someone named Amaund Motierre, in Volunruud.
translations.chinese: 我必须去沃伦鲁德见一个叫阿蒙德·莫提雷的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002AD0E]

translations.english: Happy hunting.
translations.chinese: 狩猎愉快。

translations.english: Your first target is an Orc bard named Lurbuk. The other is a vampire by the name of Hern.
translations.chinese: 第一个目标是兽人吟游诗人卢布克，另一个是吸血鬼赫恩。

translations.english: As a matter of fact, I do. Two of them. One rather easy assignment, and another that should prove quite a challenge.
translations.chinese: 我确实有两个。一个比较简单，但另外一个应该相对富有挑战性。

translations.english: Do you have any more contracts?
translations.chinese: 还有别的契约吗？

translations.english: I'm sorry, I don't. Come see me again later.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，没了。以后再来找我吧。

translations.english: Do you have any more contracts?
translations.chinese: 还有别的契约吗？

agentText:

translations.english: More work? My friend, you still haven't finished the last set of contracts I gave you. Why don't you concentrate on eliminating that final target.
translations.chinese: 还要更多？朋友，你还没完成我给你的上份契约呢。为什么不集中精力先把这份干完呢。

translations.english: Astrid wanted me to see you about some more work.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德派我来看有没有更多工作。

translations.english: When they left, he took off after them. Stole supplies and books from the College, I suppose as a way to ingratiate himself.
translations.chinese: 他们离开的时候，他就跟着走了。还从学院偷了东西和书。估计也是图个爽快。

translations.english: He was an Apprentice here at the College. Not very skilled, but got involved with a group of mages who took a liking to him.
translations.chinese: 以前是学院的学徒。技术还不怎么样，不过一群法师中意他，他就跟着混到一起了。

agentText:

translations.english: Well you don't even need to ask. No, I don't have anything for you. Not anymore, anyway.
translations.chinese: 你根本无需来问。没有，我这里没有东西可以给你。反正现在没有。

translations.english: I know what you want. Word travels fast around here. Discovered some big mystery, huh?
translations.chinese: 我知道你想要什么。这里消息传得很快。发现大秘密了哈？

translations.english: They were interested in research that goes outside the bounds of what the College allows, so they were... persuaded to leave.
translations.chinese: 他们对学院允许范围之外的研究很感兴趣，所以就……离开了。

translations.english: Let's just call it a "difference of opinion" with the College.
translations.chinese: 就当是和学院“意见相左”吧。

agentText:

translations.english: I said not anymore. Orthorn stole a number of books when he ran off to Fellglow Keep to join those Summoners. Some kind of peace offering.
translations.chinese: 我已经说了没法帮了。奥拓恩偷了很多书当见面礼，跑去光落堡垒加入那些召唤者了。

translations.english: I think one of those volumes may have had some relevant information. If you want them, you'll have to talk to Orthorn.
translations.chinese: 我想其中有一卷可能会有相关信息。如果需要的话，你就得去找奥拓恩。

translations.english: But if you spare me, I can be a powerful ally to you. And I would promise to never return to civilized life.
translations.chinese: 但如果你放了我，我可以成为你强大的帮手。我发誓不会再返回文明社会了。

translations.english: I can't stop you if that's what you want to do. Hircine is too powerful.
translations.chinese: 你想这么做，我也阻止不了。海尔辛太强大了。

translations.english: And I would deserve it, wouldn't I?
translations.chinese: 我是罪有应得，对吗？

translations.english: I know now that I can't live among people.
translations.chinese: 我现在终于知道，我不能与其他人一起生活。

translations.english: Thank you for your help. I will make my home here, away from anyone I might hurt.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你的帮助。我会在这里安家，远离任何可能伤害我的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B389]

translations.english: Believe me, it wasn't anything I ever intended to do. I just... lost control.
translations.chinese: 相信我，我没想那样做。我只是……失控了。

translations.english: I tried to tell them, but none of them believe me.
translations.chinese: 我想辩解，但他们不相信。

translations.english: It's all on account of this blasted ring.
translations.chinese: 都是这该死的戒指。

translations.english: A little girl is dead because of me.
translations.chinese: 一个小女孩因我而死。

translations.english: Why are you imprisoned here?
translations.chinese: 你为什么被关在这儿？

translations.english: Thank the gods. Now let's deal with these other hunters. We hunt together!
translations.chinese: 谢天谢地。现在对付其他猎人。一起狩猎吧！

translations.chinese: 走开。

translations.english: What is the music of life?
translations.chinese: 人生的音乐是什么？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B832]
Translations:

translations.english: Screaming?
translations.chinese: 是尖叫吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B833]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Screaming? | ZH: 是尖叫吗？ | SID: 006AFF

translations.english: Oh ho. The whimpering Nord, eh? Yes, yes, I can see how you'd come to that conclusion. Interesting choice.
translations.chinese: 哦，杀了那个呜咽的诺德人啊？嗯，嗯，我明白你是怎么得出这个结论的。有趣的选择。

translations.english: Welcome home.
translations.chinese: 欢迎回家。

translations.english: Silence, my brother.
translations.chinese: 是沉寂，我的兄弟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B836]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Silence, my brother. | ZH: 是沉寂，我的兄弟。 | SID: 0091C4

translations.english: Um... the lute? No, drums!
translations.chinese: 呃……鲁特琴？不不，是鼓！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B837]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Um... the lute? No, drums! | ZH: 呃……鲁特琴？不不，是鼓！ | SID: 003289

translations.english: Ah, at last! I hope you found the place all right.
translations.chinese: 啊，终于来了！希望你喜欢这儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B83F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, at last! I hope you found the place all right. | ZH: 啊，终于来了！希望你喜欢这儿。 | SID: 004D01

translations.english: Oh, I couldn't. Goes right through me. Besides, I have so many things to do...
translations.chinese: 啊，不用了。那只会从我身上穿过。而且，我还有很多事要做……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8AB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, I couldn't. Goes right through me. Besides, I have so many things to do... | ZH: 啊，不用了。那只会从我身上穿过。而且，我还有很多事要做…… | SID: 00DF0E

translations.english: Reeaaaallllyyyy?
But seriously. What's the message?
translations.chinese: 说正事。有什么消息？

translations.english: Actually... I do. Little joke.
translations.chinese: 实际上……我有的是时间。开个小玩笑。

translations.english: Ooh, ooh, what kind of message? A song? A summons? Wait, I know! A death threat written on the back of an Argonian concubine! Those are my favorite.
translations.chinese: 哦哦，什么消息啊？歌曲？召唤？等等，我知道了！写在阿尔贡情妇后背上的死亡威胁！我最喜欢这些了。

translations.english: Well? Spit it out, mortal. I haven't got an eternity!
translations.chinese: 嗯？说出来吧，凡人。真当我时间无限多嘛！

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: Well? Spit it out, mortal. I haven't got an eternity! | ZH: 嗯？说出来吧，凡人。真当我时间无限多嘛！ | SID: 00EB87

translations.english: You are the best Septim that's ever ruled. Well, except for that Martin fellow, but he turned into a dragon god, and that's hardly sporting...
translations.chinese: 你是最好的塞普汀皇帝。好吧，除了马丁那家伙，不过他变成龙神了，和他比就太不公平了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8AE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You are the best Septim that's ever ruled. Well, except for that Martin fellow, but he turned into a dragon god, and that's hardly sporting... | ZH: 你是最好的塞普汀皇帝。好吧，除了马丁那家伙，不过他变成龙神了，和他比就太不公平了…… | SID: 009276

translations.english: You are far too hard on yourself, my dear, sweet, homicidally insane Pelagius. What would the people do without you? Dance? Sing? Smile? Grow old?
translations.chinese: 你对自己太苛刻了，亲爱的小疯子佩拉吉奥斯。如果你不在了，人们会怎样？跳舞？欢歌？微笑？还是变老？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You are far too hard on yourself, my dear, sweet, homicidally insane Pelagius. What would the people do without you? Dance? Sing? Smile? Grow old? | ZH: 你对自己太苛刻了，亲爱的小疯子佩拉吉奥斯。如果你不在了，人们会怎样？跳舞？欢歌？微笑？还是变老？ | SID: 0042DC

translations.english: Yes, yes, as you've said, countless times before...
translations.chinese: 对，对，你都说过无数次了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8B1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, yes, as you've said, countless times before... | ZH: 对，对，你都说过无数次了…… | SID: 005BB9

translations.english: Oh and you'll need the hip bone... it's very important. No entering Pelagius' Wing without that.
translations.chinese: 哦，你还需要这块髋骨……这很重要。没有他就进不了佩拉吉奥斯的侧厅。

translations.english: Last I saw him, he was visiting a friend in the Blue Palace. But no one as mundane as the Jarl. No, no... such people are below him.
translations.chinese: 我上次见他在蓝宫会友。但不是领主那种身份平凡的人。不，不……没人地位在他之上。

translations.english: No, he went into the forbidden wing of the palace, to speak with an old friend. Said it had been ages since they had last had tea.
translations.chinese: 他去了宫中被封闭的侧厅，他说要找一位老朋友，他们很久没一起喝茶了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: So many undesirables to contend with. Naysayers. Buffoons. Detractors. Why, my headsman hasn't slept in three days!
translations.chinese: 还有很多讨厌鬼要对付。唱反调的、耍宝的、造谣的。哎，我的刽子手都三天没睡觉了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8B3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So many undesirables to contend with. Naysayers. Buffoons. Detractors. Why, my headsman hasn't slept in three days! | ZH: 还有很多讨厌鬼要对付。唱反调的、耍宝的、造谣的。哎，我的刽子手都三天没睡觉了！ | SID: 00969D

translations.english: Hafrumph! Well then, if you're going to be like that... Perhaps it's best I take my leave. A good day to you sir. I said good day!
translations.chinese: 哎哎！好吧，如果你那样的话……也许我该走了。祝你过得好，先生。我说祝你过得好！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8B4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hafrumph! Well then, if you're going to be like that... Perhaps it's best I take my leave. A good day to you sir. I said good day! | ZH: 哎哎！好吧，如果你那样的话……也许我该走了。祝你过得好，先生。我说祝你过得好！ | SID: 003A47

translations.english: I have a saying - I'm not going to feel what you have to like. Or something like that.
translations.chinese: 我得说，我不会有你喜欢的那种感觉，或者类似的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8B8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I have a saying - I'm not going to feel what you have to like. Or something like that. | ZH: 我得说，我不会有你喜欢的那种感觉，或者类似的东西。 | SID: 00DA36

translations.english: But you will know him when you see him. He's the one who made me like this!
translations.chinese: 不过你见到他的时候就会知道了。就是他让我变成这个样子的！

translations.english: But... he has forbidden me from saying his name. He says it distracts him, and woe to those who draw his ire.
translations.chinese: 但……他禁止我说出他的名字。他说这会分散他的注意力，那些惹恼他的人会很麻烦的。

translations.english: He is a great man, but one rarely praised! He rules twin empires that span the length and breadth of our minds! All know him, but few can name him!
translations.chinese: 他是个伟大的人，但很少被称颂！他统治着跨越我们思想长度和宽度的双生帝国！他无人不知，却很少有人能说出他的名字！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But... he has forbidden me from saying his name. He says it distracts him, and woe to those who draw his ire. | ZH: 但……他禁止我说出他的名字。他说这会分散他的注意力，那些惹恼他的人会很麻烦的。 | SID: 00747F

translations.english: I'll make an exception for you, but do not bring anything out when you leave. Too many dark deeds transpired in those halls...
translations.chinese: 我可以为你破例一次，但你走的时候别带任何东西出来。那个大厅里发生了太多黑暗的事……

translations.english: Falk, you know I'll be careful.
translations.chinese: 佛可，你知道我会小心的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8BD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll make an exception for you, but do not bring anything out when you leave. Too many dark deeds transpired in those halls... | ZH: 我可以为你破例一次，但你走的时候别带任何东西出来。那个大厅里发生了太多黑暗的事…… | SID: 00F71D
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Falk, you know I'll be careful. | ZH: 佛可，你知道我会小心的。 | SID: 00ABEC

translations.english: If you really want to... Just be careful of the ghost! He snuck up on me once and scared me sick. It took a week for me to feel better...
translations.chinese: 如果你真的想去……小心鬼魂！有一次他偷偷接近我，把我吓坏了。缓了一个星期才感觉好些……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8BE]
Translations:

translations.english: Well... I suppose in that case, it's okay to let you in. But only briefly. Be careful, and come right back!
translations.chinese: 好吧……我想让你进去也没什么。不过小心点，快去快回！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8BF]
Translations:

translations.english: More tea, Pelly my dear?
translations.chinese: 再来点茶吗，佩莉亲？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8C0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: More tea, Pelly my dear? | ZH: 再来点茶吗，佩莉亲？ | SID: 00C65A

translations.english: Now he refuses to even see me. He says I interrupt his vacation! It's been so many years... Won't you please help?
translations.chinese: 他现在甚至拒绝见我。说我打断了他的假期！已经好多年了……能请你帮帮忙吗？

translations.english: My master has abandoned me! Abandoned his people. And nothing I say can change his mind.
translations.chinese: 我主人抛弃了我！抛弃了他的民众。我没法说服他回心转意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8C1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now he refuses to even see me. He says I interrupt his vacation! It's been so many years... Won't you please help? | ZH: 他现在甚至拒绝见我。说我打断了他的假期！已经好多年了……能请你帮帮忙吗？ | SID: 00D1B4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My master has abandoned me! Abandoned his people. And nothing I say can change his mind. | ZH: 我主人抛弃了我！抛弃了他的民众。我没法说服他回心转意。 | SID: 00F721

translations.english: Absolutely not. That wing has been sealed for hundreds of years, and for good reason. They say the ghost of Pelagius the Mad still haunts it.
translations.chinese: 绝对不行。那个侧厅被锁闭了几百年了，而且不为无因。据说“疯子”佩拉吉奥斯的鬼魂还在里面游荡。

translations.english: Ghost or not, there are reminders of his dark rule that are best left buried away.
translations.chinese: 不管鬼魂真假，他黑暗统治的回忆最好被埋葬起来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Not on your life. It's dangerous in there, and Falk doesn't even like me and Erdi going in every year to clean out the spiders.
translations.chinese: 绝对不行。那里很危险，佛可甚至不想让我和厄尔迪每年进去清理蜘蛛。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8C3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not on your life. It's dangerous in there, and Falk doesn't even like me and Erdi going in every year to clean out the spiders. | ZH: 绝对不行。那里很危险，佛可甚至不想让我和厄尔迪每年进去清理蜘蛛。 | SID: 006367

translations.english: Oh, I'd get in trouble for that. It's not allowed. Besides, it's scary in there!
translations.chinese: 哦，我会惹上麻烦的。这是不允许的。而且，里面很吓人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B8C4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, I'd get in trouble for that. It's not allowed. Besides, it's scary in there! | ZH: 哦，我会惹上麻烦的。这是不允许的。而且，里面很吓人！ | SID: 0042CB

translations.english: Thank you. I'll look these over, and inform Mirabelle if I find anything relevant.
translations.chinese: 谢谢了。我会仔细查看的，如果有任何相关信息，我会通知米拉贝勒的。

translations.english: Did you read it yourself? If I recall it correctly, that has some interesting implications. You should mention that to Tolfdir.
translations.chinese: 你有读过吗？如果我没记错的话，这里面有些有趣的暗示。你应该去告诉托夫迪尔。

translations.english: Well, well. And you seem to be in one piece!
translations.chinese: 嗯，很好。看来安然无恙吗！

translations.english: "Night of Tears", eh? I remember this one. Well, isn't that interesting.
translations.chinese: “泪之夜”，嗯？我记得这个。嗯，很有趣么。

translations.english: And... here. I suppose you've earned these.
translations.chinese: 还有……给你。这是你应得的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B967]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: Thank you. I'll look these over, and inform Mirabelle if I find anything relevant. | ZH: 谢谢了。我会仔细查看的，如果有任何相关信息，我会通知米拉贝勒的。 | SID: 005BA4
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: Did you read it yourself? If I recall it correctly, that has some interesting implications. You should mention that to Tolfdir. | ZH: 你有读过吗？如果我没记错的话，这里面有些有趣的暗示。你应该去告诉托夫迪尔。 | SID: 0076F6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: Well, well. And you seem to be in one piece! | ZH: 嗯，很好。看来安然无恙吗！ | SID: 00BBBE

- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: And... here. I suppose you've earned these. | ZH: 还有……给你。这是你应得的。 | SID: 0112CD

translations.english: You. You must take the Lexicon. Free me of my burden.
translations.chinese: 你。你必须把这个方典拿走。把我从负担里解救下来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002B99E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You. You must take the Lexicon. Free me of my burden. | ZH: 你。你必须把这个方典拿走。把我从负担里解救下来。 | SID: 00579F

translations.english: Head to the Bannered Mare in Whiterun and look for Mallus Maccius. He'll fill you in on all the details.
translations.chinese: 去白漫城的悬旗母马找莫鲁斯·马修斯。他会跟你交待细节。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA6B]
Translations:

translations.english: No time for idle chatter. Mercer is awaiting your presence.
translations.chinese: 没时间闲聊了。墨瑟正等着你呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA6D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No time for idle chatter. Mercer is awaiting your presence. | ZH: 没时间闲聊了。墨瑟正等着你呢。 | SID: 008388

translations.english: Don't come back until every one of those things are dead.
translations.chinese: 在那些东西死掉之前别回来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA70]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't come back until every one of those things are dead. | ZH: 在那些东西死掉之前别回来。 | SID: 004A40

translations.english: It's about time Brynjolf sent me someone with business sense. I was beginning to think he was running some sort of beggar's guild over there.
translations.chinese: 布林乔夫也是该派个有商业头脑的人过来了。我还以为他那边在经营什么乞丐公会呢。

translations.english: You're a firebrand, aren't you?
translations.chinese: 说话很有煽动力吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA71]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's about time Brynjolf sent me someone with business sense. I was beginning to think he was running some sort of beggar's guild over there. | ZH: 布林乔夫也是该派个有商业头脑的人过来了。我还以为他那边在经营什么乞丐公会呢。 | SID: 0061FB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You're a firebrand, aren't you? | ZH: 说话很有煽动力吗？ | SID: 00E327

translations.english: Mercer thinks he knows a way to identify this new thorn in our side. He wants to meet with you right away.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟觉得自己能找出我们新麻烦的源头。他要马上见你。

translations.english: And if I were you I'd hurry. I've never seen him this angry before.
translations.chinese: 如果我是你，我会抓紧时间。我从没见过他这么气愤。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA74]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Mercer thinks he knows a way to identify this new thorn in our side. He wants to meet with you right away. | ZH: 墨瑟觉得自己能找出我们新麻烦的源头。他要马上见你。 | SID: 0024AB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And if I were you I'd hurry. I've never seen him this angry before. | ZH: 如果我是你，我会抓紧时间。我从没见过他这么气愤。 | SID: 00F72B

translations.english: Honningbrew's owner, Sabjorn, is about to hold a tasting for Whiterun's Captain of the Guard and we're going to poison the mead.
translations.chinese: 蜜之酿的老板撒布乔恩正准备为白漫城的卫兵队长举办一次品酒会，而我们则要往蜜酒里下毒。

translations.english: I'm going to keep this short 'cause we've got a lot to do.
translations.chinese: 那我长话短说，我们还有很多事要做。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Honningbrew's owner, Sabjorn, is about to hold a tasting for Whiterun's Captain of the Guard and we're going to poison the mead. | ZH: 蜜之酿的老板撒布乔恩正准备为白漫城的卫兵队长举办一次品酒会，而我们则要往蜜酒里下毒。 | SID: 002CC1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm going to keep this short 'cause we've got a lot to do. | ZH: 那我长话短说，我们还有很多事要做。 | SID: 00D4F9

translations.english: So you're the one that burned down Goldenglow Estate.
translations.chinese: 就是你烧了金色光辉庄园啊。

translations.english: Do you have any idea what that little stunt you pulled is going to cost me?
translations.chinese: 你知不知道为了你的小花招，我要付出多大的代价？

translations.english: I'm amazed you even bothered to show your face here.
translations.chinese: 居然有脸来这里也是挺新鲜的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: So you're the one that burned down Goldenglow Estate. | ZH: 就是你烧了金色光辉庄园啊。 | SID: 001285
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Do you have any idea what that little stunt you pulled is going to cost me? | ZH: 你知不知道为了你的小花招，我要付出多大的代价？ | SID: 003B88
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'm amazed you even bothered to show your face here. | ZH: 居然有脸来这里也是挺新鲜的。 | SID: 004B2D

translations.english: What are you gawking at? Can't you see I have problems here?
translations.chinese: 你看什么看？没看见我现在有麻烦吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA83]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What are you gawking at? Can't you see I have problems here? | ZH: 你看什么看？没看见我现在有麻烦吗？ | SID: 00A4D4

translations.english: You did this didn't you? I'll get you for this!
translations.chinese: 这是你干的吧？我要找你算账！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA89]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You did this didn't you? I'll get you for this! | ZH: 这是你干的吧？我要找你算账！ | SID: 00D4A8

translations.english: I believe Brynjolf wishes to speak with you. We're done here.
translations.chinese: 布林乔夫应该想和你谈谈。我们这里已经没事了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BA8B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I believe Brynjolf wishes to speak with you. We're done here. | ZH: 布林乔夫应该想和你谈谈。我们这里已经没事了。 | SID: 00F2E8

translations.english: Yaaawwwwnn....
translations.chinese: 哈啊啊啊呜呜呜呜。

translations.english: Oh, pardon me. Were you saying something? I do apologize, it's just that I find myself suddenly and irrevocably...
translations.chinese: 哦，对不起。你说什么？抱歉，只是突然不由自主感到……

translations.english: Bored!
translations.chinese: 无聊！

translations.english: I mean, really. Here you stand, before Sheogorath himself, Daedric Prince of Madness, and all you deem fit to do is... deliver a message? How sad.
translations.chinese: 我是说，真的。你站在迪德拉疯狂君王谢尔格拉面前，却只是想……传个口信儿？悲哀啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BCFA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Yaaawwwwnn.... | ZH: 哈啊啊啊呜呜呜呜。 | SID: 00DD34
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Oh, pardon me. Were you saying something? I do apologize, it's just that I find myself suddenly and irrevocably... | ZH: 哦，对不起。你说什么？抱歉，只是突然不由自主感到…… | SID: 00F188
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Bored! | ZH: 无聊！ | SID: 00F737
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I mean, really. Here you stand, before Sheogorath himself, Daedric Prince of Madness, and all you deem fit to do is... deliver a message? How sad. | ZH: 我是说，真的。你站在迪德拉疯狂君王谢尔格拉面前，却只是想……传个口信儿？悲哀啊。 | SID: 00F738

translations.english: Yes, yes, go. Leave me to my ceaseless responsibilities and burdens...
translations.chinese: 是，是，走了。继续承担无休止的责任和负担咯……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BCFB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, yes, go. Leave me to my ceaseless responsibilities and burdens... | ZH: 是，是，走了。继续承担无休止的责任和负担咯…… | SID: 00E348

translations.english: By whom?
translations.chinese: 谁啊？

translations.english: Wrong on all accounts, aren't I?
translations.chinese: 我全猜错了？

translations.english: But more to the point. Do you - tiny, puny, expendable little mortal - actually think you can convince me to leave?
translations.chinese: 更重要的是。你这个小小的、微不足道的、可有可无的凡人。真以为能劝我离开吗？

translations.english: Was it Molag? No, no... Little Tim, the toymaker's son? The ghost of King Lysandus? Or was it... Yes! Stanley, that talking grapefruit from Passwall.
translations.chinese: 莫拉格？不，不对……玩具匠的儿子，小提米？莱桑杜斯王的鬼魂？还是……对了！斯坦利，翻墙镇那个会说话的柚子。

translations.english: Ha! No matter! Honestly, I don't want to know. Why ruin the surprise?
translations.chinese: 哈！没关系！老实说我不知道。干什么破坏惊喜呢？

translations.english: Wait! Don't tell me! I want to guess!
translations.chinese: 等等！别告诉我！我要猜！

translations.english: Because that's... crazy. You do realize who you're dealing with here?
translations.chinese: 真是……疯了。你知道自己在和谁打交道吗？

translations.english: Were you now?
translations.chinese: 是吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BCFC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/7] | EN: By whom? | ZH: 谁啊？ | SID: 0046D1

- INFO:NAM1 [2/7] | EN: Wait! Don't tell me! I want to guess! | ZH: 等等！别告诉我！我要猜！ | SID: 00BEE7

translations.english: Oh, you just don't understand. Without him, I am not free! Without him, I am doomed! All of his empire shall fall into chaos...
translations.chinese: 哦，你不懂。没了他，我就没有自由！没了他，我就完了！他的帝国也会陷入一片混乱……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BCFD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, you just don't understand. Without him, I am not free! Without him, I am doomed! All of his empire shall fall into chaos... | ZH: 哦，你不懂。没了他，我就没有自由！没了他，我就完了！他的帝国也会陷入一片混乱…… | SID: 00FC3F

translations.english: If not... Then call me Sheogorath, Daedric Prince of Madness. Charmed.
translations.chinese: 如果不喜欢……那还是叫我谢尔格拉，迷人的迪德拉疯狂君王。

translations.english: Now you. You can call me Ann Marie.
translations.chinese: 你现在可以叫我，安·玛丽。

translations.english: Jolly good guess!
translations.chinese: 有意思的猜测！

translations.english: But only half right. I'm a mad god. The Mad God, actually. It's a family title. Gets passed down from me to myself every few thousand years.
translations.chinese: 但只对了一半。我是疯神。疯神，其实是一个家族的头衔。每隔几千年我就会把它传给我自己。

translations.english: But only if you're partial to being flayed alive and having an angry immortal skip rope with your entrails.
translations.chinese: 前提是你喜欢被活活剥皮，然后让愤怒的不朽者拿你的肠子当跳绳。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BCFE]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: Now you. You can call me Ann Marie. | ZH: 你现在可以叫我，安·玛丽。 | SID: 006618
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: Jolly good guess! | ZH: 有意思的猜测！ | SID: 008563
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: But only half right. I'm a mad god. The Mad God, actually. It's a family title. Gets passed down from me to myself every few thousand years. | ZH: 但只对了一半。我是疯神。疯神，其实是一个家族的头衔。每隔几千年我就会把它传给我自己。 | SID: 00A01C
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: But only if you're partial to being flayed alive and having an angry immortal skip rope with your entrails. | ZH: 前提是你喜欢被活活剥皮，然后让愤怒的不朽者拿你的肠子当跳绳。 | SID: 00FB58

translations.english: You know, you remind me of myself at a young age. All I cared about was riding narwhales and sleeping in honeycombs and drinking babies' tears...
translations.chinese: 你让我想起了年轻的自己，只关心骑独角鲸、在蜂巢里睡觉、喝婴儿的眼泪……

translations.english: Word of advice if you ride a Narwhale. Mind the pointy end.
translations.chinese: 给你个骑独角鲸的忠告。别骑尖的那一头。

translations.english: Ah, but there I go, waxing poetic about my misspent youth. Now where were we? Ah yes. You're the mortal messenger. An I am...?
translations.chinese: 啊，我又来了，讴歌我虚度的青春。我们说到哪儿了？哦对，你是那个凡人信使。我是……？

translations.english: Oh, no no no! No mistake at all. What you made was a choice. Granted, not a very wise choice, but these things happen. Ah, the folly of youth...
translations.chinese: 哦，不不不！完全没错儿。你只是做了一个选择，虽然不太明智，但事情已经发生了。啊，年轻人的愚蠢……

translations.english: Honestly. Have you any idea?
translations.chinese: 说实话，你知道吗？

translations.english: I am a part of you, little mortal. I am a shadow in your subconscious, a blemish on your fragile little psyche. You know me. You just don't know it.
translations.chinese: 我就是你的一部分，小凡人。我就是你潜意识里的阴影，是你脆弱心灵的污点。你知道我，但没感觉到。

translations.english: Wrong!
translations.chinese: 错了！

translations.english: Sheogorath, Daedric Prince of Madness. At your service.
translations.chinese: 谢尔格拉，疯狂的迪德拉君王。乐意为你效劳。

translations.english: Actually, you do. Sort of.
translations.chinese: 其实你知道的，应该知道的。

translations.english: But I hear the maids, Una and Erdi, know how to enter it for cleaning. Surely they can help for such an important matter?
translations.chinese: 不过我听说乌娜和厄尔迪两个女仆会进去打扫。这么重要的事情，他们应该会帮忙的吧？

translations.english: He stays in the Pelagius Wing of the Blue Palace. The doors are locked, and only Falk Firebeard can grant entry.
translations.chinese: 他在蓝宫的佩拉吉奥斯侧厅。门被锁上了，只有“火胡”佛可才能进去。

translations.english: Yes, but don't try to use force! He's far too mighty. He'd crush you like a clay doll, or drop you from the sky, or simply eat your brain right up!
translations.chinese: 对，但千万别动武！他太强了。他会像捏泥娃娃一样把你捏碎，或者把你扔上天再掉下来，再不然就是干脆吃掉你的脑子！

translations.english: Oh, but he probably won't do those things to you. Probably. Just remind him to come home, and... there'll be no fighting or unpleasantness. Probably.
translations.chinese: 哦，不过他可能不会对你那么做。可能吧。提醒他该回家了，然后……千万别动武，也不要闹不愉快。可能吧。

translations.english: He's just a little confused at the moment, is all. Knowing my master, he may very well reward you for bringing him to his senses!
translations.chinese: 他现在只是有点糊涂而已。我了解主人，如果帮他恢复理智，他会重赏你的！

translations.english: How rude! Can't be bothered to host an old friend for a decade or two.
translations.chinese: 真粗鲁！连招待老朋友一二十年都不愿意。

translations.english: Please, take pity on an old madman!
translations.chinese: 可怜可怜老疯子吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BD04]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, take pity on an old madman! | ZH: 可怜可怜老疯子吧！ | SID: 0053FC

translations.english: Who among you can help me?
translations.chinese: 谁能帮帮我？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BD05]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who among you can help me? | ZH: 谁能帮帮我？ | SID: 002479

translations.english: Without his guidance, our homeland is falling apart. North wages war against south! The holy flame flickers and dies! We need his return.
translations.chinese: 没了他的领导，我们的家园正在分崩离析。南北之间爆发混战！神圣的火焰闪烁欲熄！我们需要他回去。

translations.english: Oh, but... I'm sure he'll repay you when he comes to his senses! His favor is a powerful, powerful thing. And so very worth any... inconveniences.
translations.chinese: 哦，但是……我相信他恢复理智之后会酬谢你的！他的眷顾很强大，很强大。所以很值得……耽搁一点时间。

translations.english: Why do you need him back?
translations.chinese: 你为什么要他回去？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BD06]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Without his guidance, our homeland is falling apart. North wages war against south! The holy flame flickers and dies! We need his return. | ZH: 没了他的领导，我们的家园正在分崩离析。南北之间爆发混战！神圣的火焰闪烁欲熄！我们需要他回去。 | SID: 00A214

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Why do you need him back? | ZH: 你为什么要他回去？ | SID: 0095B7

translations.english: So here's what I'm going to do. I'm going to leave. That's right. I'm done. Holiday... complete. Time to return to the hum drum day-to-day.
translations.chinese: 所以我现在要走了。没错。我完事了。假期……结束了。是时候回到每天嗡嗡嗡地声音里去了。

translations.english: You have to find the way out first. Good luck with that.
translations.chinese: 你得先找到出路。祝你好运哦。

translations.english: Now that's the real question, isn't it? Because honestly, how much time off could a demented Daedra really need?
translations.chinese: 这才是问题所在，是吧？说实话啊，一个疯狂的迪德拉究竟要休息多久才行？

translations.english: On one condition.
translations.chinese: 有个条件。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: On one condition. | ZH: 有个条件。 | SID: 00BDD7

translations.english: Is it?
translations.chinese: 是吗？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BD2D]
Translations:

translations.english: The Companions? In Jorrvaskr? They're recruiting new members, from what I hear.
translations.chinese: 战友团？月瓦斯卡？我听说他们在招新人。

translations.english: Give me the latest gossip.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说最近的小道消息。

translations.english: Be glad you're here in the city, and not out in Riverwood. Those poor sods don't even have a wall.
translations.chinese: 庆幸自己现在在城里而不是河木镇吧。那里的可怜家伙连城墙都没一堵。

translations.english: You should talk to the Jarl up in Dragonsreach, lend any aid you can.
translations.chinese: 你应该去找龙临宫的领主谈谈，尽你所能提供帮助。
