translations.english: Fear not. Come dragon or giant, we'll be ready.
translations.chinese: 用不着怕。不管是龙还是巨人，我们都准备好了。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Need a blade? You should talk to Adrianne, at the forge.
translations.chinese: 需要武器？去铁匠铺找阿德里安吧。

translations.english: Need supplies? See Belethor at his store. Sleazy little man, but he has good stock.
translations.chinese: 需要补给？去贝莱托尔的店里吧。烂俗的小个子，但货底不错。

translations.english: I worry about the other settlements in the hold. Unwalled, lightly manned - prime targets for those damned dragons.
translations.chinese: 我担心领地的其他定居点。没有城墙没有人手，肯定会成那些龙的首选目标。

translations.english: Rorikstead's a nice enough little hamlet, but a boring posting for a guard. If a dragon attacks, well... then it'll be a different story.
translations.chinese: 洛利克镇是个不错的小村镇，但在那儿当卫兵就太无聊了。如果有龙袭击，那就……另当别论了。

translations.english: You look tired, friend. The Bannered Mare has beds for rent.
translations.chinese: 朋友，你看起来很累啊。到悬旗母马租张床吧。

translations.english: No lollygaggin'.

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No lollygaggin'. | ZH: 没功夫闲扯。 | SID: 00F791

translations.english: Let me guess - someone stole your sweetroll...
translations.chinese: 让我猜猜，有人偷了你的甜卷吧。

translations.chinese: 蔑视法律就是蔑视我。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE12]
Translations:

translations.english: At least you remembered one of the things I asked. Let me see that.
translations.chinese: 至少你还记得我让你做的事。让我看看。

translations.english: Sorry. Here's what was in the safe.
translations.chinese: 抱歉。这是保险柜里的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE47]
Translations:

translations.english: Should our paths cross again, I will remember your kindness. Farewell.
translations.chinese: 如果再次相遇，我会记得你的好处。告辞。

translations.english: Seek out the beast. He wanders these woods. Bring him down and... well, the Lord of the Hunt should smile on you.
translations.chinese: 去寻找那头野兽。它就在树林里游荡。猎杀它……就能取悦狩猎之王。

translations.english: Oh my. You would do this for me? Here, take it. I don't want anything to do with this wretched thing anymore.
translations.chinese: 哦。你愿意帮我？来，拿着吧。我不想再和这见鬼的东西扯上关系了。

translations.english: I wish you luck, but should leave here while I still have my skin.
translations.chinese: 祝你好运，但我还得趁自己的皮还在，赶紧离开。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE54]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Should our paths cross again, I will remember your kindness. Farewell. | ZH: 如果再次相遇，我会记得你的好处。告辞。 | SID: 001451
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Seek out the beast. He wanders these woods. Bring him down and... well, the Lord of the Hunt should smile on you. | ZH: 去寻找那头野兽。它就在树林里游荡。猎杀它……就能取悦狩猎之王。 | SID: 009D82
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Oh my. You would do this for me? Here, take it. I don't want anything to do with this wretched thing anymore. | ZH: 哦。你愿意帮我？来，拿着吧。我不想再和这见鬼的东西扯上关系了。 | SID: 00A375
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I wish you luck, but should leave here while I still have my skin. | ZH: 祝你好运，但我还得趁自己的皮还在，赶紧离开。 | SID: 00EC69

translations.english: This is the Ring of Hircine. I was told it could let me control my transformations.
translations.chinese: 海尔辛的戒指。我听说，只要得到它，我就能控制变身能力。

translations.english: I put it on... and the changes just came to me. I could never guess when. It would be at the worst times.
translations.chinese: 戴上了它之后……就会突然变化。我永远想不到变化什么时候会发生。但总是在最糟糕的时刻。

translations.english: Perhaps it used to. But I'll never know. Hircine didn't care for my taking it, and threw a curse on it.
translations.chinese: 或许它过去有那种奇效。可惜我永远没法验证了。海尔辛不愿让我拿走，甚至还施加了诅咒。

translations.english: Like... with the little girl.
translations.chinese: 就像……和那个小女孩在一起时。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE55]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: This is the Ring of Hircine. I was told it could let me control my transformations. | ZH: 海尔辛的戒指。我听说，只要得到它，我就能控制变身能力。 | SID: 001192
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I put it on... and the changes just came to me. I could never guess when. It would be at the worst times. | ZH: 戴上了它之后……就会突然变化。我永远想不到变化什么时候会发生。但总是在最糟糕的时刻。 | SID: 0097C4
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Perhaps it used to. But I'll never know. Hircine didn't care for my taking it, and threw a curse on it. | ZH: 或许它过去有那种奇效。可惜我永远没法验证了。海尔辛不愿让我拿走，甚至还施加了诅咒。 | SID: 00BCE9
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Like... with the little girl. | ZH: 就像……和那个小女孩在一起时。 | SID: 00F7A9

translations.english: Our daughter. Our little girl. She hadn't seen her tenth winter.
translations.chinese: 我们的女儿。我们的小女儿。她还没有度过十岁的冬天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE56]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Our daughter. Our little girl. She hadn't seen her tenth winter. | ZH: 我们的女儿。我们的小女儿。她还没有度过十岁的冬天。 | SID: 009986

translations.english: I don't suppose there's a point in keeping the secret if I'm going to die in here anyway.
translations.chinese: 反正我会死在这儿了，保守秘密也没什么意义。

translations.english: I am one of them. A werewolf. It's my secret, and my shame.
translations.chinese: 我就是其中之一。我是狼人。这既是秘密，也是耻辱。

translations.english: Now I may look like a man, but I still feel the animal inside of me, as strong as ever.
translations.chinese: 现在我看似一个人类，但我能感受到内在的野兽如以前一样强壮。

translations.english: I'm sure you've heard of men who shift to beasts under the influence of the moons.
translations.chinese: 你肯定听过，人类在月亮的影响下变成猛兽的传闻。

translations.english: That's why I wanted the ring... it was said to give men like me control.
translations.chinese: 所以我才想要这个戒指……据说它能让人掌握变身的主动权。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE57]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: I don't suppose there's a point in keeping the secret if I'm going to die in here anyway. | ZH: 反正我会死在这儿了，保守秘密也没什么意义。 | SID: 006465
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: I am one of them. A werewolf. It's my secret, and my shame. | ZH: 我就是其中之一。我是狼人。这既是秘密，也是耻辱。 | SID: 007A23
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: Now I may look like a man, but I still feel the animal inside of me, as strong as ever. | ZH: 现在我看似一个人类，但我能感受到内在的野兽如以前一样强壮。 | SID: 009964
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: I'm sure you've heard of men who shift to beasts under the influence of the moons. | ZH: 你肯定听过，人类在月亮的影响下变成猛兽的传闻。 | SID: 00BF12
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: That's why I wanted the ring... it was said to give men like me control. | ZH: 所以我才想要这个戒指……据说它能让人掌握变身的主动权。 | SID: 00EE1E

translations.english: I had just come into Falkreath. They needed some help working the mill, and I thought that would be something safe. Something I could do.
translations.chinese: 我刚刚来佛克瑞斯。他们想雇人在磨坊工作。我觉得应该很安全，而且力所能及。

translations.english: I... I feel terrible about what happened. About what I did. It would probably be best for everyone if I just went away.
translations.chinese: 我……我为所做的一切感到懊悔。我还是应该远离大家。

translations.english: When I saw the little girl, I was just... I could feel it coming on. I could taste the... I needed to hunt.
translations.chinese: 直到我看到那个小女孩，我只是……感觉到了。我能够尝到……渴望狩猎的滋味。

translations.english: I held in my rage as long as I could. But it boiled inside of me.
translations.chinese: 我尽可能的抑制愤怒。但它还是在我的体内沸腾。

translations.english: She looked so fragile. Helpless prey. And then...
translations.chinese: 她看上去那么脆弱。像个无助的猎物。然后……

translations.english: But this pitiful, limited body wasn't meant for hunting. Slow. No claws. Weak, mashing teeth for chewing cud.
translations.chinese: 但这个可怜而有限的肉体没法用来打猎。速度迟钝，没有爪子。而且只有一口能用咀嚼的磨牙。

translations.english: Sinding. Came through as a laborer. Seemed like a decent man.
translations.chinese: 辛丁。来这里做工。看上去很正派的一个人。

translations.english: He's stewing in the pit while we figure out what to do with him, if you've got the stomach to look at him.
translations.chinese: 他被关在牢坑里，等待处置。如果不怕反胃，可以去看看。

translations.english: What could drive a man to do something like this?
translations.chinese: 一个人怎能作出这种事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Sinding. Came through as a laborer. Seemed like a decent man. | ZH: 辛丁。来这里做工。看上去很正派的一个人。 | SID: 002E0B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He's stewing in the pit while we figure out what to do with him, if you've got the stomach to look at him. | ZH: 他被关在牢坑里，等待处置。如果不怕反胃，可以去看看。 | SID: 005EB1
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: What could drive a man to do something like this? | ZH: 一个人怎能作出这种事？ | SID: 00CCED

translations.english: She was... he ripped her apart. Like a sabre cat tears a deer. We barely found enough of her to bury.
translations.chinese: 她被……撕成了碎片。就像剑齿虎把麋鹿扯开那样。我们甚至没法找全她的尸体安葬。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE5B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She was... he ripped her apart. Like a sabre cat tears a deer. We barely found enough of her to bury. | ZH: 她被……撕成了碎片。就像剑齿虎把麋鹿扯开那样。我们甚至没法找全她的尸体安葬。 | SID: 00E86C

translations.english: You take care of yourself, now. And if you ever find yourself in New Sheoth, do look me up. We can share a strawberry torte. Ta ta!
translations.chinese: 照顾好自己吧。如果有了发现自己到了新谢尔斯，一定来找我，我们可以一起吃草莓蛋糕。铛铛！

agentText:

translations.english: Luggage! Now where did I leave my luggage?
translations.chinese: 行李！我把行李放哪儿了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE78]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Luggage! Now where did I leave my luggage? | ZH: 行李！我把行李放哪儿了？ | SID: 0041AB

translations.english: Ha! I do love it when the mortals know they're being manipulated. Makes things infinitely more interesting.
translations.chinese: 哈！我就喜欢凡人得知自己被人操纵时候的感觉。让事情变得再有意思点吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE7A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha! I do love it when the mortals know they're being manipulated. Makes things infinitely more interesting. | ZH: 哈！我就喜欢凡人得知自己被人操纵时候的感觉。让事情变得再有意思点吧。 | SID: 00B2F9

translations.english: And as for you, my little mortal minion... Feel free to keep the Wabbajack. As a symbol of my... Oh, just take the damn thing.
translations.chinese: 至于你，凡人小奴才……你留着瓦巴杰克吧。作为我的……哦，赶紧拿走那破玩意儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And as for you, my little mortal minion... Feel free to keep the Wabbajack. As a symbol of my... Oh, just take the damn thing. | ZH: 至于你，凡人小奴才……你留着瓦巴杰克吧。作为我的……哦，赶紧拿走那破玩意儿。 | SID: 007A05

translations.english: Pelagius Septim the Third, once the Mad Emperor of Tamriel, now so boringly sane. I always knew he had it in him!
translations.chinese: 佩拉吉奥斯三世，曾经的泰姆瑞尔疯子皇帝，现在又理智得令人讨厌。我就知道他有潜力！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE7E]
Translations:

translations.english: Let's make sure I'm not forgetting anything. Clothes? Check. Beard? Check! Luggage?
translations.chinese: 确认一下有没有忘东西。衣服？带了。胡子？带了！行李？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE7F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's make sure I'm not forgetting anything. Clothes? Check. Beard? Check! Luggage? | ZH: 确认一下有没有忘东西。衣服？带了。胡子？带了！行李？ | SID: 00EC48

translations.english: Yes, yes, that's quite enough celebration. Let's send you ahead, shall we?
translations.chinese: 没错没错，庆祝够了吧。我们先把你送走成吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE80]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, yes, that's quite enough celebration. Let's send you ahead, shall we? | ZH: 没错没错，庆祝够了吧。我们先把你送走成吗？ | SID: 00A205

translations.english: Welcome to the deceptively verdant mind of the Emperor Pelagius III. That's right! You're in the head of a dead, homicidally insane monarch.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到皇帝佩拉吉奥斯三世这颗稚嫩的心灵。没错！你在一个死了的，疯子皇帝的脑子里。

translations.english: The Wabbajack! Huh? Huh? Didn't see that coming, did you?
translations.chinese: 瓦巴杰克！嗯？嗯？没料到吧？是不是？

translations.english: Care to take a look around? This is not, I dare say, the Solitude botanical gardens. Have you any idea where you are? Where you truly are?
translations.chinese: 想四处看看吗？我敢说这可不是独孤城的植物园。知道自己在哪儿吗？到底在哪儿啊？

translations.english: Now, I know what you're thinking. Can I still rely on my swords and spells and sneaking and all that nonsense? Sure, sure. Or... you could use...
translations.chinese: 我知道你在想什么。我还能依靠剑和魔法还有那些小花招吗？当然，当然。或者……你还可以用……

translations.english: Master! You've taken me back! Does this mean we're going home? Oh, happy times! I can't wait to...
translations.chinese: 主人！你把我带回来了！是不是要回家了？哦，太好了！我快等不及了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Well, I suppose it's back to the Shivering Isles. The trouble Haskill can get into while I'm gone simply boggles the mind...
translations.chinese: 好吧，我想也是该回战栗群岛了。我不在的时候，哈斯基尔肯定遇上好多麻烦……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BE84]

translations.english: The Legion could sure use someone like you. Good luck.
translations.chinese: 军团需要你这样的人。保重。

translations.english: If I make it back to Solitude, I'll put in a good word for you with General Tullius.
translations.chinese: 如果我回了独孤城，我会替你向图留斯将军说好话的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BF93]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The Legion could sure use someone like you. Good luck. | ZH: 军团需要你这样的人。保重。 | SID: 007B48
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: If I make it back to Solitude, I'll put in a good word for you with General Tullius. | ZH: 如果我回了独孤城，我会替你向图留斯将军说好话的。 | SID: 00EC34

translations.english: Stick close. Damn rebels could be anywhere. Don't worry, though. General Tullius will have them on the run soon enough.
translations.chinese: 咱们走近些。这群倒霉的叛军可能从哪冒出来。不过别担心，图留斯将军很快就能把他们打败了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BF95]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Stick close. Damn rebels could be anywhere. Don't worry, though. General Tullius will have them on the run soon enough. | ZH: 咱们走近些。这群倒霉的叛军可能从哪冒出来。不过别担心，图留斯将军很快就能把他们打败了。 | SID: 00D23E

translations.english: The Stormcloaks pay blood for blood!
translations.chinese: 风暴斗篷以血还血！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BF97]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Stormcloaks pay blood for blood! | ZH: 风暴斗篷以血还血！ | SID: 00B300

translations.english: You dare dishonor the Legion?
translations.chinese: 你竟敢侮辱军团？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BF98]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You dare dishonor the Legion? | ZH: 你竟敢侮辱军团？ | SID: 00DF45

translations.english: Bad idea.
translations.chinese: 这可不是好主意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BF99]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Bad idea. | ZH: 这可不是好主意。 | SID: 007039

translations.english: I killed a lot of High Elves in the Great War, and I didn't die. I guess that makes me a war hero.
translations.chinese: 我在浩大战争里杀了不少高精灵，而且还没死。可能这就成了战争英雄吧。

translations.english: Did we really save the Empire? Or did we just plant the seeds for Ulfric's uprising, and another war?
translations.chinese: 我们真的拯救了帝国？还是我们只是埋下了乌弗瑞克起义还有另外战争的种子？

translations.english: The "Great War"... there was nothing great about it. Thousands died on both sides, and where did it get us?
translations.chinese: 浩大战争……毫无什么伟大浩大可言。双方死伤成千上万，结果又如何？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BFAD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I killed a lot of High Elves in the Great War, and I didn't die. I guess that makes me a war hero. | ZH: 我在浩大战争里杀了不少高精灵，而且还没死。可能这就成了战争英雄吧。 | SID: 0056F0
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Did we really save the Empire? Or did we just plant the seeds for Ulfric's uprising, and another war? | ZH: 我们真的拯救了帝国？还是我们只是埋下了乌弗瑞克起义还有另外战争的种子？ | SID: 00B802
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The "Great War"... there was nothing great about it. Thousands died on both sides, and where did it get us? | ZH: 浩大战争……毫无什么伟大浩大可言。双方死伤成千上万，结果又如何？ | SID: 00F7B8

translations.english: You one of those "Skyrim for the Nords" types?
translations.chinese: 你也是那种觉得“天际属于诺德”的人吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BFAF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You one of those "Skyrim for the Nords" types? | ZH: 你也是那种觉得“天际属于诺德”的人吗？ | SID: 00C7A6

translations.english: And you're right, at least as far as I'm concerned.
translations.chinese: 你说得对，至少我是这么认为的。

translations.english: Don't let Ulfric or some of these other short-sighted Nords bother you. Most of us are happy to welcome newcomers.
translations.chinese: 别让乌弗瑞克和其他鼠目寸光的诺德人打扰到你。我们大多数人都是欢迎新人的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BFB6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: And you're right, at least as far as I'm concerned. | ZH: 你说得对，至少我是这么认为的。 | SID: 000B3B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Don't let Ulfric or some of these other short-sighted Nords bother you. Most of us are happy to welcome newcomers. | ZH: 别让乌弗瑞克和其他鼠目寸光的诺德人打扰到你。我们大多数人都是欢迎新人的。 | SID: 00EA32

translations.english: If that's what you really believe, then you're a fool. Never had much patience for fools, myself.
translations.chinese: 如果你真这么觉得，那你就是个傻子。我对傻子可没什么耐心。

translations.english: That's just what Ulfric wants you to think.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克就是想让你们这么觉得。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002BFB8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If that's what you really believe, then you're a fool. Never had much patience for fools, myself. | ZH: 如果你真这么觉得，那你就是个傻子。我对傻子可没什么耐心。 | SID: 005F32

translations.english: He's tough, loyal to his men and a good leader, but if you're not a Nord, Ulfric will never trust you.

translations.english: Good. Too many Nords in this town have been listening to Ulfric's narrow-minded words.
translations.chinese: 很好。城里听信乌弗瑞克狭隘理论的诺德人太多了。

translations.english: Meantime, you best steer clear of me.
translations.chinese: 另外，你最好离我远点。

translations.english: Is that so? You ought to join the Stormcloaks, if you haven't already.
translations.chinese: 这样啊？如果你还没加入风暴斗篷的话，那你真该去入伙。

translations.english: It's probably more trouble to pack up and leave than it is to stay. Besides, Ambarys can't run the cornerclub on his own.
translations.chinese: 收拾东西走人可能比留下更麻烦。再说，安巴利一个人也照看不了街角吧。

translations.english: If it looks to you like an impoverished slum, that's because it is. Ulfric prefers that we live in squalor.
translations.chinese: 如果你觉得像个贫民窟，那也是事实。乌弗瑞克更倾向让我们住在这种腌臜地方。

translations.english: He has nothing but disdain for anyone who isn't a Nord. He tolerates us, but that's the extent of his hospitality.
translations.chinese: 除了诺德人他谁也看不起。他容忍我们，但他的热情也只限于此了。

translations.english: Windhelm is divided into four quarters. The Gray Quarter is the one that's home to all the city's Dark Elves.
translations.chinese: 风舵城有四个部分，灰民区是城里所有暗精灵的家园。

translations.english: I guess they think I can open Ulfric's eyes to their plight, and get him to lift a finger on their behalf.
translations.chinese: 我猜他们是觉得我能让乌弗瑞克看清他们的困境，让他帮帮忙。

translations.english: The Dark Elves live in a run-down slum called the Gray Quarter. Ulfric's content to keep it that way.
translations.chinese: 暗精灵现在住在灰民区的贫民窟里，乌弗瑞克乐得保持这种状态。

translations.english: I'm trying, but Ulfric is set in his ways. For him, there's two kinds of people in this world -- Nords, and the folk beneath them.
translations.chinese: 我正在努力，但乌弗瑞克固执己见。对他来说，世上只有两种人，诺德人，还有诺德之下的民族。

translations.english: Help the Dark Elves? Oh, you must have heard me talking to Malthyr.
translations.chinese: 帮助暗精灵？哦，你一定是听见了我和马提尔聊天了吧。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: When you have done so, I will unbind Hevnoraak. He will awaken in a weakened state, but the lich is still to be reckoned with. Be ready. | ZH: 当你做完之后，我会解放赫诺拉克。他会从虚弱的状态中醒来，但巫妖的力量不可忽视。要做好准备。 | SID: 00FBB6

translations.english: Find the three vessels within Valthume, then return to me. With these we can defeat him.
translations.chinese: 找到瓦尔图梅里的三个容器，然后回来找我。有了这些，我们就能打败他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C187]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Find the three vessels within Valthume, then return to me. With these we can defeat him. | ZH: 找到瓦尔图梅里的三个容器，然后回来找我。有了这些，我们就能打败他。 | SID: 003E5F

translations.english: In life, Hevnoraak drained his own blood from his body. His goal was to transfer his power back into himself after death, becoming a powerful lich.
translations.chinese: 赫诺拉克在生前吸干了自己的血液。他的目标是在死后把力量转回自己身上，成为一个强大的巫妖。

translations.english: The vessels contain that very blood. Empty them and you remove any chance he has of regaining his former powers.
translations.chinese: 容器里就是这些血液，把它们倒掉他就失去了恢复往日力量的机会。

agentText:

translations.english: The cave has a bad history. Long ago, Potema the Wolf Queen used it for necromantic rituals. That's where it got the name.
translations.chinese: 那个洞穴有段糟糕的历史。很久以前，狼后波特玛在那里举行死灵仪式。这也是名字的由来。

translations.english: That was over 500 years ago. Nothing much down there now - but everyone's always convinced the cave is haunted.
translations.chinese: 那是500年前的事了。现在里面没什么东西，但人人都说洞里闹鬼。

translations.english: Why is it called Wolfskull Cave?
translations.chinese: 为什么叫做狼头骨洞穴？

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Why is it called Wolfskull Cave? | ZH: 为什么叫做狼头骨洞穴？ | SID: 002A06

translations.english: More dangerous than you know. Left alone, however, he will awaken when he has grown too powerful to be stopped. This is the only way to be sure.
translations.chinese: 比你想象的还危险。不管怎样，等他变得强大到没法阻止的时候，他就会醒来。这是唯一能够确定有效的办法。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C18A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: More dangerous than you know. Left alone, however, he will awaken when he has grown too powerful to be stopped. This is the only way to be sure. | ZH: 比你想象的还危险。不管怎样，等他变得强大到没法阻止的时候，他就会醒来。这是唯一能够确定有效的办法。 | SID: 00E101

translations.english: You've already done us a service in stopping the binding, but I need you to go talk to him, to see if Styrr can tell us what to do next.
translations.chinese: 你已经帮我们解除了束缚，但我还是需要你去找斯提尔谈谈，看他说下一步该怎么做。

translations.english: When you broke up the binding Potema escaped. We've encountered some of her minions.
translations.chinese: 当你解开束缚的时候，波特玛逃走了。我们碰到了她的手下。

translations.english: Yes, old friend, I'm afraid it's not good news.
translations.chinese: 没错，老朋友。恐怕不是什么好消息。

translations.english: Styrr says she's still in spirit form or we'd all be dead already.
translations.chinese: 斯提尔说她尚在精魂状态，否则我们早死光了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C18C]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Yes, old friend, I'm afraid it's not good news. | ZH: 没错，老朋友。恐怕不是什么好消息。 | SID: 00E4DE
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Styrr says she's still in spirit form or we'd all be dead already. | ZH: 斯提尔说她尚在精魂状态，否则我们早死光了。 | SID: 00F7DD

translations.english: This... it matches every description of the Phial that I've found in lore. But if it can't hold liquid, there's no way of knowing.
translations.chinese: 它……和传说中白瓶的样子完全吻合。但如果不能盛放药液，也就没法验证了。

translations.english: How did you manage to damage it, then? This is what I get for not retrieving it myself.
translations.chinese: 你是怎么把它弄坏的？这就是我没亲自去找的后果。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C250]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This... it matches every description of the Phial that I've found in lore. But if it can't hold liquid, there's no way of knowing. | ZH: 它……和传说中白瓶的样子完全吻合。但如果不能盛放药液，也就没法验证了。 | SID: 00962E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: How did you manage to damage it, then? This is what I get for not retrieving it myself. | ZH: 你是怎么把它弄坏的？这就是我没亲自去找的后果。 | SID: 00C24D

translations.english: Thank the gods. I'll get to work on the Phial straight away.
translations.chinese: 感谢诸神。我这就去修复白瓶。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C255]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank the gods. I'll get to work on the Phial straight away. | ZH: 感谢诸神。我这就去修复白瓶。 | SID: 00E599

translations.english: Even though the Phial was damaged, I still think your efforts deserve reward.
translations.chinese: 尽管白瓶已经坏了，但我仍然觉得你的努力应该得到奖励。

translations.english: Now, if you'll pardon me, I'm going to tend to Nurelion. I can make his final days a bit less painful.
translations.chinese: 现在恕我失陪了。我得去照顾努瑞莱昂。我得让他最后的日子不那么痛苦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Even though the Phial was damaged, I still think your efforts deserve reward. | ZH: 尽管白瓶已经坏了，但我仍然觉得你的努力应该得到奖励。 | SID: 0005E3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now, if you'll pardon me, I'm going to tend to Nurelion. I can make his final days a bit less painful. | ZH: 现在恕我失陪了。我得去照顾努瑞莱昂。我得让他最后的日子不那么痛苦。 | SID: 00D95E

translations.english: Trouble? He's one of the most stubborn lizards I've ever met! You have your work cut out for you.
translations.chinese: 麻烦？他是我见过最顽固的蜥蜴！好好对付他吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2C6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Trouble? He's one of the most stubborn lizards I've ever met! You have your work cut out for you. | ZH: 麻烦？他是我见过最顽固的蜥蜴！好好对付他吧。 | SID: 001EB6

translations.english: Oh, wait... did you say Goldenglow Estate? My apologies.
translations.chinese: 哦，等等……你说的是金色光辉庄园？抱歉。

translations.english: I'm sorry to say I know very little about that... bee farm, was it?
translations.chinese: 我确实知道的不多。那是个……养蜂场？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2C7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, wait... did you say Goldenglow Estate? My apologies. | ZH: 哦，等等……你说的是金色光辉庄园？抱歉。 | SID: 00212B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm sorry to say I know very little about that... bee farm, was it? | ZH: 我确实知道的不多。那是个……养蜂场？ | SID: 00A0D8

translations.english: So, what do we have here? Hmm. Let me guess.
translations.chinese: 什么风把你吹来了？嗯，让我猜猜。

translations.english: By your scent, I'd say you were from the Guild. But that can't be true, because I told Mercer I wouldn't deal with them anymore.
translations.chinese: 你身上带着公会的气味。但不可能，我跟墨瑟说过不会再和他们打交道了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2C8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: So, what do we have here? Hmm. Let me guess. | ZH: 什么风把你吹来了？嗯，让我猜猜。 | SID: 004B19
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: By your scent, I'd say you were from the Guild. But that can't be true, because I told Mercer I wouldn't deal with them anymore. | ZH: 你身上带着公会的气味。但不可能，我跟墨瑟说过不会再和他们打交道了。 | SID: 00C62B

translations.english: He isn't exactly in the Guild, but he pays us a cut of all the stuff he lifts from the warehouse.
translations.chinese: 他不完全算是公会的成员，但他从仓库提货时，会给我们分润一点。

translations.english: That means he has the pick of the litter from some of the finest goods to grace Skyrim's shores.
translations.chinese: 这就意味着他可以从好的商品中挑出最好的。

translations.english: Gulum-Ei works in the East Empire Company Warehouse. He helps maintain all of the shipments of goods that goes in and out of Solitude.
translations.chinese: 古鲁姆-埃在东帝国公司仓库工作。他负责帮忙维护所有进出独孤城的货物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2C9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: He isn't exactly in the Guild, but he pays us a cut of all the stuff he lifts from the warehouse. | ZH: 他不完全算是公会的成员，但他从仓库提货时，会给我们分润一点。 | SID: 0081A4
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: That means he has the pick of the litter from some of the finest goods to grace Skyrim's shores. | ZH: 这就意味着他可以从好的商品中挑出最好的。 | SID: 00D951

translations.english: Don't get me wrong, he could scam a beggar out of his last septim... but he's no mastermind.
translations.chinese: 别误会，他能骗走乞丐的最后一个塞普汀。但他不是主谋。

translations.english: I can't believe Gulum-Ei's mixed up in all this; that Argonian couldn't find his tail with both hands.
translations.chinese: 真不敢信古鲁姆-埃居然跟这事有牵连，那个阿尔贡俩手都找不到自己的尾巴。

agentText:

translations.english: Get out there, shake him down and see what you come up with. Talk to Brynjolf before you leave if you have any questions.
translations.chinese: 到那里好好审审他，看看你能想出什么办法来。如果有任何问题，都在离开前和布林乔夫谈清楚。

translations.english: Gulum-Ei is our inside man at the East Empire Company in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 古鲁姆-埃是我们在东帝国公司的内应。

translations.english: I'm betting he acted as a go-between for the sale of Goldenglow Estate and that he can finger our buyer.
translations.chinese: 我打赌他就是金色光辉庄园交易的中间人，他可以为我们指认买家。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2CC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Get out there, shake him down and see what you come up with. Talk to Brynjolf before you leave if you have any questions. | ZH: 到那里好好审审他，看看你能想出什么办法来。如果有任何问题，都在离开前和布林乔夫谈清楚。 | SID: 008AAE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Gulum-Ei is our inside man at the East Empire Company in Solitude. | ZH: 古鲁姆-埃是我们在东帝国公司的内应。 | SID: 008AB2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'm betting he acted as a go-between for the sale of Goldenglow Estate and that he can finger our buyer. | ZH: 我打赌他就是金色光辉庄园交易的中间人，他可以为我们指认买家。 | SID: 00E047

translations.english: There are thieves and then there is Gulum-Ei. No honor, no code at all. He'd shake your hand and stab you in the back at the same time.
translations.chinese: 即使在盗贼这行里，古鲁姆-埃也很特别。没有荣誉和准则可言。他会在和你握手的时候在背后给你一刀。

translations.english: Keep your eyes on him, he's quite crafty.
translations.chinese: 盯紧他，他狡猾得很。

translations.english: The cut he's supposed to provide the Guild has dwindled as of late. He says pickings in the warehouse are slim, but I'm certain he's lying.
translations.chinese: 他最近给公会的份子钱减少了。他说是因为仓库里缺货，但我肯定他是在撒谎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Just keep on his tail and he's bound to step into something he can't scrape off his boot.
translations.chinese: 只要跟紧他，早晚能抓住他的小尾巴。

translations.english: Stubborn or not, he's the only contact we've got at the East Empire Company.
translations.chinese: 不管他顽固与否。他都是我们在东帝国公司的唯一线人。

translations.english: No, no. Mercer wants him alive, for now.
translations.chinese: 不，不。墨瑟想让他活着，至少现在要活着。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: No, no. Mercer wants him alive, for now. | ZH: 不，不。墨瑟想让他活着，至少现在要活着。 | SID: 00F06A

translations.english: The Emperor himself supposedly backs them, which means they have fairly unlimited resources... so don't get their feathers in a ruffle.
translations.chinese: 据说皇帝本人在支持他们，也就是说他们拥有无限的资源……所以别惹到他们。

translations.english: A mercantile group that has established ports all over Tamriel. They pretty much dominate the whole shipping industry.
translations.chinese: 一个在泰姆瑞尔建立了诸多港口的商业集团。他们几乎控制了整个航运业。

agentText:

translations.english: I've consulted my contacts regarding the information you recovered from Goldenglow Estate, but no one can identify that symbol.
translations.chinese: 我跟线人咨询了你从金色光辉庄园找到的信息，但没人认出那个符号。

translations.english: Ah, there you are.
translations.chinese: 啊，你来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2D6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I've consulted my contacts regarding the information you recovered from Goldenglow Estate, but no one can identify that symbol. | ZH: 我跟线人咨询了你从金色光辉庄园找到的信息，但没人认出那个符号。 | SID: 005374
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah, there you are. | ZH: 啊，你来了。 | SID: 0072A7

translations.english: What did you need?
translations.chinese: 你需要什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What did you need? | ZH: 你需要什么？ | SID: 00E29F

translations.english: Aringoth was a fool to think he could get away with this.
translations.chinese: 阿林格斯真傻，居然以为能侥幸逃脱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Aringoth was a fool to think he could get away with this. | ZH: 阿林格斯真傻，居然以为能侥幸逃脱。 | SID: 00A232

translations.english: Maybe I did, maybe I didn't. I can't be expected to remember every deal I handle.
translations.chinese: 或许我做过，或许我没做过。我不可能记住处理过的每笔交易。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Maybe I did, maybe I didn't. I can't be expected to remember every deal I handle. | ZH: 或许我做过，或许我没做过。我不可能记住处理过的每笔交易。 | SID: 00F7EA

translations.english: Just head right back to the Guild and get the information to Mercer. Nothing else is more important.
translations.chinese: 直接回公会把消息告诉墨瑟。没什么比这更重要。

translations.english: If you discover Gulum-Ei's holding out on us and has more loot stashed away than he claims, we'd find that information quite valuable as well.
translations.chinese: 如果你发现古鲁姆-埃有什么瞒着我们，或是藏了比他报告过来还要多的赃物，也是很有价值的。

translations.english: Shor's bones, what happened to you, boy?
translations.chinese: 舒尔的骨头啊，小子你是怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C2F8]
Translations:

translations.english: Okay, okay. Come inside, then. Sigrid will get you something to eat and you can tell me all about it.

translations.english: She is the Goddess of Dawn and Dusk. Azura sees into the Twilight of the future, and guides her followers through it.
translations.chinese: 她是黎明与黄昏的女神。阿祖拉能看到未来的暮光，并引导追随者穿越它。

translations.chinese: 不，我找到了她的马。别担心，我已经把她马杀了。她不会骑着逃跑了。

translations.english: Let's get moving, I want to catch her inside while she's distracted. Take the lead.
translations.chinese: 我们走吧，我想趁她分心的时候把她抓住。带路吧。

translations.english: You're leading and I'm following. Does that seem clear to you?
translations.chinese: 你打头，我跟着。明白？

translations.english: I'm sorry, I was under the impression I was in charge.
translations.chinese: 啊呀不好意思，我觉得应该是我说了算吧。

translations.english: The last thing I saw was Karliah dumping his body into a opening atop the ruins; an unceremonious end for a remarkable man.
translations.chinese: 我最后看到的一幕，就是卡莱亚把他的尸体扔进遗迹顶部的一个洞里，一代英杰竟是如此下场。

translations.english: To this day I've regretted allowing her to escape, even if it meant I had died trying. I owed Gallus that much.
translations.chinese: 时至今日，我都在后悔放跑了她，哪怕我在追逐的时候死掉也在所不惜。我欠加卢斯太多了。

translations.english: But she was also the best... bringing in more coin a month than some thieves heist in a year.
translations.chinese: 但她也最出色……有时候她一个月偷的钱比别的贼一年还多。

translations.english: Gallus trusted her too much and let her get too close.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯过于信任她了，让她靠的太近了。

translations.english: She was a stubborn Dunmer... always had to do everything her way.
translations.chinese: 她是个固执的丹莫……总是按自己的方式做事。

translations.english: I staggered away from the ruins and my vision began to blur. It's then that I realized the bitch had poisoned her arrows.
translations.chinese: 我摇摇晃晃地离开遗迹，视线就开始模糊了。那时候我才意识到那婊子在箭上下毒了。

translations.english: Karliah was a master marksman and her greatest weapon was the element of surprise. I was lucky... she missed my heart by mere inches.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚是个箭术高手，最擅长出其不意。我很幸运……她的箭离我的心脏只有几寸。

translations.english: If you want to call it that, yes. Me? I think she was softening him for the kill.
translations.chinese: 如果你想这么说也没错。至于我？我觉得她是想让他放松警惕再杀了他。

translations.english: Gallus would call her his "little nightingale." He was absolutely smitten by her.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯会叫她“小夜莺”。他是完全被迷住了。

translations.english: The last thing I need is you blundering into a trap and warning her that we're here.
translations.chinese: 我可不希望你贸然踩到陷阱然后提醒她我们来了。

translations.english: Just make certain you keep your eyes open. Karliah is as sharp as a blade.
translations.chinese: 一定要睁大眼睛。卡莱亚锋利得就像一把剑。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Just make certain you keep your eyes open. Karliah is as sharp as a blade. | ZH: 一定要睁大眼睛。卡莱亚锋利得就像一把剑。 | SID: 00E763

translations.english: Good, you're finally here.
translations.chinese: 很好。你总算来了。

translations.english: I've scouted the ruins and I'm certain Karliah is still inside.
translations.chinese: 我已经搜查过遗迹了，我确定卡莱亚还在里面。

translations.english: When I arrived, Gallus stepped from the shadows. Before he uttered a sound an arrow pierced his throat.
translations.chinese: 我到达的时候，加卢斯从阴影里走出来，还没等他开口，就被一箭穿喉了。

translations.english: Before I could even draw my blade, her second arrow found its mark in my chest.
translations.chinese: 我还没来得及拔出武器，第二支箭就射中了我的胸膛。

translations.english: Twenty-five years ago I was standing outside these very same ruins. Gallus told me to meet here but he wouldn't say why.
translations.chinese: 二十五年前，我也站在这个遗迹前。加卢斯约我在此见面，但不肯说原因。

translations.chinese: 你是我……朋友……

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're my... friend.... | ZH: 你是我……朋友…… | SID: 00C291

translations.english: One thing's certain. I intend to find out before she draws her last breath.
translations.chinese: 有一件事是肯定的。我会在她死前弄清楚。

translations.english: Greed? Jealousy? Spite? Who can say what drove her to such an iniquitous act.
translations.chinese: 贪欲？嫉妒？怨恨？谁知道她为什么做出这种邪恶行径。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: That was just lying around? Good find.
translations.chinese: 就是随便放在那里的？找的漂亮。

translations.english: A dragon? That's... ridiculous. You aren't drunk, are you boy?
translations.chinese: 龙？太……荒唐了。小子你没喝多吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C449]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A dragon? That's... ridiculous. You aren't drunk, are you boy? | ZH: 龙？太……荒唐了。小子你没喝多吧？ | SID: 00AF80

translations.english: Hadvar, did you really see a dragon? What did it look like? Did it have big teeth?
translations.chinese: 哈达瓦，你真的看见龙了吗？它长什么样？牙很大嘛？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C44A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hadvar, did you really see a dragon? What did it look like? Did it have big teeth? | ZH: 哈达瓦，你真的看见龙了吗？它长什么样？牙很大嘛？ | SID: 0085C2

translations.english: Sigrid! We have company!
translations.chinese: 西格利！家里来客人了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002C44C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sigrid! We have company! | ZH: 西格利！家里来客人了！ | SID: 00D0F7

translations.english: I need to get back to Solitude and let them know what's happened.
translations.chinese: 我得回独孤城向他们报告情况。

translations.english: Not much more to tell. This dragon flew over and just wrecked the whole place. Mass confusion.
translations.chinese: 没什么好说的了。这头龙飞过来大闹一番，把整个海尔根都毁了。

translations.english: I don't know if anyone else got out alive. I doubt I'd have made it out myself if not for my friend here.
translations.chinese: 我不知道还有没有人活下来。要不是因为我朋友，我也可能丧命了。

translations.english: I thought you could help us out. Food, supplies, a place to stay.
translations.chinese: 我想你能帮我们。准备些吃的、补给还有住的地方。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Not much more to tell. This dragon flew over and just wrecked the whole place. Mass confusion. | ZH: 没什么好说的了。这头龙飞过来大闹一番，把整个海尔根都毁了。 | SID: 004C4A

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I thought you could help us out. Food, supplies, a place to stay. | ZH: 我想你能帮我们。准备些吃的、补给还有住的地方。 | SID: 009898

translations.english: I don't know where to start. You know I was assigned to General Tullius's guard.
translations.chinese: 我不知道从何说起。你知道，我被派去充当图留斯将军的护卫。

translations.english: We were stopped in Helgen when we were attacked... by a dragon.
translations.chinese: 我们停留在海尔根时被袭击了……被一头龙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Here, take the Goldenglow Estate Deed as proof. And when you speak to Mercer, tell him I'm worth more to him alive. | ZH: 来，拿上金色光辉庄园的地契做证据吧。回去找墨瑟的时候，告诉他，我活着对他更有价值。 | SID: 0066EC

translations.english: Consider it a gift to ensure your silence. That thing seems to be bringing me nothing but trouble anyway.
translations.chinese: 就把它当做你保密的礼物吧。那东西似乎只会给我带来麻烦。

translations.english: Karliah didn't even want it, she wanted to keep the sale a secret. I can see how well that went.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚根本不想要，她想将这份买卖保密起来。我了解这样的好处。

translations.english: Now, there's no need to do anything rash...
translations.chinese: 没必要冲动……

translations.english: This isn't as bad as it seems. I was going to tell Mercer about everything, honestly! Please... he'll have me killed!
translations.chinese: 没有看上去那么糟糕。我本打算把一切都告诉墨瑟的，真的！拜托……他会杀了我的。

translations.english: Did Gulum-Ei give up any information on our buyer?
translations.chinese: 古鲁姆-埃有没有透露买家的信息？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002CC41]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Did Gulum-Ei give up any information on our buyer? | ZH: 古鲁姆-埃有没有透露买家的信息？ | SID: 00F86B

translations.english: This is grave news indeed, she's someone I hoped to never cross paths with again.
translations.chinese: 这确实是个沉重的消息，我真不希望和她再有任何交集。

translations.english: No, it.. it can't be. I haven't heard that name in decades.
translations.chinese: 不，这……这不可能。我已经几十年没听过这个名字了。

translations.english: If only we knew where she was...
translations.chinese: 如果我们知道她在哪儿就好了……

translations.english: Karliah and I were like partners. I went with her on every heist. We watched each other's backs.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚和我曾经是搭档。每次盗窃行动我们都在一起，互相照应。

translations.english: I know her techniques, her skills. If she kills me, there'll be no one left that could possibly catch her.
translations.chinese: 我熟悉她的做法、技巧。如果她杀了我，就没人能抓住她了。

translations.english: Yes, I'm going with you and together we're going to kill her.
translations.chinese: 对，我要和你一起去杀她。

translations.english: Prepare yourself and meet me at the ruins as soon as you can. We can't let her slip through our fingers.
translations.chinese: 做好准备，尽快到遗迹去找我会合。我们不能让她从手里溜了。

translations.chinese: 帮……？不，不！她联系我之前我都不知道是她。

translations.english: Please, you have to believe me!
translations.chinese: 拜托，一定要相信我！

translations.english: I see you wish to be reasonable, perhaps I misjudged you.
translations.chinese: 看来你是讲道理的，也许我看走眼了。

translations.english: The name of the person you want is Karliah.
translations.chinese: 你要找的人是卡莱亚。

translations.english: Karliah is the thief responsible for murdering the previous Guild Master, Gallus. Now she's after Mercer.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚是杀害前任公会大师加卢斯的盗贼。现在她盯上了墨瑟。

translations.english: Mercer never told you about her?
translations.chinese: 墨瑟没和你提过她？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002CC49]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Mercer never told you about her? | ZH: 墨瑟没和你提过她？ | SID: 008995

translations.english: I have a long-standing arrangement with the Dark Brotherhood. If I need someone in the Guild taken care of, we do it ourselves.
translations.chinese: 我和黑暗兄弟会有长期协议。如果我要处置公会里的人，那就我们自己来。

translations.english: We both agree it's best to keep these matters in house.
translations.chinese: 我们都同意不要把这事公之于众。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002CC4A]

translations.english: Karliah destroyed everything this Guild stood for. She murdered my predecessor in cold blood and betrayed the Guild.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚摧毁了这个公会所代表的一切。无情地杀害了前任首领，背叛了公会。

translations.english: After we discovered what she'd done, we spent months trying to track her down, but she just vanished.
translations.chinese: 当我们发现了她的所作所为，花了几个月追踪她时，她就消失了。

translations.english: You needed to know more?
translations.chinese: 你想知道更多吗？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: There's only one place that could be. The place where she murdered Gallus... a ruin called Snow Veil Sanctum.
translations.chinese: 那只有一个地方有可能了。她杀害加卢斯的地方……一个叫雪幔圣所的废墟。

translations.english: We have to go out there before she disappears again.
translations.chinese: 我们得赶在她再次失踪前过去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: They were a secret cabal of the three top rogues in the Thieves Guild. No one knew their identities.
translations.chinese: 他们是由盗贼公会三个顶尖盗贼组成的秘密集团。他们的身份十分隐秘。

translations.english: Some people say they watched over the group, others say they were reserved for the most elite jobs. I don't really know.
translations.chinese: 有些人说他们是组织的监视者，也有人认为他们是作为最精英的工作执行者。我确实不知道。

translations.english: It wasn't until recently that I heard Mercer Frey and this Dark Elf named Karliah were a part of that group.
translations.chinese: 直到最近我才听说墨瑟·弗雷还有一个叫卡莱亚的暗精灵是那个组织的成员。

translations.english: But I never dreamed that I would even get to see it.
translations.chinese: 但我从没想到能亲眼去看看。

translations.english: I've heard stories about the wonders of the great Temple in Markarth.
translations.chinese: 我听说过马卡斯神殿的奇景。

translations.english: I am honored to be called for this duty. Please, lead on.
translations.chinese: 能被选召担任这个职责我很荣幸。请带路吧。

translations.chinese: 您看看，您身体还不行！请坐下，我给您拿点药。

translations.english: Master, you're far too old for this sort of journey. We don't know what's inside...
translations.chinese: 师父，您年纪太大了，不适合这种旅行。我们都不知道里面有什么……

translations.english: I'm so close to the answer...
translations.chinese: 我离答案已经很近了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D4EC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm so close to the answer... | ZH: 我离答案已经很近了…… | SID: 002B42

translations.english: You really think I can be a blacksmith someday, papa? As good as Eorlund Gray-Mane? Or maybe... even as good as you?
translations.chinese: 你真的觉得我有一天能成为铁匠吗，爸爸？就像厄伦德·灰鬃那样优秀的？甚至是……和你一样好的？

translations.english: Oh, I know it! You keep working hard, like you been doing, and you could be the greatest blacksmith Skyrim has ever seen.
translations.chinese: 哦，我当然知道！你只要继续努力，像你一直在做的那样，你会成为天际有史以来最伟大的铁匠。

translations.english: Like I said, I'm glad to help in any way I can. Help yourself to whatever you need, within reason.
translations.chinese: 我说了，我很乐意帮忙。在合理范围内你随意取用就是。

translations.english: Are you prepared to make that commitment?
translations.chinese: 准备好发誓了吗？

translations.english: In joining the Legion, you'll be taking an oath binding you to the service of the Emperor and thus to every citizen of the Empire.
translations.chinese: 想加入军团就要宣誓效忠于皇帝，并为帝国的每一个公民服务。

agentText:

translations.english: Just head north - you can't miss it.
translations.chinese: 一直往北走，很好找的。

translations.english: It's the capital of Whiterun Hold, the biggest and the best of the nine holds of Skyrim. But don't take my word for it.
translations.chinese: 那是白漫领的首府。在我看来，白漫领是天际九大领里最大最好的一个。

translations.english: When you get to Whiterun just keep going up. When you get to the top of the hill, you're at Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace.
translations.chinese: 你到达白漫城后向上走。山顶上是领主的宫殿，龙临宫。

translations.english: Cross the river and then head north. You'll see it, just past the falls.
translations.chinese: 过河之后向北走。你就能看到，就在那道瀑布旁边。

translations.english: An excellent question. Vittoria Vici is the first cousin to our dear Emperor, Titus Mede II.
translations.chinese: 好问题。维托利亚·维齐是我们敬爱的提图斯·迈德二世陛下最重要的表妹。

translations.english: The Emperor's hand will be forced. He'll have to travel to Skyrim to deal with the aftermath... and he'll find the Dark Brotherhood waiting.
translations.chinese: 皇帝会陷入被动。不得不来天际处理善后。然后就会发现，黑暗兄弟会正恭候他的大驾光临。

translations.english: So if there's a murder at the wedding... Not only will it stall the peace process - it will send shockwaves throughout the entire Empire.
translations.chinese: 一旦婚礼上爆发谋杀案……不仅会阻碍和平进程，还会冲击整个帝国。

translations.english: Vici has obvious Imperial connections. Her husband has ties to the Stormcloaks. Their union is a step toward reconciliation.
translations.chinese: 维齐与帝国联系密切。她丈夫则和风暴斗篷有关。他们的结合是迈向和解的第一步。

translations.english: What's Vici's connection to the Emperor?
translations.chinese: 维齐和皇帝什么关系？

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: An excellent question. Vittoria Vici is the first cousin to our dear Emperor, Titus Mede II. | ZH: 好问题。维托利亚·维齐是我们敬爱的提图斯·迈德二世陛下最重要的表妹。 | SID: 00B532
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The Emperor's hand will be forced. He'll have to travel to Skyrim to deal with the aftermath... and he'll find the Dark Brotherhood waiting. | ZH: 皇帝会陷入被动。不得不来天际处理善后。然后就会发现，黑暗兄弟会正恭候他的大驾光临。 | SID: 00C893
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: So if there's a murder at the wedding... Not only will it stall the peace process - it will send shockwaves throughout the entire Empire. | ZH: 一旦婚礼上爆发谋杀案……不仅会阻碍和平进程，还会冲击整个帝国。 | SID: 00E137
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Vici has obvious Imperial connections. Her husband has ties to the Stormcloaks. Their union is a step toward reconciliation. | ZH: 维齐与帝国联系密切。她丈夫则和风暴斗篷有关。他们的结合是迈向和解的第一步。 | SID: 00F04F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's Vici's connection to the Emperor? | ZH: 维齐和皇帝什么关系？ | SID: 00DDE8

translations.english: Both Vittoria and her husband will be there for the duration, and everyone in Solitude is invited to attend. You'll have plenty of opportunity.
translations.chinese: 维托利亚和她丈夫会在此期间出席，全独孤城的人都收到邀请了。你会找到很多机会下手的。

translations.english: Soon. I'm not exactly sure when. But not to worry - the ceremony itself is being followed up by a public banquet that will last for several days.
translations.chinese: 很快。但不确定具体时间。不过别担心，婚礼之后会有一场持续几天的公开宴会。

translations.english: When does the wedding start?
translations.chinese: 婚礼什么时候开始？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D89C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Both Vittoria and her husband will be there for the duration, and everyone in Solitude is invited to attend. You'll have plenty of opportunity. | ZH: 维托利亚和她丈夫会在此期间出席，全独孤城的人都收到邀请了。你会找到很多机会下手的。 | SID: 002A6E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Soon. I'm not exactly sure when. But not to worry - the ceremony itself is being followed up by a public banquet that will last for several days. | ZH: 很快。但不确定具体时间。不过别担心，婚礼之后会有一场持续几天的公开宴会。 | SID: 00B96B
- INFO:RNAM | EN: When does the wedding start? | ZH: 婚礼什么时候开始？ | SID: 00BCD1

translations.english: But moving on to business. As you probably already know from reading the letter... you're going to a wedding.
translations.chinese: 但说回正题吧。看过信你应该知道了……你要去参加一个婚礼。

translations.english: But by Sithis, I hope I'm making the right choice here. You may be an effective killer, but your command of guile leaves much to be desired.
translations.chinese: 但西帝斯在上，但愿我的选择是对的。你虽然是个效率不错的杀手，但技巧尚有许多不足。

translations.english: Splendid. Then we're ready to begin. Or, more specifically, you're ready to begin. After all, you're the one the Night Mother spoke to.
translations.chinese: 很好。现在我们可以开始了。更准确来说，是你准备好开始了。毕竟，你才是聆听夜母之人。

translations.english: The sealed letter you delivered to me was mysteriously unsealed upon its arrival. I can only assume you've read its contents. Sloppy...
translations.chinese: 你交给我的那封密信很明显被拆看过。我猜你一定是看过里面的内容了。草率了……

translations.english: He was. Here's a letter of credit.
translations.chinese: 他确实愿意。这是信用凭证。

translations.chinese: 很好。现在我们可以开始了。更准确来说，是你准备好开始了。毕竟，你才是聆听夜母之人。

translations.english: Now then. I hope you have something nice to wear. Because you're going to a wedding.
translations.chinese: 现在。去找几件漂亮衣服。因为你得去参加一场婚礼。

translations.english: He was. Here's a letter of credit.
translations.chinese: 他确实愿意。这是信用凭证。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: He was. Here's a letter of credit. | ZH: 他确实愿意。这是信用凭证。 | SID: 007381

translations.english: This is a public kill. How you do it is entirely up to you. Arrow to the throat? Knife in the belly? Your choice, so long as it's loud and messy.
translations.chinese: 这是一场公开的杀戮。你怎么做都随意。一箭封喉？一刀破膛？只要能造成吵闹和骚乱就行。

translations.english: In any event, when Vici dies, it's going to be complete pandemonium. Best have your escape route planned out in advance.
translations.chinese: 无论怎样，维齐一死，就是一场彻底的混乱。最好提前计划好逃跑路线。

translations.english: Because of the current political climate, people are going to assume the murder is related to the bad blood between the Legion and Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 鉴于目前的政治气候，人们一定会认为这次谋杀与军团、风暴斗篷之争有关。

translations.english: Can you provide any more details on the contract?
translations.chinese: 能再说说契约的细节吗？

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Can you provide any more details on the contract? | ZH: 能再说说契约的细节吗？ | SID: 00354D

translations.english: Oh yes. You've got to kill the bride. At her wedding.
translations.chinese: 哦，没错。你得在婚礼上杀了新娘。

translations.english: Well, more like the public reception. It should be a lovely affair. You'll mingle with the guests, eat some cake... stab the bride.
translations.chinese: 嗯，更像是公开宴会。想想就很美。和宾客说说笑笑，吃点蛋糕……给新娘一刀。

translations.english: And they say romance is dead.
translations.chinese: 这就是人家说的“浪漫死了”。

translations.english: A wedding?
translations.chinese: 婚礼？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8A5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Oh yes. You've got to kill the bride. At her wedding. | ZH: 哦，没错。你得在婚礼上杀了新娘。 | SID: 0055D6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, more like the public reception. It should be a lovely affair. You'll mingle with the guests, eat some cake... stab the bride. | ZH: 嗯，更像是公开宴会。想想就很美。和宾客说说笑笑，吃点蛋糕……给新娘一刀。 | SID: 005A11

- INFO:RNAM | EN: A wedding? | ZH: 婚礼？ | SID: 005E77

translations.english: All that will change with his cousin's murder. Everyone will think it was motivated by the conflict between the Imperial Legion and Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 但一切都会随着他表妹的死而改变。所有人都会认为这是由帝国军团和风暴斗篷间的冲突所引起的。

translations.english: Seems the Emperor realized his presence would necessitate a more direct role in the ongoing hostilities. A role he was, obviously, unwilling to take.
translations.chinese: 看起来皇帝意识到了他的出席必然会直接影响到还在持续的战争。显然他不愿这样。

translations.english: And the Emperor will be forced to come clean up the mess.
translations.chinese: 而皇帝必然被迫出面收拾乱局。

translations.english: Hmph. He had a trip to Skyrim planned for months, and canceled at the last minute. Much to his cousin's dismay.
translations.chinese: 嗯。他是为了天际之旅筹划了好几个月，结果却在临行前取消了。他表妹可是沮丧得很啊。

translations.english: If you need any help with Destruction spells, please let me know.
translations.chinese: 如果你需要任何关于毁灭法术的帮助，请告诉我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8CA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you need any help with Destruction spells, please let me know. | ZH: 如果你需要任何关于毁灭法术的帮助，请告诉我。 | SID: 0042E6

translations.english: I'm sure when the time for promotions comes, they'll go to the most deserving mage.
translations.chinese: 相信晋升职位的时候，他们会找到最适合的法师。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8CB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sure when the time for promotions comes, they'll go to the most deserving mage. | ZH: 相信晋升职位的时候，他们会找到最适合的法师。 | SID: 00C273

translations.english: Don't you think I'd make a wonderful Master Wizard? Maybe even Arch-Mage someday?
translations.chinese: 你不觉得我会成为出色的高等巫师吗？也许能成为大法师也说不定？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8CC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't you think I'd make a wonderful Master Wizard? Maybe even Arch-Mage someday? | ZH: 你不觉得我会成为出色的高等巫师吗？也许能成为大法师也说不定？ | SID: 00B34A

translations.english: It's a small group of us here at the College. Favors don't go unremembered. Neither do affronts.
translations.chinese: 我们在学院就是个小组。不能忘记别人的帮助，也不能忘记别人的冒犯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's a small group of us here at the College. Favors don't go unremembered. Neither do affronts. | ZH: 我们在学院就是个小组。不能忘记别人的帮助，也不能忘记别人的冒犯。 | SID: 00C472

translations.english: Another day, another opportunity to learn!
translations.chinese: 新的一天，新的学习！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8CE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Another day, another opportunity to learn! | ZH: 新的一天，新的学习！ | SID: 001CED

translations.english: Someday the College may be fully accepted by the Nords. I hope that my work as Arch-Mage may help.
translations.chinese: 总有一天，学院可能会被诺德人完全接受。希望我身为大法师的工作能对此有所帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8CF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Someday the College may be fully accepted by the Nords. I hope that my work as Arch-Mage may help. | ZH: 总有一天，学院可能会被诺德人完全接受。希望我身为大法师的工作能对此有所帮助。 | SID: 00A245

translations.english: Like it or not, this College is a direct influence on the public's impressions of magic and those that use it.
translations.chinese: 不管你喜欢与否，学院都直接影响着公众对魔法和使用魔法者的印象。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8D0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Like it or not, this College is a direct influence on the public's impressions of magic and those that use it. | ZH: 不管你喜欢与否，学院都直接影响着公众对魔法和使用魔法者的印象。 | SID: 00D52B

translations.english: It is up to each of us to present ourselves publicly as maturely as possible, and to remain above petty local squabbles.
translations.chinese: 我们每个人都应该尽可能在公众面前表现得成熟，并远离那些微不足道的地方纠纷。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002D8D1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It is up to each of us to present ourselves publicly as maturely as possible, and to remain above petty local squabbles. | ZH: 我们每个人都应该尽可能在公众面前表现得成熟，并远离那些微不足道的地方纠纷。 | SID: 006EC8

translations.english: For an alchemist like myself, it is the most pure expression of my art. To create from nothingness is... poetry.
translations.chinese: 对于像我这样的炼金术士来说，就是对我技艺最纯粹的表达。虚空造物……多么诗意。

translations.english: A small container, made of the magically infused snow that first fell on the Throat of the World.
translations.chinese: 这个小容器是用第一抹落在世界之喉上的有魔力的雪做成的。

translations.english: It is said that the Phial will replenish whatever fluid is placed inside of it.
translations.chinese: 据说这个白瓶可以补充任何放到里面的液体。

translations.english: A legendary bottle, forged in the days when Skyrim was just starting its turn to ice.
translations.chinese: 传说中的一个瓶子，在天际初次结冰的时候被锻造出来。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: A small container, made of the magically infused snow that first fell on the Throat of the World. | ZH: 这个小容器是用第一抹落在世界之喉上的有魔力的雪做成的。 | SID: 00B9A4

translations.english: Bah. If there was a tonic that could help me, I would have found it by now...
translations.chinese: 呸。如果有一种药能帮助我，那我早就找到了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002DCA0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Bah. If there was a tonic that could help me, I would have found it by now... | ZH: 呸。如果有一种药能帮助我，那我早就找到了。 | SID: 00D89D

translations.english: Entire years spent in libraries. Seeking out tiny villages with local legends that contain but a whisper of a hint of the Phial.
translations.chinese: 在图书馆里泡了几年，又寻找有关传说的村庄，也只有白瓶的一点蛛丝马迹而已。

translations.english: I even named my shop after it, hoping that it might attract anyone who had heard of it.
translations.chinese: 我甚至用它来命名自己的店，希望能吸引到任何听说过它的人。

translations.english: And now it's within my grasp... but the Eight, it seems, have chosen me for their amusement.
translations.chinese: 现在它就在我掌握之中……但八圣灵啊，似乎是要消遣我呀。

translations.english: It brought me all the way to these frozen reaches from the warm embrace of Summerset Isle.
translations.chinese: 它吸引着我从夏暮岛的温暖怀抱一路跑到这冰封的地带。

translations.english: I have spent my entire life searching for it.
translations.chinese: 我花了一辈子去寻找它。

translations.english: ... for in my current condition, I'll never be able to lay my hands on it.
translations.chinese: ……看我目前的状况，我是永远得不到它咯。

translations.english: Curalmil was a crafty one, even in death. You would need the skills of a master alchemist to reach his resting place.
translations.chinese: 库拉米尔十分狡猾，即使死了也不能轻视。你需要有炼金师的技术才能抵达他的安息之地。

translations.english: It's buried with its maker, Curalmil, in a long forsaken cave to the west of here.
translations.chinese: 它和它的制造者库拉米尔一起被埋葬在西边的一个古老的废弃洞穴里。

translations.english: Please... don't dally. I've wasted enough time arguing with my useless assistant here.
translations.chinese: 拜托……不要磨磨蹭蹭了。我已经浪费了太多时间和这个没用的助手争论了。

translations.english: You would do that? It's good to know there are some people out there who are willing to help an old man.
translations.chinese: 你会这么做？很高兴有人愿意帮助老人家。

translations.english: Luckily for you, I've already made the mixture. Here, take it.
translations.chinese: 你走运了，我已经把混合剂做好了。给，拿着吧。

translations.english: I'll gather together some able-bodied warriors to clean out Movarth's lair. They'll be waiting outside for you to lead them.
translations.chinese: 我会去召集一些精壮的战士去清理莫瓦斯的巢穴。他们会在外面等你，就由你来带领他们。

translations.english: Morthal is still in danger. The journal mentions Movarth, a master vampire I thought was destroyed a century ago.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔还很危险。日记里提到了吸血鬼之主莫瓦斯，我以为他一个世纪以前就被消灭了呢。

translations.english: So it's true. That traitorous bitch! Morthal owes you a debt.
translations.chinese: 所以这是真的。那个叛徒婊子！莫萨尔欠你个人情。

translations.english: There's a pack of werewolf hunters camped nearby, at Gallows Rock.
translations.chinese: 附近有一伙狼人猎手在绞架岩扎营。

translations.english: We're going to slaughter them. All of them.
translations.chinese: 我们要杀光他们。

translations.english: The Silver Hand. I think you've met them before.
translations.chinese: 是银手。你以前应该见过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032883]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Lead on. Skjor's already scouting ahead. | ZH: 来吧。斯科约尔在前面探路了。 | SID: 001DD9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: There's a pack of werewolf hunters camped nearby, at Gallows Rock. | ZH: 附近有一伙狼人猎手在绞架岩扎营。 | SID: 00566E
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: We're going to slaughter them. All of them. | ZH: 我们要杀光他们。 | SID: 006CEF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Silver Hand. I think you've met them before. | ZH: 是银手。你以前应该见过。 | SID: 00AE90

translations.english: To reach the heights of the Companions, you must join with us in the shared blood of the wolf.
translations.chinese: 为了达到战友团的顶点，你必须分享我们的狼之血脉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032885]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: To reach the heights of the Companions, you must join with us in the shared blood of the wolf. | ZH: 为了达到战友团的顶点，你必须分享我们的狼之血脉。 | SID: 008FF5

translations.english: Get out of here. I'm going to make sure we got the last of them, and see if there's any information to be gotten from the bodies.
translations.chinese: 你先走吧。我留下来把他们赶尽杀绝，看看能不能从尸体上得到什么信息。

translations.english: He was one of the strongest we had, but numbers can overwhelm. He should not have come without a Shield-Brother.
translations.chinese: 他是我们中最强的一个，但两拳难敌四手。他不该不带盾牌兄弟就来的。

translations.english: You and I have work to do. The Silver Hand will tremble at our sight.
translations.chinese: 你我还有事要做。让银手在我们面前发抖吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032886]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Get out of here. I'm going to make sure we got the last of them, and see if there's any information to be gotten from the bodies. | ZH: 你先走吧。我留下来把他们赶尽杀绝，看看能不能从尸体上得到什么信息。 | SID: 003916
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: He was one of the strongest we had, but numbers can overwhelm. He should not have come without a Shield-Brother. | ZH: 他是我们中最强的一个，但两拳难敌四手。他不该不带盾牌兄弟就来的。 | SID: 004957
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You and I have work to do. The Silver Hand will tremble at our sight. | ZH: 你我还有事要做。让银手在我们面前发抖吧。 | SID: 00A9B8

translations.english: I'm glad you came. It's been a long time since we had a heart like yours among our numbers.
translations.chinese: 很高兴你来了。我们已经很久没有接纳像你这样的人了。

translations.english: You are due more honor than some calls and feasting.
translations.chinese: 比起喊口号，办宴会，你值得获得更多荣耀。

translations.english: That pitiful ceremony behind the hall does not befit warriors like us.
translations.chinese: 大厅后院那个可悲的仪式不适合咱们这样的勇士。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032887]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'm glad you came. It's been a long time since we had a heart like yours among our numbers. | ZH: 很高兴你来了。我们已经很久没有接纳像你这样的人了。 | SID: 004978
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You are due more honor than some calls and feasting. | ZH: 比起喊口号，办宴会，你值得获得更多荣耀。 | SID: 006CD1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: That pitiful ceremony behind the hall does not befit warriors like us. | ZH: 大厅后院那个可悲的仪式不适合咱们这样的勇士。 | SID: 00E4BE

translations.english: So we take matters into our own hands.
translations.chinese: 所以我们得自己来了。

translations.english: He thinks we've been cursed. But we've been blessed. How can something that gives this kind of prowess be a curse?
translations.chinese: 他觉得我们被诅咒了。但我们是被祝福了。能被赋予这等威力之物，怎么可能是诅咒？

translations.english: We do this in secret because Kodlak is too busy trying to throw away this great gift we've been granted.
translations.chinese: 我们之所以秘密行事，是因为克拉科正忙着要放弃我们得到的这份伟大礼物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032888]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So we take matters into our own hands. | ZH: 所以我们得自己来了。 | SID: 006CB1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He thinks we've been cursed. But we've been blessed. How can something that gives this kind of prowess be a curse? | ZH: 他觉得我们被诅咒了。但我们是被祝福了。能被赋予这等威力之物，怎么可能是诅咒？ | SID: 00A99A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We do this in secret because Kodlak is too busy trying to throw away this great gift we've been granted. | ZH: 我们之所以秘密行事，是因为克拉科正忙着要放弃我们得到的这份伟大礼物。 | SID: 00DA3D

translations.english: A sad time.
translations.chinese: 悲伤的时刻。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003288B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A sad time. | ZH: 悲伤的时刻。 | SID: 000D9A

translations.english: Like I said in my note, I've heard that you might be Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 如我留言所说，我已经知道你可能是龙裔了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000328F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Like I said in my note, I've heard that you might be Dragonborn. | ZH: 如我留言所说，我已经知道你可能是龙裔了。 | SID: 000939

translations.english: But I had to know if the rumors about you were true...
translations.chinese: 而我必须知道那些关于你的传言是真是假……

translations.english: I'll explain what I want when I want, got it? You'd already be dead if I didn't like the look of you when you walked in here.
translations.chinese: 我想解释的时候才会解释，懂吗？要不是看你进来时还算顺眼，你早就死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000328FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But I had to know if the rumors about you were true... | ZH: 而我必须知道那些关于你的传言是真是假…… | SID: 00CB0E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'll explain what I want when I want, got it? You'd already be dead if I didn't like the look of you when you walked in here. | ZH: 我想解释的时候才会解释，懂吗？要不是看你进来时还算顺眼，你早就死了。 | SID: 00EA30

translations.english: Dragons aren't just coming back, they're coming back to life.
translations.chinese: 龙族不是什么回归，它们是正在复活。

translations.english: They weren't gone somewhere for all these years. They were dead, killed off centuries ago by my predecessors.
translations.chinese: 这么多年它们哪也没去，早在很久之前就被我的前辈们杀了。

translations.english: Now something's happening to bring them back to life. And I need you to help me stop it.
translations.chinese: 现在有东西正在让它们起死回生。我需要你帮我一起阻止它。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000328FE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Dragons aren't just coming back, they're coming back to life. | ZH: 龙族不是什么回归，它们是正在复活。 | SID: 00238E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They weren't gone somewhere for all these years. They were dead, killed off centuries ago by my predecessors. | ZH: 这么多年它们哪也没去，早在很久之前就被我的前辈们杀了。 | SID: 00505C
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Now something's happening to bring them back to life. And I need you to help me stop it. | ZH: 现在有东西正在让它们起死回生。我需要你帮我一起阻止它。 | SID: 00FA1A

translations.english: If you don't trust me, you were a fool to walk in here in the first place.
translations.chinese: 你要是不相信我，那你刚才走进来就是犯傻。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032901]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you don't trust me, you were a fool to walk in here in the first place. | ZH: 你要是不相信我，那你刚才走进来就是犯傻。 | SID: 004600

translations.english: So you're the Dragonborn I've been hearing so much about.
translations.chinese: 所以你就是我听了很多回的那个龙裔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032902]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So you're the Dragonborn I've been hearing so much about. | ZH: 所以你就是我听了很多回的那个龙裔。 | SID: 00DFD7

translations.english: You'll be back. If you're really Dragonborn, this is your destiny.
translations.chinese: 你会回来的。你如果真是龙裔，那这就是你的命运。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032905]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'll be back. If you're really Dragonborn, this is your destiny. | ZH: 你会回来的。你如果真是龙裔，那这就是你的命运。 | SID: 00E001

translations.english: Surprised? I guess I'm getting pretty good at my harmless innkeeper act.
translations.chinese: 很惊奇？看来我很擅长伪装成无害的旅馆老板了呀。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032907]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Surprised? I guess I'm getting pretty good at my harmless innkeeper act. | ZH: 很惊奇？看来我很擅长伪装成无害的旅馆老板了呀。 | SID: 00DE20

translations.english: You can't be too careful. Thalmor spies are everywhere.
translations.chinese: 你要格外小心。梭默间谍无处不在。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032909]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You can't be too careful. Thalmor spies are everywhere. | ZH: 你要格外小心。梭默间谍无处不在。 | SID: 00D714

translations.english: You ready to hear me out?
translations.chinese: 你准备好听我说完了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003290C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You ready to hear me out? | ZH: 你准备好听我说完了吗？ | SID: 00FA21

translations.english: Ha. A few years ago, I said almost the same thing to a colleague of mine. Well, it turned out he was right and I was wrong.
translations.chinese: 哈。几年前，我也是跟我一个同事这么说。结果证明他是对的，我是错的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003290D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha. A few years ago, I said almost the same thing to a colleague of mine. Well, it turned out he was right and I was wrong. | ZH: 哈。几年前，我也是跟我一个同事这么说。结果证明他是对的，我是错的。 | SID: 009017

translations.english: That mound you remembered sounds like what we're looking for. East of Kynesgrove, right?
translations.chinese: 你印象里那个土堆听上去像是我们要找的。好像在凯娜之林东面？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032911]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That mound you remembered sounds like what we're looking for. East of Kynesgrove, right? | ZH: 你印象里那个土堆听上去像是我们要找的。好像在凯娜之林东面？ | SID: 008E53

translations.english: It was the only way I could make sure it wasn't a Thalmor trap.
translations.chinese: 这是我验证梭默陷阱的唯一办法。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032913]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It was the only way I could make sure it wasn't a Thalmor trap. | ZH: 这是我验证梭默陷阱的唯一办法。 | SID: 007802

translations.english: I think it would be better if you waited here.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你还是在这里等比较好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032933]
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: I think it would be better if you waited here. | ZH: 我觉得你还是在这里等比较好。 | SID: 00C8E5

translations.english: You're a brave man. Let's go.
translations.chinese: 你够勇。我们走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032934]
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: You're a brave man. Let's go. | ZH: 你够勇。我们走。 | SID: 0041BF

translations.english: Lead on.
translations.chinese: 带路吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032937]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Lead on. | ZH: 带路吧。 | SID: 006C83

translations.english: Of course. But why not let him go in first?
translations.chinese: 当然可以。但为什么不让他先呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032938]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. But why not let him go in first? | ZH: 当然可以。但为什么不让他先呢？ | SID: 001F95

translations.english: Of course. But why not let her go in first?
translations.chinese: 当然可以。但为什么不让她先呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032939]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. But why not let her go in first? | ZH: 当然可以。但为什么不让她先呢？ | SID: 004F18

translations.english: They may be cowards, but I'm not. I'll go with you.
translations.chinese: 他们都是胆小鬼。我和你去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003293A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: They may be cowards, but I'm not. I'll go with you. | ZH: 他们都是胆小鬼。我和你去。 | SID: 00BF7B

translations.english: I suppose you're right. I'm not a fighting man.
translations.chinese: 你说得对。我并不擅长战斗。

translations.english: Go, and avenge my Laelette for me.
translations.chinese: 去吧，为我的拉莱特报仇。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003293B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I suppose you're right. I'm not a fighting man. | ZH: 你说得对。我并不擅长战斗。 | SID: 000301
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Go, and avenge my Laelette for me. | ZH: 去吧，为我的拉莱特报仇。 | SID: 00E3F5

translations.english: Skyrim needs people like you, if we ever hope to regain our freedom from the damned Empire. Good luck.
translations.chinese: 天际需要你这样的人。我们得摆脱这该死的帝国。

translations.english: All right. If I make it back to Windhelm, I'll make sure Ulfric knows how you helped me.
translations.chinese: 好吧。如果我回了风舵城。我会告诉乌弗瑞克你帮了我的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032A47]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Skyrim needs people like you, if we ever hope to regain our freedom from the damned Empire. Good luck. | ZH: 天际需要你这样的人。我们得摆脱这该死的帝国。 | SID: 0019BB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: All right. If I make it back to Windhelm, I'll make sure Ulfric knows how you helped me. | ZH: 好吧。如果我回了风舵城。我会告诉乌弗瑞克你帮了我的。 | SID: 009155

translations.english: I was hoping you'd change your mind. Come on. I'm heading to Riverwood, just up the road. My sister Gerdur will help us out.
translations.chinese: 希望你会改主意。来吧。我要沿着这条路去河木镇，我姐姐歌尔朵会帮咱们的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032B91]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I was hoping you'd change your mind. Come on. I'm heading to Riverwood, just up the road. My sister Gerdur will help us out. | ZH: 希望你会改主意。来吧。我要沿着这条路去河木镇，我姐姐歌尔朵会帮咱们的。 | SID: 00B481

translations.english: Do you have Gallus's Journal?
translations.chinese: 你有加卢斯的日记？

translations.english: Karliah? Then she's finally found it.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚？这么说她终于找到了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032D55]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Do you have Gallus's Journal? | ZH: 你有加卢斯的日记？ | SID: 008595
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Karliah? Then she's finally found it. | ZH: 卡莱亚？这么说她终于找到了。 | SID: 00F45B

translations.english: I'm calling it "Calcelmo's Guide to the Falmer Tongue." It will revolutionize the way we understand those ancient beings.
translations.chinese: 我会把它命名为“卡塞莫的伐莫语指南”，这将彻底改变我们对那些古人的理解。

translations.english: Then you were well informed. I am at this very moment on the cusp of completing my magnum opus on the subject.
translations.chinese: 消息很灵通。此时此刻，我即将完成我关于这个课题的杰作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032D58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm calling it "Calcelmo's Guide to the Falmer Tongue." It will revolutionize the way we understand those ancient beings. | ZH: 我会把它命名为“卡塞莫的伐莫语指南”，这将彻底改变我们对那些古人的理解。 | SID: 000997
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Then you were well informed. I am at this very moment on the cusp of completing my magnum opus on the subject. | ZH: 消息很灵通。此时此刻，我即将完成我关于这个课题的杰作。 | SID: 00F6DC

translations.english: The court wizard of Markarth, Calcelmo, may have the materials you need to get this journal translated.
translations.chinese: 马卡斯的宫廷巫师卡塞莫，他或许有你需要的资料，可以翻译这本日记。

translations.english: No. However, I know someone who might.
translations.chinese: 不能，不过我知道有人或许可以。

translations.english: A word of warning. Calcelmo is a fierce guardian of his research. Getting the information won't be easy.
translations.chinese: 给你个忠告。卡塞莫对他的研究严防死守。想拿到资料并不容易。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032D5A]

translations.english: This is just like Gallus. A dear friend, but always too clever for his own good.
translations.chinese: 这才像是加卢斯。这老伙计就是喜欢自作聪明。

translations.english: A problem? Let me see it.
translations.chinese: 问题？让我看看。

translations.english: He's written all of the text in the Falmer language.
translations.chinese: 整本日记都是用伐莫语写的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032D5B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: This is just like Gallus. A dear friend, but always too clever for his own good. | ZH: 这才像是加卢斯。这老伙计就是喜欢自作聪明。 | SID: 006B9D

translations.english: I'm not certain how many scholars you're accustomed to dealing with, but I can assure you that personal wealth is our lowest priority.
translations.chinese: 我不知道你和多少学者打过交道，但我可以保证，钱财于我们真的是浮云。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032D5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm not certain how many scholars you're accustomed to dealing with, but I can assure you that personal wealth is our lowest priority. | ZH: 我不知道你和多少学者打过交道，但我可以保证，钱财于我们真的是浮云。 | SID: 00DA5F

translations.english: Gallus had his wealth and he had you. All he had to do was look the other way.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯有钱有你，财色双收。只需睁一只眼闭一只眼就可以了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032DCF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Gallus had his wealth and he had you. All he had to do was look the other way. | ZH: 加卢斯有钱有你，财色双收。只需睁一只眼闭一只眼就可以了。 | SID: 005616

translations.english: You're a clever girl, Karliah. Buying Goldenglow Estate and funding Honningbrew Meadery was inspired.
translations.chinese: 你是个聪明的女孩，卡莱亚。收购金色光辉庄园，资助蜜之酿酒庄，确实高明。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00032DD0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're a clever girl, Karliah. Buying Goldenglow Estate and funding Honningbrew Meadery was inspired. | ZH: 你是个聪明的女孩，卡莱亚。收购金色光辉庄园，资助蜜之酿酒庄，确实高明。 | SID: 00F262

translations.english: I'm no fool, Mercer. Crossing blades with you would be a death sentence.
translations.chinese: 我可不傻，墨瑟。和你交手是自寻死路。

translations.english: But I can promise the next time we meet, it will be your undoing.

agentText:

translations.english: Walk away! Let poor Cicero live! Tell the pretender Astrid you did the job! Stabbed, strangled, drowned poor Cicero! One little itty bitty lie!
translations.chinese: 走吧！让可怜的西塞罗活下去！告诉阿斯垂德那个冒牌货，你完成任务了！用刺、用勒、用水淹，整死可怜的西塞罗！一个小小的谎言！

translations.english: But killing me would be a mistake! Oh yes. You would displease our mother, hmm? For she's your mother too, isn't she... Listener?
translations.chinese: 但杀我会是一个错误！哦，没错。你会让我们的母亲不高兴的，对吧？因为她也是你母亲对吧？聆听者？

translations.english: Oh, I like that! Very good, very good! Creative!
translations.chinese: 哦豁，我喜欢！非常好，非常好！有创意！

translations.english: There is only one cure for your madness, Cicero. Me.
translations.chinese: 西塞罗，治好你的疯狂只有一个办法。那就是我！

translations.english: Traitor? Me? Silly assassin. So confused, so confused... and they say I'm mad!
translations.chinese: 叛徒？我？愚蠢的刺客。不可思议，不可思议……他们居然说我疯了！

translations.english: So walk away! Let poor Cicero live! Tell Astrid you did the job! Stabbed, strangled, drowned poor Cicero! A tiny white lie for a dark assassin!
translations.chinese: 赶紧走开！让可怜的西塞罗活下去！告诉阿斯垂德你完成任务了！用刺、用勒、用水淹，整死可怜的西塞罗！黑暗的刺客和善意的谎言！

translations.english: Time to die, traitor!
translations.chinese: 该上路了，叛徒！

translations.english: Oh, you prefer to listen, eh? Of course, of course! The Listener listens! A joke! A funny joke! I get it.
translations.chinese: 哦，你更喜欢听，哈？当然，当然！聆听者在聆听！笑话！有趣的笑话！我明白了。

translations.english: Return to the pretender, tell her I'm dead! Tell her you strangled me with my own intestines! Ha ha! But lie! Yes, lie! Lie, and let me live!
translations.chinese: 回到那个冒牌货身边，就告诉她，我死了！告诉她你用我的肠子把我活活勒死了！哈哈！不过是撒谎！没错！撒谎！撒谎吧，让我活下去！

translations.english: Then listen to this - don't kill me. Let poor Cicero live! I attacked the strumpet Astrid, I did! And I'd do it again! Anything for our mother!
translations.chinese: 那就听着吧——别杀我。让可怜的西塞罗活下去！我袭击了那个婊子阿斯垂德，是我干的！我还会这么干！为了我们的母亲我什么都敢做！

translations.chinese: 告诉他我会替他们看着的。我只希望女儿能开开心心的。

translations.english: Bassianus is still so terrified of Jofthor.
translations.chinese: 巴夏努斯还是很怕约夫托尔。

translations.english: If he knew that I'd keep him from hunting the poor boy down, he'd take Fastred to Riften without a second thought.
translations.chinese: 如果那倒霉小子知道我能阻止我丈夫去追他，他会毫不犹豫地把法斯莱德带到裂谷城去。

translations.chinese: 那就麻烦了。我只知道法琳在要塞站岗，但我不知道她喜欢什么啊。

translations.english: Yes, what about the Lady Elisif?
translations.chinese: 没错，那艾利西弗夫人怎么办呢？

translations.english: Will she swear fealty to me, so all may know that we are at peace, and a new day has dawned?
translations.chinese: 她会不会向我宣誓效忠，好向所有人知道我们已经相安无事，新的一天已经到来？

translations.english: Will she acknowledge that it is we Nord's who will determine Skyrim's future?
translations.chinese: 她会不会承认，我们诺德人有权决定天际的未来？

translations.english: Will she put aside her personal hatred for me, and her misplaced love for the Emperor and his coin, so that the suffering of our people will end?
translations.chinese: 她会不会放下对我个人的仇恨，对皇帝和金钱的错爱，让我们人民结束痛苦？

translations.chinese: 他会不会把落入他囊中的金银抛弃？

translations.english: I'm not afraid of the remnants of the Legion, in time they'll all give up and go home.
translations.chinese: 我不害怕军团的残余，他们迟早都会放弃，然后回家。

translations.english: What I fear, is that the Thalmor will see our victory here and turn greater attention to our shores.
translations.chinese: 我所担心的是，梭默会看到我们的胜利，并将更多的注意力转向我们这里。

translations.english: We must be prepared to face them.
translations.chinese: 我们必须做好面对他们的准备。

translations.english: And now, I present to you, Ulfric Stormcloak, hero of the people, liberator and High King of Skyrim!
translations.chinese: 现在，有请人民英雄、天际的解放者与至高王，乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00035DAD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And now, I present to you, Ulfric Stormcloak, hero of the people, liberator and High King of Skyrim! | ZH: 现在，有请人民英雄、天际的解放者与至高王，乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷！ | SID: 00A7D1

translations.english: Now then. The men will expect a speech. Will you stand by my side? I wish to honor you, Dragonborn and the truest of Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 现在。将士们期待一场演讲。你能在我身边吗？我希望为你这位龙裔、最忠实的风暴斗篷增添荣耀。

translations.english: Stormblade. I want you to have my sword, a token of my appreciation.
translations.chinese: 风暴之刃。希望你能收下我的剑，以示我的感激之情。

translations.english: And in due time, the Moot will meet, and settle the claim to High King once and for all.
translations.chinese: 在适当的时候，领主议会将举行会议，彻底解决至高王人选问题。

translations.english: Then it is settled. The Jarl will continue to rule Solitude, I will garrison armies here to ward off Imperial attempts to reclaim the city.
translations.chinese: 那就这么定了。领主将继续统治独孤，我将在这里驻军以抵御帝国夺回这座城市的企图。

translations.english: To return to our glory and traditions, to determine our own future!
translations.chinese: 使我们回归荣耀和传统，得以亲手决定我们自己的未来!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00035DF0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: To return to our glory and traditions, to determine our own future! | ZH: 使我们回归荣耀和传统，得以亲手决定我们自己的未来! | SID: 009F9D

translations.english: It was you who fought a dying Empire who sunk its claws into our land, trying to drag us down with it.
translations.chinese: 是你们，和一个把魔爪伸到我们的土地上，试图把我们拖下水的垂死帝国战斗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00035DF1]

translations.english: But I will heed your wishes.
translations.chinese: 不过我会听从你的意愿。

translations.english: But rest assured. We've won Skyrim's right to determine her own future. And for that, every Nord praises us.
translations.chinese: 但放心吧。我们赢得了天际自主决定未来的权利。因此，每个诺德人都会称赞我们。

translations.english: There's no shame in such thoughts. A man without doubts is a man without a conscience.
translations.chinese: 有这样的想法并不丢人。没有疑虑的人是没有良心的。

translations.english: It was you who fought your kin who didn't understand our cause, who weren't willing to pay the price of our freedom.
translations.chinese: 是你们，与那些不了解我们的事业，不愿意为我们的自由付出代价的同族战斗。

translations.chinese: 如果我分析的没错，下一个复活的就是埋在凯娜之林附近的龙。

translations.english: Don't mind the dogs, they get anxious when they haven't had dinner.
translations.chinese: 不用管那些狗，它们没吃饭就会那样焦躁。

translations.english: Even the dead need company. That's what Arkay provides.
translations.chinese: 即使是死者也需要陪伴。这就是阿尔凯提供的东西。

translations.english: We all come into Arkay's light in the end, but there's no need to rush.
translations.chinese: 我们最终都会归于阿尔凯的光辉，但没有必要急着去。

translations.english: Markarth is a city of wealth, but gold doesn't follow you in death.
translations.chinese: 马卡斯确实是一座财富之城，但钱财外物生不带来，死不带去。

translations.chinese: 阿尔凯保佑你。

translations.english: You have the honor of addressing a member of the Thalmor. Bask in it.
translations.chinese: 你正在荣幸地与梭默成员讲话。沐浴这份光荣吧。
