translations.english: The Aldmeri Dominion is the only thing keeping the Empire on its feet.
translations.chinese: 先祖神洲是维持帝国站稳脚跟的唯一支柱。

translations.english: This war is such nonsense. All this fuss over their false human god.
translations.chinese: 这场战争太无聊了。一切都是为了他们虚假的人类神。

agentText:

translations.english: I understand. Hopefully I'll be able to save my meager earnings up to buy them one day.
translations.chinese: 我理解。希望有一天我微薄的收入能够存出买它们的钱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Why, just this last week I was commenting to my fellow meadery workers just how lucky we are to be working for such a charitable family.
translations.chinese: 就在上周，我还跟蜜酒庄的同事们说，我们能为这样一个仁慈的家族工作是多么幸运。

translations.english: She's an absolute pleasure to work for! In fact, I almost feel guilty accepting pay from her.
translations.chinese: 为她工作真是太好了！事实上，我连接受她的报酬都感觉愧疚。

agentText:

translations.english: Sure am! I thank my lucky stars every time I look to the night sky that Maven took me in and gave me this opportunity.
translations.chinese: 当然！每次仰望夜空，我都要感谢我的幸运星，是玛雯收留了我，给了我这个机会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We're... at odds about my charity. She thinks the people in this town have become lazy and expecting a handout.
translations.chinese: 我们……在我的慈善事业上有分歧。她认为这个镇上的人会变得懒惰并期待施舍。

translations.english: I try to include her in my lessons from Maramal over at the Temple of Mara, but she prefers to shop instead. Different strokes, eh?
translations.chinese: 我试着让她和我参加玛拉莫在玛拉神庙的课程，可她更喜欢购物。人各一好对吧？

translations.english: Nivenor is my wife. How I was ever able to meet such a gorgeous creature is one of life's mysteries.
translations.chinese: 尼维诺尔是我妻子。我如何才能遇到如此美丽的人，真是人生的谜题。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I try to include her in my lessons from Maramal over at the Temple of Mara, but she prefers to shop instead. Different strokes, eh? | ZH: 我试着让她和我参加玛拉莫在玛拉神庙的课程，可她更喜欢购物。人各一好对吧？ | SID: 004B7A

translations.english: She uses a very secret blend of spices, fresh honey from Goldenglow Estate and specially constructed aging casks to ensure the best flavor.
translations.chinese: 她使用了一种很秘密的香料混合，来自金色光辉庄园的新鲜蜂蜜和特殊构造的陈年木桶，确保酿出最好的味道。

translations.english: Even when you get to the last sip in your flagon, it'll taste just as good as the first!
translations.chinese: 即使你喝到酒壶里的最后一口，它的味道还是和第一口一样好！

translations.english: Lady Maven's been developing the secret recipe for Black-Briar Mead over the last several decades.
translations.chinese: 玛雯夫人在过去几十年里一直在研究黑棘蜜酒的秘方。

translations.english: It's going to take a lot more than that.
translations.chinese: 这远远不够。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A24]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's going to take a lot more than that. | ZH: 这远远不够。 | SID: 0073E2

translations.english: Look, just don't say anything to Maven, will you? I've spent weeks trying to get that right and if she sees how stupid I am, she'll get rid of me.
translations.chinese: 听着，别跟玛雯提，好吗？我花了几个星期才背下来，要是让她觉得我蠢，她会摆脱我的。

translations.english: Damn it! Sorry. I'm not very good at this.
translations.chinese: 该死！抱歉。我不太擅长这个。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A27]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Look, just don't say anything to Maven, will you? I've spent weeks trying to get that right and if she sees how stupid I am, she'll get rid of me. | ZH: 听着，别跟玛雯提，好吗？我花了几个星期才背下来，要是让她觉得我蠢，她会摆脱我的。 | SID: 000004
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Damn it! Sorry. I'm not very good at this. | ZH: 该死！抱歉。我不太擅长这个。 | SID: 00262F

translations.english: Yes, actually. I'm partnered with Maven Black-Briar. I put up a chunk of the gold she needed to get the place off the ground.
translations.chinese: 没错。我是玛雯·黑棘的合伙人。我给了她一大笔钱，让她把酒庄运转起来。

translations.english: My name may not be on the label, but some of my blood, sweat and tears are in every drop. Uh, figuratively of course.
translations.chinese: 虽然酒的标签上没有我的名字，但每一滴酒里都流淌着我的血泪汗。啊，只是打个比方了。

translations.english: We've been staggeringly successful so far. In fact, I'm almost surprised how quickly she's generated business for us.
translations.chinese: 到目前为止，我们取得了惊人的成功。事实上，她能这么快给我们带来生意，我都有些意外。

translations.english: Yeah... fired. Sure. That's what I meant.
translations.chinese: 是……被炒。没错。字面意义的被炒。

EDID: [00036A2D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah... fired. Sure. That's what I meant. | ZH: 是……被炒。没错。字面意义的被炒。 | SID: 00DFF7

translations.english: The amethyst in the center represents The Hist, the entity that all Argonians consider a sacred part of our lives.
translations.chinese: 中间的紫水晶代表希斯特，所有阿尔贡都认为它是我们生命中神圣的一部分。

translations.english: Every Argonian wedding proposal band is supposed to have three flawless amethysts as part of their design.
translations.chinese: 每个阿尔贡的结婚戒指都要有三颗无瑕的紫水晶作为设计的一部分。

translations.english: Two of the gems, the ones on the outside, represent the couple to be married... one for the husband, one for the wife.
translations.chinese: 其中两颗宝石在外，代表即将结婚的夫妇……一个是丈夫，一个是妻子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A2E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The amethyst in the center represents The Hist, the entity that all Argonians consider a sacred part of our lives. | ZH: 中间的紫水晶代表希斯特，所有阿尔贡都认为它是我们生命中神圣的一部分。 | SID: 0075E7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Every Argonian wedding proposal band is supposed to have three flawless amethysts as part of their design. | ZH: 每个阿尔贡的结婚戒指都要有三颗无瑕的紫水晶作为设计的一部分。 | SID: 009528

translations.english: Three in fact. They're my own recipe. Brought them over here from my days as a bartender in Gideon.
translations.chinese: 有三种。这是我自己的配方。是我在吉迪昂当酒保的时候带过来的。

translations.english: Second, we have the "White-Gold Tower" which is heavy cream with a layer of blended mead, lavender and dragon's tongue on top.
translations.chinese: 第二种，“白金塔”，混合蜜酒、薰衣草和龙舌花，再盖上一层重奶油。

translations.english: Last, and only for the bravest of souls, we have the "Cliff Racer" which is Firebrand Wine, Cyrodiilic Brandy, Flin and Sujamma.
translations.chinese: 最后一种，只有最勇敢的灵魂才敢尝试的“峭壁行者”，配料里有火牌葡萄酒、希罗帝尔白兰地、飞令和苏贾玛。

translations.english: First is the "Velvet Lechance" which is a mixture of blackberry, honey, spiced wine and a touch of nightshade... perfectly safe, I assure you.
translations.chinese: 第一种是“天鹅绒乐长思”，混合了黑莓、蜂蜜、香料酒和一点夜影花……但绝对安全，我可以保证。

translations.english: Too bad I haven't had the same success helping this city shed its poverty. Nivenor thinks I'm wasting my time trying, but I disagree.
translations.chinese: 可惜我没能在帮助城市摆脱贫困方面取得同样的成功。尼维诺尔觉得我这么做是在浪费时间，但我不同意。

translations.english: Only the best in all of Riften! I own Riften Fishery.
translations.chinese: 全裂谷城最好的！我是裂谷渔场的老板。

translations.english: Started out with a single fishing pole and now I have an entire building and two boats to my name. Not bad for a middle-aged Nord, eh?
translations.chinese: 一开始只有一根钓竿，现在我有了一栋楼和两艘船。对一个中年诺德人来说还不错吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A30]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Too bad I haven't had the same success helping this city shed its poverty. Nivenor thinks I'm wasting my time trying, but I disagree. | ZH: 可惜我没能在帮助城市摆脱贫困方面取得同样的成功。尼维诺尔觉得我这么做是在浪费时间，但我不同意。 | SID: 004E16
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Only the best in all of Riften! I own Riften Fishery. | ZH: 全裂谷城最好的！我是裂谷渔场的老板。 | SID: 00C332

translations.english: I was hoping you'd offer. I didn't think it was my place to ask such a favor of you. I thank you.
translations.chinese: 我还以为你需要什么回报。我没想到你会帮我这个忙。感谢你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A31]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I was hoping you'd offer. I didn't think it was my place to ask such a favor of you. I thank you. | ZH: 我还以为你需要什么回报。我没想到你会帮我这个忙。感谢你。 | SID: 006504

translations.english: That is the truth, my friend! Maven is a saint and don't let anyone tell you otherwise.
translations.chinese: 这就是实话，朋友！玛雯是个圣人，不要信任何人告诉你的反对意见。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A33]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That is the truth, my friend! Maven is a saint and don't let anyone tell you otherwise. | ZH: 这就是实话，朋友！玛雯是个圣人，不要信任何人告诉你的反对意见。 | SID: 00E097

translations.english: Outsiders aren't trusted in Markarth. Best keep that in mind.
translations.chinese: 外人在马卡斯不受信任。记住这一点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A34]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Outsiders aren't trusted in Markarth. Best keep that in mind. | ZH: 外人在马卡斯不受信任。记住这一点。 | SID: 00955B

translations.english: Can't believe I'm posted here. Even the beds are made of stone.
translations.chinese: 真不敢相信我会到这里。连床都是石头做的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00036A35]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can't believe I'm posted here. Even the beds are made of stone. | ZH: 真不敢相信我会到这里。连床都是石头做的。 | SID: 00D964

translations.english: I just think they've let my sister's death skew their outlook on Ulfric and what he really brings to the table with this war.
translations.chinese: 我只是觉得我妹妹的死影响了他们对乌弗瑞克的看法还有他在这场战争中的真正作用。

translations.english: I'd... appreciate if you kept my opinion between us. The last thing I want to do is have my parents "lose" another child.
translations.chinese: 我……希望你能对我的意见保密。我最不想的就是让我父母“失去”他们另一个孩子。

translations.english: I'm not so certain that Ulfric's intentions are as noble as they think. I think Ulfric cares about Ulfric and the rest is a smokescreen.
translations.chinese: 我不确定乌弗瑞克的意图是否和他们想的那样高尚。我觉得乌弗瑞克只在乎乌弗瑞克，其他都是障眼法。

translations.english: Don't mistake my political beliefs as a substitute for my family values. They're still my parents, and I love them dearly.
translations.chinese: 不要误以为我的政治信仰会替代我的家庭观念。他们还是我的父母，我非常爱他们。

translations.english: When the fighting began over the White-Gold Concordat, she ran off to join the Stormcloaks. She had her father's fire, how could I say no?

translations.english: I trained our daughter Lilija as a healer... to one day tend the Shrine of Talos and replace me as a Priestess of Talos.
translations.chinese: 我训练我们的女儿莉莉雅成为治疗师……希望她能去照看塔洛斯祭坛，取代我成为塔洛斯祭司。

translations.english: She died out there, only having tended to the wounded soldiers for a few months. We never even found her body... the Empire burned all the dead.
translations.chinese: 她只照顾了伤员几个月就死了。我们甚至都没找到她的尸体……帝国把所有死者都烧了。

translations.english: Her name is Vittoria Vici. She oversees the East Empire Company's business holdings in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 维托利亚·维齐。她独自监管着东帝国公司的商业资产。

translations.english: Revenge is it? Have you learned nothing from your time with us?
translations.chinese: 报仇来的？你跟我们在一起这么久就没学到些什么吗？

translations.chinese: 在我们刺杀皇帝前，还有一个目标。

translations.english: Festus has been spearheading this part of the assassination plan. He's close to uncovering the identity of the Gourmet. You should report to him.
translations.chinese: 菲斯图斯主持这次暗杀计划。他马上就要查出美食家的身份了。你去找他报到吧。

translations.english: Have you by chance heard of the "Gourmet"? Read his cookbook? It's become quite a phenomenon.
translations.chinese: 有没有听说过“美食家”？看过他写的食谱吗？那可是风靡一时啊。

translations.english: The Gourmet is scheduled to cook for the Emperor at a special dinner. You'll kill him, steal his Writ of Passage, and assume the roll of master chef.
translations.chinese: 美食家将会为皇帝准备特别的一餐。杀了他，偷走他的通行证，然后冒充主厨。

translations.english: Right. So what's my next task?
translations.chinese: 是的。那我下一个任务是什么？

translations.chinese: 我们对迪德拉而言不算什么。只是可以随意摆布、夸奖、惩罚的棋子。

translations.chinese: 也许他们太怕你，所以跑了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: And there it is, friends! The ugly truth! We are the children of man! Talos is the true god of man! Ascended from flesh, to rule the realm of spirit!
translations.chinese: 就是这样，朋友们！这就是令人厌恶的真相！我们是人类的子孙！塔洛斯才是人类的真神！从肉体升华，统治了精魂的领域！

translations.english: Come on now, we discussed that. I wouldn't be traveling all of Skyrim. It'd just to Whiterun and back, that's it.
translations.chinese: 别这样，我们讨论过了。我不会走遍整个天际，只是到白漫城再回来，就这样。

translations.english: And deserve our praise you do, for we are one! Ere you ascended and the Eight became Nine, you walked among us, great Talos, not as god, but as man!
translations.chinese: 您值得我们赞美，因为我们同源！伟大的塔洛斯啊，在您升天，将八圣灵变为九圣灵之前，您曾经在我们之间行走，不是以神的身份，而是作为一个人！

translations.english: The very idea is inconceivable to our Elven overlords! Sharing the heavens with us? With man? Ha! They can barely tolerate our presence on earth!
translations.chinese: 这个想法对我们的精灵老爷们来说不可思议！与我们共享天堂？人类？哈！他们几乎不能容忍我们在地上存在！

translations.english: Have you given my idea any more thought? You said you'd let me know yesterday, and that obviously didn't happen.
translations.chinese: 你有没有再考虑一下我的想法？你说昨天就会告诉我的，但你没有。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: "I breathe now, in royalty, and reshape this land which is mine. I do this for you, Red Legions, for I love you."
translations.chinese: “我现在凭王权而呼吸，重塑这片属于我的土地。我这么做是为了你们，红色军团，因为，我爱你们。”

agentText:

translations.english: Terrible and powerful Talos! We, your unworthy servants, give praise! For only through your grace and benevolence may we truly reach enlightenment!
translations.chinese: 可怕而强大的塔洛斯！我们，您卑微的仆人，赞美您！因为只有凭借您的恩典和仁慈，我们才能真正达到教化！

translations.english: Aye, love. Love! Even as man, great Talos cherished us. For he saw in us, in each of us, the future of Skyrim! The future of Tamriel!
translations.chinese: 啊，爱。爱！即使身为人类，伟大的塔洛斯也会珍视我们。因为他在我们身上，在我们每个人身上，看到了天际的未来！泰姆瑞尔的未来！

agentText:

translations.english: Oh, I don't know. Yes, we'd make more money, but I don't like the idea of you traveling alone out there with the war and talk of dragons.
translations.chinese: 哦，我不知道。没错，我们是能赚更多的钱，但我不喜欢你一个人在战争和巨龙的威胁下旅行。

translations.english: Tomorrow. I'll let you know tomorrow.
translations.chinese: 明天。明天我再告诉你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A152]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tomorrow. I'll let you know tomorrow. | ZH: 明天。明天我再告诉你。 | SID: 0069F9

translations.english: But you were once man! Aye! And as man, you said, "Let me show you the power of Talos Stormcrown, born of the North, where my breath is long winter."
translations.chinese: 但您也曾一度为人！啊！作为人类，您说过，“让我向你等展现诞生于北境，呼吸如漫长严冬的风暴王冠塔洛斯的力量吧。”

translations.english: Today, they take away your faith. But what of tomorrow? What then? Do the elves take your homes? Your businesses? Your children? Your very lives?
translations.chinese: 今天，他们夺走了您的信仰。但明天呢？将来呢？精灵会夺走你的家人？你的事业？你的孩子？你的生活吗？

translations.english: That dark elf wants to go on ahead, let him. Better than us risking our necks.
translations.chinese: 那个暗精灵想去就随他去吧。总比咱们玩儿命强。

translations.english: Sweet breath of Arkay, thank you.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯的甜蜜气息，谢谢你。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Does it look like I can move? You have to cut me down, first.
translations.chinese: 我现在看起来能动吗？先把我放下来。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A170]

translations.chinese: 不。不要。救命！

Translations:

translations.english: So we're just supposed to sit here while Arvel runs off with that golden claw?
translations.chinese: 所以我们就坐在这儿眼睁睁看着阿维尔带着黄金龙爪跑掉？

agentText:

translations.english: Yes, he matches the description of this Esbern guy you're looking for. Maybe it's him. Maybe it isn't.
translations.chinese: 没错，你要找的伊思本和他很符合。但我也不确定是不是他。

translations.english: That's all I know, okay?
translations.chinese: 我就知道这些，成了吗？

translations.english: There's this old man. I've seen him around Riften. I don't know where he lives. I don't know his name.
translations.chinese: 我在裂谷城见过那个老头。我不知道他叫什么，住在哪。

translations.english: Fine. Whatever you want. Can't you just kill me and get it over with?
translations.chinese: 好吧。如你所愿。你就不能杀了我了事吗？

translations.english: Whatever you want. But let's go, now.
translations.chinese: 不管你想干什么，我们现在得赶紧走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1CA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Whatever you want. But let's go, now. | ZH: 不管你想干什么，我们现在得赶紧走。 | SID: 00FD2E

translations.english: Why don't you just kill me already.
translations.chinese: 你为什么不杀我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1CB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Why don't you just kill me already. | ZH: 你为什么不杀我。 | SID: 001E81

translations.english: No problem. Thanks for springing me. I owe you. Look me up in Riften if you make it out.
translations.chinese: 没问题。多谢搭救。我欠你的。以后有机会裂谷城见。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1CC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No problem. Thanks for springing me. I owe you. Look me up in Riften if you make it out. | ZH: 没问题。多谢搭救。我欠你的。以后有机会裂谷城见。 | SID: 00895E

translations.english: I guess you know what you're doing. I've got to find a way out of here.
translations.chinese: 我想你清楚自己在干什么。我得想办法出去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I guess you know what you're doing. I've got to find a way out of here. | ZH: 我想你清楚自己在干什么。我得想办法出去。 | SID: 00F0AD

translations.english: They're after some old guy named Esbern. Something to do with dragons, I gathered it from listening to them talk when they thought I was out.
translations.chinese: 他们在找一个叫伊思本的老头。这件事与龙族有关，我是假装出去之后偷听他们说的。

translations.english: I damn well hope so. If it helps you twist them up, I'm glad to help.
translations.chinese: 我太乐意了。要是你能修理他们一顿，我很高兴能帮上忙。

translations.english: Not much to go on -- I don't even know where he lives, or his name. But they seemed pretty excited about it.
translations.chinese: 但我也没什么线索。我连他住在哪、叫什么都不知道。不过他们似乎很兴奋。

translations.english: That's it. Now, let's get out of here.
translations.chinese: 就这样。我们离开这儿吧。

translations.english: I've seen a guy in Riften who they seem to think is him.
translations.chinese: 我曾经在裂谷城见过那个疑似是他们要找的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1CE]
Translations:

translations.english: Come on, this way. I've seen the guards use it to get rid of bodies. It must lead somewhere.
translations.chinese: 来，这边走。我见过卫兵从这里运送尸体。它肯定通向某个地方。

translations.english: Yeah, sure, okay.
translations.chinese: 对对，没错。

translations.chinese: 什么？你是谁……你想做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1D0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? Who... what do you want then? | ZH: 什么？你是谁……你想做什么？ | SID: 00AACB

translations.english: I told you, I don't know anything else about it.
translations.chinese: 我跟你说了。我真的不知道更多了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1D1]

translations.english: You fool, why should I share the treasure with anyone?
translations.chinese: 傻子，我凭什么跟别人分享宝藏？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A1DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You fool, why should I share the treasure with anyone? | ZH: 傻子，我凭什么跟别人分享宝藏？ | SID: 00AFE3

translations.english: Please, let me know if it seems safe to leave.
translations.chinese: 拜托，如果安全了请告诉我离开。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A6A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, let me know if it seems safe to leave. | ZH: 拜托，如果安全了请告诉我离开。 | SID: 008328

translations.english: He is? I'm not sure how to feel about that. Perhaps it's for the better.
translations.chinese: 他死了？我不知道该作何感想。或许这样更好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A6A1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He is? I'm not sure how to feel about that. Perhaps it's for the better. | ZH: 他死了？我不知道该作何感想。或许这样更好。 | SID: 0076B4

translations.english: I left for a few days in Riften. When I came back Bashnag accused me of trying to sell him out to the Thalmor. I was cursed and chased off.
translations.chinese: 我去裂谷城待了几天。回来时巴什纳格指责我，说我要把他出卖给梭默。然后我就被诅咒丢出来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A6A2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I left for a few days in Riften. When I came back Bashnag accused me of trying to sell him out to the Thalmor. I was cursed and chased off. | ZH: 我去裂谷城待了几天。回来时巴什纳格指责我，说我要把他出卖给梭默。然后我就被诅咒丢出来了。 | SID: 0072F8

translations.english: Thank you. When I find my daughter, it will be thanks to you.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你！等我找到我女儿，会感谢你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A6A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you. When I find my daughter, it will be thanks to you. | ZH: 谢谢你！等我找到我女儿，会感谢你的。 | SID: 00C02B

translations.english: Bashnag cursed me. I can't cast a spell to save my life right now. I'll have to wait until the way out is safe.
translations.chinese: 巴什纳格给我下了诅咒。我现在没法施法术自救。我得等安全抵达出口才行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003A6A4]
Translations:

translations.english: Please, will you help me get out of here? If the coast is clear, I'll make a break for it.
translations.chinese: 拜托，你能带我离开这儿吗？如果没有危险，我会逃走的。

translations.english: Thanks for getting me out of that. Bashnag's coven chased me out and left me for dead down here. Nobody lasts too long with the spiders.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你救我下来。巴什纳格的巫师团把我赶出来丢在这里等死。没人能和蜘蛛相处太久。

translations.english: I am, and I don't want to hear your moral judgments about it, either. I wouldn't have had to study in secret in the old days.
translations.chinese: 是的，我不想听你对这事的道德谴责。很久以前我就不用偷偷学习了。

EDID: [0003AF58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Please, I'm desperate. This is my brother's life! I won't let them take it away! | ZH: 拜托，我实在是绝望了。这是我兄弟的命！我不会让他们害死他的！ | SID: 0003C6
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I beg of you, look for proof of Thorald's capture. The Battle-Borns have it, I just know it. | ZH: 求你了，去找找索拉德被捕的证据。战狂那里就有，我知道的。 | SID: 00C093

translations.english: Mother, what's the meaning of this? Who have you brought into our home?
translations.chinese: 妈，这是怎么回事？你把谁带来了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mother, what's the meaning of this? Who have you brought into our home? | ZH: 妈，这是怎么回事？你把谁带来了？ | SID: 00471B

translations.english: There's got to be something in that house of theirs. I just know it.
translations.chinese: 他们房子里肯定有什么东西。我就知道。

translations.english: I don't dare leave the house myself. So I need your help.
translations.chinese: 我自己不敢出门。所以需要你的帮助。

translations.english: I know that Thorald's not dead. I just know it. The Imperials have him, and are keeping him somewhere. But I don't know where.
translations.chinese: 我知道索拉德还没死。帝国抓了他，关在了什么地方。但我不知道在哪儿。

translations.english: Those damned Battle-Borns... they know something. They're hiding it. They practically taunt us with it. They must have some sort of proof!
translations.chinese: 那群该死的战狂……他们肯定知道什么。就是藏着。他们在嘲笑我们。他们肯定有证据！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF5A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: There's got to be something in that house of theirs. I just know it. | ZH: 他们房子里肯定有什么东西。我就知道。 | SID: 002AE7
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I don't dare leave the house myself. So I need your help. | ZH: 我自己不敢出门。所以需要你的帮助。 | SID: 00A591
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I know that Thorald's not dead. I just know it. The Imperials have him, and are keeping him somewhere. But I don't know where. | ZH: 我知道索拉德还没死。帝国抓了他，关在了什么地方。但我不知道在哪儿。 | SID: 00E4F9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Those damned Battle-Borns... they know something. They're hiding it. They practically taunt us with it. They must have some sort of proof! | ZH: 那群该死的战狂……他们肯定知道什么。就是藏着。他们在嘲笑我们。他们肯定有证据！ | SID: 00E934

translations.english: So I need someone to find that proof for me.
translations.chinese: 我需要有人帮忙去找证据。

translations.english: My brother, Thorald. He was fighting for the Stormcloaks, and went missing. Everyone assumes he's dead.
translations.chinese: 我兄弟索拉德。他去参加了风暴斗篷，然后就失踪了。大家都以为他死了。

translations.english: But he's not. I just know it. The Imperials captured him, and they're holding him someplace. The Battle-Borns know where.
translations.chinese: 但他没死。我知道的。帝国人把他抓了，关在了什么地方。战狂知道在哪儿。

translations.english: I'd go and search their house for proof, but they want me too. I'd be captured, and then we'll never know what happened to him.
translations.chinese: 我想去他们的房子里搜查证据，但他们也在找我。如果我被抓了，我们就永远不知道索拉德怎么样了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF5E]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: My brother, Thorald. He was fighting for the Stormcloaks, and went missing. Everyone assumes he's dead. | ZH: 我兄弟索拉德。他去参加了风暴斗篷，然后就失踪了。大家都以为他死了。 | SID: 002EA4

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I'd go and search their house for proof, but they want me too. I'd be captured, and then we'll never know what happened to him. | ZH: 我想去他们的房子里搜查证据，但他们也在找我。如果我被抓了，我们就永远不知道索拉德怎么样了。 | SID: 00768E

translations.english: I knew it! Let me see, please!
translations.chinese: 我就知道！请让我看看！

translations.english: So... Northwatch Keep. Then we know where to hit them.
translations.chinese: 嗯……北望堡垒。那我们就知道去哪儿打击他们了。

translations.english: The Thalmor? By the Nine, it's worse than I thought.
translations.chinese: 梭默？九圣灵在上，比我想的要糟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF5F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I knew it! Let me see, please! | ZH: 我就知道！请让我看看！ | SID: 008C01
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So... Northwatch Keep. Then we know where to hit them. | ZH: 嗯……北望堡垒。那我们就知道去哪儿打击他们了。 | SID: 00E8C3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The Thalmor? By the Nine, it's worse than I thought. | ZH: 梭默？九圣灵在上，比我想的要糟。 | SID: 00FBD6

translations.english: We can't trust anyone! Who knows what they'll do if they find me here.
translations.chinese: 我们不能相信任何人！谁知道他们发现了我在这里会干什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF60]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We can't trust anyone! Who knows what they'll do if they find me here. | ZH: 我们不能相信任何人！谁知道他们发现了我在这里会干什么。 | SID: 00CEE1

translations.english: Anything that confirms that Thorald isn't dead, but is being held captive. I know those Battle-Borns have it.
translations.chinese: 任何能证明索拉德没死，而是被囚禁的证据都行。我知道战狂家有证据。

translations.english: But you might be able to butter them up enough to lower their guard.
translations.chinese: 但也许你可以奉承他们几句，让他们放松警惕。

translations.english: They'd be hiding it, of course. Wouldn't want it to get out that they've been lying this whole time.
translations.chinese: 他们当然会藏起来。不想让人知道他们一直在撒谎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF61]

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But you might be able to butter them up enough to lower their guard. | ZH: 但也许你可以奉承他们几句，让他们放松警惕。 | SID: 0059EC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They'd be hiding it, of course. Wouldn't want it to get out that they've been lying this whole time. | ZH: 他们当然会藏起来。不想让人知道他们一直在撒谎。 | SID: 00D19C

translations.english: But why would you risk your life for me, a stranger?
translations.chinese: 但你为什么要来冒险救我一个陌生人？

translations.english: I cannot thank you enough for rescuing me from this place. I suspect I'd never again see the light of day otherwise.
translations.chinese: 感谢你把我救出来。否则我再也见不到天日了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF78]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I cannot thank you enough for rescuing me from this place. I suspect I'd never again see the light of day otherwise. | ZH: 感谢你把我救出来。否则我再也见不到天日了。 | SID: 00C228

translations.english: I never thought I'd see another friendly face again.
translations.chinese: 我从没想过还能见到友善的面孔。

translations.english: We need to get to safety as soon as possible. Let's move.
translations.chinese: 我们得尽快逃到安全的地方。我们走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003AF79]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I never thought I'd see another friendly face again. | ZH: 我从没想过还能见到友善的面孔。 | SID: 00DB5A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We need to get to safety as soon as possible. Let's move. | ZH: 我们得尽快逃到安全的地方。我们走。 | SID: 00F87E

translations.english: Talos the mighty! Talos the unerring! Talos the unassailable! To you we give praise!
translations.chinese: 无比强大的塔洛斯！永不错误的塔洛斯！不容置疑的塔洛斯！我们赞美您！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B2BF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Talos the mighty! Talos the unerring! Talos the unassailable! To you we give praise! | ZH: 无比强大的塔洛斯！永不错误的塔洛斯！不容置疑的塔洛斯！我们赞美您！ | SID: 00F867

translations.english: We are but maggots, writhing in the filth of our own corruption! While you have ascended from the dung of mortality, and now walk among the stars!
translations.chinese: 我们不过是在堕落的污秽中挣扎的蛆虫！而您已经从死亡的粪土中爬起，行走于群星之间！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B2C0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We are but maggots, writhing in the filth of our own corruption! While you have ascended from the dung of mortality, and now walk among the stars! | ZH: 我们不过是在堕落的污秽中挣扎的蛆虫！而您已经从死亡的粪土中爬起，行走于群星之间！ | SID: 00518B

translations.english: Trust in me, Whiterun! Trust in Heimskr! For I am the chosen of Talos! I alone have been anointed by the Ninth to spread his holy word!
translations.chinese: 相信我，白漫城！相信海姆斯科！因为我就是塔洛斯的选择！只有我受第九圣灵之命来传播他的圣言！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B439]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Trust in me, Whiterun! Trust in Heimskr! For I am the chosen of Talos! I alone have been anointed by the Ninth to spread his holy word! | ZH: 相信我，白漫城！相信海姆斯科！因为我就是塔洛斯的选择！只有我受第九圣灵之命来传播他的圣言！ | SID: 00C652

translations.english: I'm one of the last members of the Blades.
translations.chinese: 我是刀锋会最后的幸存人员之一。

translations.english: For the last two hundred years, since the last Dragonborn emperor, the Blades have been searching for a purpose.
translations.chinese: 在两百年前最后一个龙裔皇帝去世后，刀锋会就开始寻找新的目标。

translations.english: A very long time ago, the Blades were dragonslayers, and we served the Dragonborn, the greatest dragonslayer.
translations.chinese: 很久以前，刀锋会就是屠龙者。我们服务于最伟大的屠龙者——龙裔。

translations.english: Now that dragons are coming back, our purpose is clear again. We need to stop them.
translations.chinese: 现在，龙族回归了，我们的目标也就清晰了。那就是阻止他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B492]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I'm one of the last members of the Blades. | ZH: 我是刀锋会最后的幸存人员之一。 | SID: 002091
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: For the last two hundred years, since the last Dragonborn emperor, the Blades have been searching for a purpose. | ZH: 在两百年前最后一个龙裔皇帝去世后，刀锋会就开始寻找新的目标。 | SID: 002281
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: A very long time ago, the Blades were dragonslayers, and we served the Dragonborn, the greatest dragonslayer. | ZH: 很久以前，刀锋会就是屠龙者。我们服务于最伟大的屠龙者——龙裔。 | SID: 0044AB
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Now that dragons are coming back, our purpose is clear again. We need to stop them. | ZH: 现在，龙族回归了，我们的目标也就清晰了。那就是阻止他们。 | SID: 005202

translations.english: The first thing we need to do is figure out who's behind the dragons.
translations.chinese: 首先要找出龙族的幕后黑手。

translations.english: The Thalmor are our best lead. If they aren't involved, they'll know who is.
translations.chinese: 梭默是最佳线索。即使他们不参与，也会调查谁参与了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B493]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The first thing we need to do is figure out who's behind the dragons. | ZH: 首先要找出龙族的幕后黑手。 | SID: 00AC77
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The Thalmor are our best lead. If they aren't involved, they'll know who is. | ZH: 梭默是最佳线索。即使他们不参与，也会调查谁参与了。 | SID: 00DB7C

translations.english: Really? Where?
translations.chinese: 真的？在哪？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B494]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Really? Where? | ZH: 真的？在哪？ | SID: 00E302

translations.english: Meet me back in Riverwood. If I'm not back when you get there, wait for me. I shouldn't be long.
translations.chinese: 回河木镇找我。如果你到了以后没见我回来，就稍等一下，我应该不会耽搁太久。

translations.english: Keep an eye on the sky. This is only going to get worse.
translations.chinese: 注意天空的动静。情况只会越来越糟。

translations.english: I'm not sure yet. I have a few ideas, but I'll need some time to pull things together...
translations.chinese: 还没确定。我有些想法，不过需要时间整理思路……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B495]

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Keep an eye on the sky. This is only going to get worse. | ZH: 注意天空的动静。情况只会越来越糟。 | SID: 00F7C1

translations.english: Interesting. Same dragon...
translations.chinese: 有点意思。同一只龙……

translations.english: Damn it, we're blundering around in the dark here! We need to figure out who's behind it all!
translations.chinese: 该死，我们在摸黑碰壁！得找出一切的幕后主使！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B496]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Interesting. Same dragon... | ZH: 有点意思。同一只龙…… | SID: 000403
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Damn it, we're blundering around in the dark here! We need to figure out who's behind it all! | ZH: 该死，我们在摸黑碰壁！得找出一切的幕后主使！ | SID: 00C24A

translations.english: Go ahead. Whatever you want to know. Nothing held back.
translations.chinese: 好吧。你想问什么尽管提。我不会藏着掖着了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B497]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go ahead. Whatever you want to know. Nothing held back. | ZH: 好吧。你想问什么尽管提。我不会藏着掖着了。 | SID: 0005E2

translations.english: Not a damn thing. I was just as surprised as you to find that big black dragon here.
translations.chinese: 一无所知。我和你一样被这头大黑龙惊着了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B498]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not a damn thing. I was just as surprised as you to find that big black dragon here. | ZH: 一无所知。我和你一样被这头大黑龙惊着了。 | SID: 00BE6F

translations.english: The Empire had captured Ulfric. The war was basically over. Then a dragon attacks, Ulfric escapes, and the war is back on.
translations.chinese: 帝国刚刚抓住乌弗瑞克，战争本就该基本结束了。结果一头龙袭击了，乌弗瑞克也逃了，战争就要继续。

translations.english: Who else gains from that but the Thalmor?
translations.chinese: 除了梭默，还有谁能从中获益？

translations.english: And now the dragons are attacking everywhere, indiscriminately. Skyrim is weakened, the Empire is weakened.
translations.chinese: 现在龙族肆意随处攻击。天际与帝国都因此而蒙受损失。

translations.english: Nothing solid. Yet. But my gut tells me it can't be anybody else.
translations.chinese: 没什么证据。但我的直觉告诉我，不会是其他人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B499]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Empire had captured Ulfric. The war was basically over. Then a dragon attacks, Ulfric escapes, and the war is back on. | ZH: 帝国刚刚抓住乌弗瑞克，战争本就该基本结束了。结果一头龙袭击了，乌弗瑞克也逃了，战争就要继续。 | SID: 00171C
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Who else gains from that but the Thalmor? | ZH: 除了梭默，还有谁能从中获益？ | SID: 003B52
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: And now the dragons are attacking everywhere, indiscriminately. Skyrim is weakened, the Empire is weakened. | ZH: 现在龙族肆意随处攻击。天际与帝国都因此而蒙受损失。 | SID: 004B14
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Nothing solid. Yet. But my gut tells me it can't be anybody else. | ZH: 没什么证据。但我的直觉告诉我，不会是其他人。 | SID: 0067B0

translations.english: We need to find out if the Thalmor are behind the dragons coming back. We need to get into the Thalmor Embassy, somehow...
translations.chinese: 我们要搞清龙族回归背后是不是梭默在搞鬼。咱们得想办法混进梭默大使馆……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B49A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We need to find out if the Thalmor are behind the dragons coming back. We need to get into the Thalmor Embassy, somehow... | ZH: 我们要搞清龙族回归背后是不是梭默在搞鬼。咱们得想办法混进梭默大使馆…… | SID: 0015C6

translations.english: It's under your feet, lad. Just follow the smell.
translations.chinese: 就在脚下，小子。跟着气味儿走吧。

translations.english: If I have to hold your hand through everything, maybe you aren't cut out for this kind of work.
translations.chinese: 如果每件事都得手把手教，也许你不适合这种工作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B59B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's under your feet, lad. Just follow the smell. | ZH: 就在脚下，小子。跟着气味儿走吧。 | SID: 0094E2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: If I have to hold your hand through everything, maybe you aren't cut out for this kind of work. | ZH: 如果每件事都得手把手教，也许你不适合这种工作。 | SID: 00E4EF

translations.english: The walls have ears and you're being tested, lad. We'll talk in the Ragged Flagon.
translations.chinese: 隔墙有耳啊，你在接受考验呢，小子。我们漏壶再叙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B59C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The walls have ears and you're being tested, lad. We'll talk in the Ragged Flagon. | ZH: 隔墙有耳啊，你在接受考验呢，小子。我们漏壶再叙。 | SID: 00A68A

translations.english: The walls have ears and you're being tested, lass. We'll talk in the Ragged Flagon.
translations.chinese: 隔墙有耳啊，你在接受考验呢，姑娘。我们漏壶再叙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B59E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The walls have ears and you're being tested, lass. We'll talk in the Ragged Flagon. | ZH: 隔墙有耳啊，你在接受考验呢，姑娘。我们漏壶再叙。 | SID: 00D72E

translations.english: Isn't it obvious? As the Night Mother's Keeper, he believes he's entitled to the rule of this Sanctuary.
translations.chinese: 这不是显而易见的吗？作为夜母的守护者，他觉得自己有权统领这个圣所。

translations.english: Ironically, the Night Mother could prove to be just as much a victim. The queen in a fool's twisted game of chess.
translations.chinese: 讽刺的是，连夜母都可能成了受害者。变成了那个小丑象棋盘上的皇后。

translations.english: Cicero will cite our independence as the need to revert to the Old Ways. He'll claim we're undisciplined, unruly. Heretical, even.
translations.chinese: 西塞罗会认为我们需要从独立回归古道。会指斥我们是离经叛道，不守纪律的异端。

translations.english: What do you think Cicero is planning?
translations.chinese: 你觉得西塞罗在计划些什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B66C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Isn't it obvious? As the Night Mother's Keeper, he believes he's entitled to the rule of this Sanctuary. | ZH: 这不是显而易见的吗？作为夜母的守护者，他觉得自己有权统领这个圣所。 | SID: 006981
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Ironically, the Night Mother could prove to be just as much a victim. The queen in a fool's twisted game of chess. | ZH: 讽刺的是，连夜母都可能成了受害者。变成了那个小丑象棋盘上的皇后。 | SID: 009C7E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Cicero will cite our independence as the need to revert to the Old Ways. He'll claim we're undisciplined, unruly. Heretical, even. | ZH: 西塞罗会认为我们需要从独立回归古道。会指斥我们是离经叛道，不守纪律的异端。 | SID: 00B910
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What do you think Cicero is planning? | ZH: 你觉得西塞罗在计划些什么？ | SID: 00F1D3

translations.english: I don't believe so. But I'll be able to instruct you further after you've returned from the chamber. It depends on what you learn.
translations.chinese: 恐怕没了。但你从房间里出来的时候，我可以进一步指示你。取决于你在里面听到了什么。

translations.english: And make haste! You must be in place before Cicero and his... ally arrive! They could be planning another meeting at any time!
translations.chinese: 赶快！必须赶在西塞罗和他的……盟友前到达！他们随时都可能策划另一场会议！

translations.english: Is there anything else I should know?
translations.chinese: 我还需要知道些什么吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B66D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I don't believe so. But I'll be able to instruct you further after you've returned from the chamber. It depends on what you learn. | ZH: 恐怕没了。但你从房间里出来的时候，我可以进一步指示你。取决于你在里面听到了什么。 | SID: 002341
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And make haste! You must be in place before Cicero and his... ally arrive! They could be planning another meeting at any time! | ZH: 赶快！必须赶在西塞罗和他的……盟友前到达！他们随时都可能策划另一场会议！ | SID: 00E112
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there anything else I should know? | ZH: 我还需要知道些什么吗？ | SID: 001124

translations.english: Who is he speaking with? What are they planning? I fear treachery.
translations.chinese: 他在跟谁说话？他们在计划什么？我害怕有人要背叛。

translations.english: It's Cicero. Ever since he arrived, his behavior's been... Well, erratic would be an understatement. I do believe he is truly mad.
translations.chinese: 是西塞罗。自打他来了之后，他的行为就很……唉，“古怪”这个词都算客气了，我觉得他真的疯了。

translations.english: But it's worse than that. He's taken to locking himself in the Night Mother's chamber, and talking. To someone. In hushed, but frantic tones.
translations.chinese: 更糟的是，他喜欢把自己锁在夜母的房间里和什么人聊天。声音又安详又疯狂。

translations.english: Is something wrong?
translations.chinese: 有什么问题吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B66E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Who is he speaking with? What are they planning? I fear treachery. | ZH: 他在跟谁说话？他们在计划什么？我害怕有人要背叛。 | SID: 0044E9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It's Cicero. Ever since he arrived, his behavior's been... Well, erratic would be an understatement. I do believe he is truly mad. | ZH: 是西塞罗。自打他来了之后，他的行为就很……唉，“古怪”这个词都算客气了，我觉得他真的疯了。 | SID: 00B554
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But it's worse than that. He's taken to locking himself in the Night Mother's chamber, and talking. To someone. In hushed, but frantic tones. | ZH: 更糟的是，他喜欢把自己锁在夜母的房间里和什么人聊天。声音又安详又疯狂。 | SID: 00C497
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is something wrong? | ZH: 有什么问题吗？ | SID: 000BE8

translations.english: The very thought breaks my heart.
translations.chinese: 光是这么想就让我心都碎了。

translations.english: Any one of us could enter that chamber silently. Unnoticed. But who amongst us would dare conspire against the Sanctuary?
translations.chinese: 我们中任何一人都能在不引起注意的情况下，悄无声息地进入那个房间。但谁又敢密谋破坏圣所？

translations.english: That's the real question, isn't it? The jester enters, seals the door, and the conversation begins. So someone must be waiting for him inside.
translations.chinese: 这才是真正的问题，对吧？小丑走进去，锁上门，谈话就开始了。所以，一定有人在里面等他。

translations.english: Any idea who would conspire with Cicero?
translations.chinese: 知道谁有可能和西塞罗串通吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B66F]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Any one of us could enter that chamber silently. Unnoticed. But who amongst us would dare conspire against the Sanctuary? | ZH: 我们中任何一人都能在不引起注意的情况下，悄无声息地进入那个房间。但谁又敢密谋破坏圣所？ | SID: 005603

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Any idea who would conspire with Cicero? | ZH: 知道谁有可能和西塞罗串通吗？ | SID: 0051C8

translations.english: Yeah. I bet I know your guy. He's hiding out in the Ratway Warrens. Paying us good coin for nobody to know about it.
translations.chinese: 啊，我认识你说的那个家伙。他躲在鼠道窝棚里。给了我们一大笔钱保密他的行踪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B69A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah. I bet I know your guy. He's hiding out in the Ratway Warrens. Paying us good coin for nobody to know about it. | ZH: 啊，我认识你说的那个家伙。他躲在鼠道窝棚里。给了我们一大笔钱保密他的行踪。 | SID: 006FB6

translations.english: Lot of people looking for him. Don't know his name, but he's paid good money for nobody to know he's down here.
translations.chinese: 很多人都在找他。我也不知道他叫什么，不过为了隐藏行踪他可是花了不少钱。

translations.english: Know of an old guy hiding out in Riften, name of Esbern?
translations.chinese: 你知不知道有个叫伊思本的老头藏在裂谷城？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B69C]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Know of an old guy hiding out in Riften, name of Esbern? | ZH: 你知不知道有个叫伊思本的老头藏在裂谷城？ | SID: 00E574

translations.english: He's holed up in the Ratway Warrens. Be careful. You're not the only one looking for him.
translations.chinese: 他躲在鼠道里。小心点，不止你一个人在找他。

translations.english: That old guy hiding out down here... Where does he live?
translations.chinese: 有个老头躲在下面……他住哪里？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B69D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He's holed up in the Ratway Warrens. Be careful. You're not the only one looking for him. | ZH: 他躲在鼠道里。小心点，不止你一个人在找他。 | SID: 001263
- INFO:RNAM | EN: That old guy hiding out down here... Where does he live? | ZH: 有个老头躲在下面……他住哪里？ | SID: 00F47E

translations.english: Huh. Lot of old guys around. I don't really know how I can help.
translations.chinese: 嗯。老头不少。我不知道怎么帮你。

translations.english: I'm looking for an old guy, hiding out somewhere in Riften.
translations.chinese: 我在找一个藏在裂谷城的老头。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B69E]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm looking for an old guy, hiding out somewhere in Riften. | ZH: 我在找一个藏在裂谷城的老头。 | SID: 006A23

translations.english: Finally, you're back.
translations.chinese: 你终于回来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003B9A4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Finally, you're back. | ZH: 你终于回来了。 | SID: 00CCF4

translations.english: What about you? Have you... have you spoken to anyone? No.... No, of course not. I do the talking, the stalking, the seeing and saying!
translations.chinese: 你呢？你有没有……有没有跟谁说过话？不……当然不会。我负责交谈，跟踪，观察，说话！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BB7A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What about you? Have you... have you spoken to anyone? No.... No, of course not. I do the talking, the stalking, the seeing and saying! | ZH: 你呢？你有没有……有没有跟谁说过话？不……当然不会。我负责交谈，跟踪，观察，说话！ | SID: 000A8F

translations.english: ...sweet Night Mother.
translations.chinese: ……亲爱的夜母啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BB7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: ...sweet Night Mother. | ZH: ……亲爱的夜母啊。 | SID: 00E82A

translations.english: Are we alone? Yes... yes... alone. Sweet solitude. No one will hear us, disturb us. Everything is going according to plan.
translations.chinese: 没有别人了吧？对……对……没有别人。甜美的孤独。没有人听到我们，打扰我们。一切都在按计划进行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BB7C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are we alone? Yes... yes... alone. Sweet solitude. No one will hear us, disturb us. Everything is going according to plan. | ZH: 没有别人了吧？对……对……没有别人。甜美的孤独。没有人听到我们，打扰我们。一切都在按计划进行。 | SID: 00E889

translations.english: The others... I've spoken to them. And they're coming around, I know it. The wizard, Festus Krex... perhaps even the Argonian, and the un-child...
translations.chinese: 其他人……我和其他人谈过了。他们都会回心转意的，我知道。那个叫菲斯图斯·克莱克斯的巫师……甚至还有那个阿尔贡，和那个假小孩儿……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BB7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The others... I've spoken to them. And they're coming around, I know it. The wizard, Festus Krex... perhaps even the Argonian, and the un-child... | ZH: 其他人……我和其他人谈过了。他们都会回心转意的，我知道。那个叫菲斯图斯·克莱克斯的巫师……甚至还有那个阿尔贡，和那个假小孩儿…… | SID: 002BBA

translations.english: And what do you do? Nothing! Not... not that I'm angry! No, never! Cicero understands. Heh. Cicero always understands! And obeys!
translations.chinese: 你呢？什么都不干！不……我不是生气！不，绝不！西塞罗理解。哎。西塞罗一直都很理解！也很服从！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BB7E]

translations.english: You will talk when you're ready, won't you? Won't you...
translations.chinese: 你准备好的时候，会说话的对吧？对吧……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BB7F]

translations.english: Help! Can anyone hear me? I'm stuck down here.
translations.chinese: 救命！有人能听到吗？我被困在这儿了。

agentText:

EDID: [0003BC5A]

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC5B]
Translations:

translations.english: Cut me down, or you'll never get the claw!
translations.chinese: 放我下来吧，否则你永远拿不到爪子！

agentText:

translations.chinese: 抱歉，但我还有个宝藏要拿……

translations.english: So long "friend." Ha ha ha!
translations.chinese: 再会了，“朋友”。哈哈哈！

agentText:

translations.english: Is anyone out there? Anyone?
translations.chinese: 有人吗？有人吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC60]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Is anyone out there? Anyone? | ZH: 有人吗？有人吗？ | SID: 00418C

translations.english: I don't know what you overheard, but the Riverwood Trader is still open. Feel free to shop.
translations.chinese: 我不知道你听到了什么，但河木镇贸易行照常营业。请随意选购。

agentText:

translations.english: You're not getting that treasure.
translations.chinese: 你拿不到宝藏。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC6C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're not getting that treasure. | ZH: 你拿不到宝藏。 | SID: 003293

translations.english: I'm too swift for you!
translations.chinese: 我跑得比你快！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC6D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm too swift for you! | ZH: 我跑得比你快！ | SID: 004235

translations.english: Too slow!
translations.chinese: 太慢了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC6E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Too slow! | ZH: 太慢了！ | SID: 00A157

translations.english: I heard Lucan yelling the other day about a thief breaking into his store. It wasn't me, honest!
translations.chinese: 那天我听见卢坎大喊有贼。那可不是我，真的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC6F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I heard Lucan yelling the other day about a thief breaking into his store. It wasn't me, honest! | ZH: 那天我听见卢坎大喊有贼。那可不是我，真的！ | SID: 0021C6

translations.english: Ironic, right? The old enemies assume that every calamity must be a plot by the other side...
translations.chinese: 很讽刺吧？宿敌总会认为每次灾难都是对方的阴谋……

translations.english: Even so, we've got to find Esbern before they do. He'll know how to stop the dragons if anybody does.
translations.chinese: 即便如此，我们也得在他们之前找到伊思本。如果说有谁知道怎么阻止龙族，那非他莫属。

translations.english: Do they know where he is?
translations.chinese: 他们知道他在哪吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC93]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ironic, right? The old enemies assume that every calamity must be a plot by the other side... | ZH: 很讽刺吧？宿敌总会认为每次灾难都是对方的阴谋…… | SID: 00158C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Even so, we've got to find Esbern before they do. He'll know how to stop the dragons if anybody does. | ZH: 即便如此，我们也得在他们之前找到伊思本。如果说有谁知道怎么阻止龙族，那非他莫属。 | SID: 00CED3
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Do they know where he is? | ZH: 他们知道他在哪吗？ | SID: 00F573

translations.english: Riften, eh? Probably down in the Ratway, then. It's where I'd go.
translations.chinese: 裂谷城？如果是我，我应该会藏到下面的鼠道里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC95]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Riften, eh? Probably down in the Ratway, then. It's where I'd go. | ZH: 裂谷城？如果是我，我应该会藏到下面的鼠道里。 | SID: 006521

translations.english: He knew everything about the ancient dragonlore of the Blades.
translations.chinese: 他了解刀锋会关于远古龙族知识的一切。

translations.english: Obsessed with it, really. Nobody paid much attention back then. I guess he wasn't as crazy as we all thought.
translations.chinese: 他对此十分痴迷。当时没人注意过。他可能没我们想的那么疯狂。

translations.english: Esbern was one of the Blades archivists, back before the Thalmor smashed us during the Great War.
translations.chinese: 在浩大战争梭默摧毁我们之前，伊思本是刀锋会档案管理员之一。

translations.english: You mean, aside from wanting to kill every Blade they can lay their hands on?
translations.chinese: 除了杀死他们抓得到的刀锋以外的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC98]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: He knew everything about the ancient dragonlore of the Blades. | ZH: 他了解刀锋会关于远古龙族知识的一切。 | SID: 00146C
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Obsessed with it, really. Nobody paid much attention back then. I guess he wasn't as crazy as we all thought. | ZH: 他对此十分痴迷。当时没人注意过。他可能没我们想的那么疯狂。 | SID: 003112
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Esbern was one of the Blades archivists, back before the Thalmor smashed us during the Great War. | ZH: 在浩大战争梭默摧毁我们之前，伊思本是刀锋会档案管理员之一。 | SID: 00D1F0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: You mean, aside from wanting to kill every Blade they can lay their hands on? | ZH: 除了杀死他们抓得到的刀锋以外的？ | SID: 00E7D9

translations.english: Really? That seems hard to believe. You're sure about that?
translations.chinese: 真的？真不敢相信。你能确定吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC99]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Really? That seems hard to believe. You're sure about that? | ZH: 真的？真不敢相信。你能确定吗？ | SID: 002BD8

translations.english: Dangerous-looking elves who didn't give their names. Draw your own conclusions.
translations.chinese: 一群不愿透露姓名，看上去还挺危险的精灵。自己想去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BC9F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Dangerous-looking elves who didn't give their names. Draw your own conclusions. | ZH: 一群不愿透露姓名，看上去还挺危险的精灵。自己想去吧。 | SID: 002BF5

translations.english: You'd better get to Riften. Ask around the Ragged Flagon, in the Ratway. It's at least a good starting point.
translations.chinese: 你最好快点去裂谷城。可以在鼠道的漏壶问问。应该是个好切入点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCA0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'd better get to Riften. Ask around the Ragged Flagon, in the Ratway. It's at least a good starting point. | ZH: 你最好快点去裂谷城。可以在鼠道的漏壶问问。应该是个好切入点。 | SID: 00F555

translations.english: You'd better get to Riften. Talk to Brynjolf. He's... well-connected. A good starting point at least.
translations.chinese: 你最好快点去裂谷城。和布林乔夫谈谈。他……消息灵通。应该是个好切入点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'd better get to Riften. Talk to Brynjolf. He's... well-connected. A good starting point at least. | ZH: 你最好快点去裂谷城。和布林乔夫谈谈。他……消息灵通。应该是个好切入点。 | SID: 00866B

translations.english: Well... there is guy like that. He's paid good money for nobody to know he's down here, but I guess I can tell you.
translations.chinese: 嗯……好像有这么个人。他花了好多钱希望不要暴露自己，不过我应该能告诉你。

translations.english: I'm looking for an old guy hiding out in Riften, probably in the Ratway.
translations.chinese: 我在找一个藏在裂谷城的老头，他大概藏在鼠道里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well... there is guy like that. He's paid good money for nobody to know he's down here, but I guess I can tell you. | ZH: 嗯……好像有这么个人。他花了好多钱希望不要暴露自己，不过我应该能告诉你。 | SID: 003310
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm looking for an old guy hiding out in Riften, probably in the Ratway. | ZH: 我在找一个藏在裂谷城的老头，他大概藏在鼠道里。 | SID: 00B74E

translations.english: You're right, you're right. I just... I was sure it must have been them. If not the Thalmor, who? Or... what?
translations.chinese: 你说得对。说得对。我只是……一直觉得是梭默干的。要不是他们，还能有谁？还是……有什么东西？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're right, you're right. I just... I was sure it must have been them. If not the Thalmor, who? Or... what? | ZH: 你说得对。说得对。我只是……一直觉得是梭默干的。要不是他们，还能有谁？还是……有什么东西？ | SID: 004946

translations.english: You think I don't know that? If anyone learned of this meeting, my corpse would swing over Solitude for a decade!
translations.chinese: 你以为我不知道？如果有人知道这次会面的事，我的尸体得被挂在独孤城晾上十年八年！

translations.english: But what I ask of you... it must be done. There is too much at stake.
translations.chinese: 但我要求你……必须做到。我冒了很大风险。

translations.english: You do realize this is treason...
translations.chinese: 你应该明白，这是叛国……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCE4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You think I don't know that? If anyone learned of this meeting, my corpse would swing over Solitude for a decade! | ZH: 你以为我不知道？如果有人知道这次会面的事，我的尸体得被挂在独孤城晾上十年八年！ | SID: 002648
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But what I ask of you... it must be done. There is too much at stake. | ZH: 但我要求你……必须做到。我冒了很大风险。 | SID: 00DFDE
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You do realize this is treason... | ZH: 你应该明白，这是叛国…… | SID: 000783

translations.english: I don't know exactly what's going on here, if you're the Listener, or this is some fluke, or what. But what we now have before us...
translations.chinese: 我不知道到底发生了什么，你可能真是聆听者，也可能只是什么巧合。但我们现在要做的是……

translations.english: No, she certainly wouldn't. And... for whatever reason, she chose to relay Motierre's information to you.
translations.chinese: 对，她当然不会。而且……不管原因如何，她已经选择将莫提雷的消息转达给你了。

translations.english: Surely the Night Mother wouldn't misdirect us...
translations.chinese: 夜母定不会误我们……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCE5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I don't know exactly what's going on here, if you're the Listener, or this is some fluke, or what. But what we now have before us... | ZH: 我不知道到底发生了什么，你可能真是聆听者，也可能只是什么巧合。但我们现在要做的是…… | SID: 00238B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: No, she certainly wouldn't. And... for whatever reason, she chose to relay Motierre's information to you. | ZH: 对，她当然不会。而且……不管原因如何，她已经选择将莫提雷的消息转达给你了。 | SID: 00532F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Surely the Night Mother wouldn't misdirect us... | ZH: 夜母定不会误我们…… | SID: 00AF46

translations.english: I daresay, the work I'm offering has more significance than anything your organization has experienced in, well, centuries.
translations.chinese: 我敢说，这份工作比你们组织几百年来所有契约都要有意义。

translations.english: Yes, um.... So it would seem. Well, I won't waste your time. I would like to arrange a contract. Several, actually.
translations.chinese: 对，嗯……看起来是这样。好吧，那我也不浪费你时间了。我要安排一份契约。准确来说，是一组契约。

translations.english: The Night Mother heard your pleas, Motierre.
translations.chinese: 夜母听到了你的祈求，莫提雷。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCE6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I daresay, the work I'm offering has more significance than anything your organization has experienced in, well, centuries. | ZH: 我敢说，这份工作比你们组织几百年来所有契约都要有意义。 | SID: 00EF48
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes, um.... So it would seem. Well, I won't waste your time. I would like to arrange a contract. Several, actually. | ZH: 对，嗯……看起来是这样。好吧，那我也不浪费你时间了。我要安排一份契约。准确来说，是一组契约。 | SID: 00FDA6
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The Night Mother heard your pleas, Motierre. | ZH: 夜母听到了你的祈求，莫提雷。 | SID: 0069AE

translations.english: His killing ushered in, shall we say, a necessary change in Imperial policy.
translations.chinese: 可以说，他的死使得帝国政策出现了必要的改变。

translations.english: In the year 3E 41, Emperor Pelagius Septim was murdered in the Temple of the One in the Imperial City. Cut down by a Dark Brotherhood assassin.
translations.chinese: 3E41年，佩拉吉奥斯·塞普汀皇帝在帝都至尊神殿被黑暗兄弟会的刺客所杀。

translations.english: There are those now who wish for a similar change. I am sorry, but that's all I'm at liberty to say.
translations.chinese: 现在有些人希望出现类似的改变。抱歉，我只能说这么多。

translations.english: Why do this? Why have the Emperor assassinated?
translations.chinese: 为什么这么做？为什么要杀皇帝？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCE7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: His killing ushered in, shall we say, a necessary change in Imperial policy. | ZH: 可以说，他的死使得帝国政策出现了必要的改变。 | SID: 003919
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: In the year 3E 41, Emperor Pelagius Septim was murdered in the Temple of the One in the Imperial City. Cut down by a Dark Brotherhood assassin. | ZH: 3E41年，佩拉吉奥斯·塞普汀皇帝在帝都至尊神殿被黑暗兄弟会的刺客所杀。 | SID: 00495A
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: There are those now who wish for a similar change. I am sorry, but that's all I'm at liberty to say. | ZH: 现在有些人希望出现类似的改变。抱歉，我只能说这么多。 | SID: 006CEC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Why do this? Why have the Emperor assassinated? | ZH: 为什么这么做？为什么要杀皇帝？ | SID: 00944E

translations.english: The logistics of such an endeavor will be staggering, I know. There will be several minor assassinations necessary. Leading up to the... main target.
translations.chinese: 我知道，想要完成这个契约，后勤保障需求是惊人的。有必要先进行几次小型暗杀行动。来接近……主要目标。

translations.english: The sealed letter explains everything else, in detail. It should be delivered to your superior. Whomever that may be.
translations.chinese: 这封密信会详细解释一切。把它交到你们上级手里，不管是谁。

translations.english: As I mentioned, the amulet I gave you is exceptionally valuable, and will certainly cover the costs of all these other unpleasantries.
translations.chinese: 就像我说的，我给你的护符非常珍贵，足以弥补其他所有额外费用。

translations.english: This is a complex contract. I need more details.
translations.chinese: 这契约很复杂。我需要更多细节。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCE8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The logistics of such an endeavor will be staggering, I know. There will be several minor assassinations necessary. Leading up to the... main target. | ZH: 我知道，想要完成这个契约，后勤保障需求是惊人的。有必要先进行几次小型暗杀行动。来接近……主要目标。 | SID: 001DB4
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The sealed letter explains everything else, in detail. It should be delivered to your superior. Whomever that may be. | ZH: 这封密信会详细解释一切。把它交到你们上级手里，不管是谁。 | SID: 003937
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: As I mentioned, the amulet I gave you is exceptionally valuable, and will certainly cover the costs of all these other unpleasantries. | ZH: 就像我说的，我给你的护符非常珍贵，足以弥补其他所有额外费用。 | SID: 00954F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: This is a complex contract. I need more details. | ZH: 这契约很复杂。我需要更多细节。 | SID: 00232D

translations.english: And, there's only one man who can give us what we need - Delvin Mallory. He's a fence, a private operator. Works out of the Ratway, in Riften.
translations.chinese: 只有一个人能满足我们的需要。戴尔文·马洛里。他是个销赃者，也会接些私活。他在裂谷城的鼠道工作。

translations.english: I'm thinking we need that amulet appraised. I want to know where it came from, how much it's worth, and if we can actually get away with selling it.
translations.chinese: 我想我们需要评估一下这个护符。得弄清楚它的来源和价值，还有，能否出手。

translations.english: Delvin Mallory and the Dark Brotherhood have... history. He can be trusted.
translations.chinese: 戴尔文·马洛里和黑暗兄弟会有些……渊源。可以信任。

translations.english: Give me the letter. Bring Mallory the amulet. Find out everything you can, and sell it if he's willing. He'll offer a letter of credit - that's fine.
translations.chinese: 把信给我吧。把护身符带给马洛里。尽可能查清楚他是否愿意买下。最好是能让他提供一份信用凭证。

translations.english: What are you thinking?
translations.chinese: 你在想什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCE9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: And, there's only one man who can give us what we need - Delvin Mallory. He's a fence, a private operator. Works out of the Ratway, in Riften. | ZH: 只有一个人能满足我们的需要。戴尔文·马洛里。他是个销赃者，也会接些私活。他在裂谷城的鼠道工作。 | SID: 003B44
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I'm thinking we need that amulet appraised. I want to know where it came from, how much it's worth, and if we can actually get away with selling it. | ZH: 我想我们需要评估一下这个护符。得弄清楚它的来源和价值，还有，能否出手。 | SID: 00CB19
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Delvin Mallory and the Dark Brotherhood have... history. He can be trusted. | ZH: 戴尔文·马洛里和黑暗兄弟会有些……渊源。可以信任。 | SID: 00DC26
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Give me the letter. Bring Mallory the amulet. Find out everything you can, and sell it if he's willing. He'll offer a letter of credit - that's fine. | ZH: 把信给我吧。把护身符带给马洛里。尽可能查清楚他是否愿意买下。最好是能让他提供一份信用凭证。 | SID: 00F8D2
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What are you thinking? | ZH: 你在想什么？ | SID: 00748B

translations.english: But you should know that these killings are but a means to an end. For they pave the way to the most important target.
translations.chinese: 但你要明白，这些杀戮不过是达成目的的手段。只是给最终目标铺路罢了。

translations.english: ...the Emperor.
translations.chinese: ……皇帝。

translations.english: The real reason I'm speaking with a cutthroat in the bowels of this detestable crypt. For I seek the assassination of...
translations.chinese: 我来到这恶心的地下墓穴和刺客谈话的真正原因，是因为我要杀……

translations.english: As I said, I want you to kill several people. You'll find the targets, as well as their manners of elimination, quite varied.
translations.chinese: 我说了，要你们杀几个人。而且消灭这些目标的方式与众不同。

translations.english: I'm sure someone of your disposition will probably even find it enjoyable.
translations.chinese: 我相信你这样的人肯定会觉得很有意思。

translations.english: Go on.
translations.chinese: 继续。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCEA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: But you should know that these killings are but a means to an end. For they pave the way to the most important target. | ZH: 但你要明白，这些杀戮不过是达成目的的手段。只是给最终目标铺路罢了。 | SID: 00242F
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: ...the Emperor. | ZH: ……皇帝。 | SID: 007C03
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: The real reason I'm speaking with a cutthroat in the bowels of this detestable crypt. For I seek the assassination of... | ZH: 我来到这恶心的地下墓穴和刺客谈话的真正原因，是因为我要杀…… | SID: 00ABB8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: As I said, I want you to kill several people. You'll find the targets, as well as their manners of elimination, quite varied. | ZH: 我说了，要你们杀几个人。而且消灭这些目标的方式与众不同。 | SID: 00C349
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: I'm sure someone of your disposition will probably even find it enjoyable. | ZH: 我相信你这样的人肯定会觉得很有意思。 | SID: 00E203
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Go on. | ZH: 继续。 | SID: 0098CB

translations.english: Is this no longer so?
translations.chinese: 现在不是这样了吗？

translations.english: I performed the Black Sacrament, contacted you people, because I thought you guaranteed discretion.
translations.chinese: 我执行黑色圣礼联系你们，就是因为你们够谨慎。

translations.english: Who are you, Motierre? Who are you, really?
translations.chinese: 莫提雷，你到底是谁？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCEB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Is this no longer so? | ZH: 现在不是这样了吗？ | SID: 00FD7F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I performed the Black Sacrament, contacted you people, because I thought you guaranteed discretion. | ZH: 我执行黑色圣礼联系你们，就是因为你们够谨慎。 | SID: 00FD9F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who are you, Motierre? Who are you, really? | ZH: 莫提雷，你到底是谁？ | SID: 001D16

translations.english: I would like to arrange a contract. Several, actually. I daresay, the most important work your organization has had in, well... centuries.
translations.chinese: 我想安排一份契约。准确点说，是一组契约。我敢保证，这是你们组织，嗯……几百年来最重要的差事。

translations.english: Oh, I know. I know. But I'm so glad you're here. Please, allow me to state my business. Surely your time is as valuable as my own.
translations.chinese: 哦，我知道，我知道。但很高兴你能来。请允许我介绍一下这份工作。相信你我的时间都很宝贵。

translations.english: You have opened the door to darkness, little man.
translations.chinese: 小子，你打开了通往黑暗的大门。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCEC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I would like to arrange a contract. Several, actually. I daresay, the most important work your organization has had in, well... centuries. | ZH: 我想安排一份契约。准确点说，是一组契约。我敢保证，这是你们组织，嗯……几百年来最重要的差事。 | SID: 006FCE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, I know. I know. But I'm so glad you're here. Please, allow me to state my business. Surely your time is as valuable as my own. | ZH: 哦，我知道，我知道。但很高兴你能来。请允许我介绍一下这份工作。相信你我的时间都很宝贵。 | SID: 00DEC2
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You have opened the door to darkness, little man. | ZH: 小子，你打开了通往黑暗的大门。 | SID: 0089FD

translations.english: What's this?
translations.chinese: 这是什么？

translations.english: (Show Astrid the amulet and sealed letter)
translations.chinese: （让阿斯垂德查看护符和未拆封的信）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What's this? | ZH: 这是什么？ | SID: 00867E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Show Astrid the amulet and sealed letter) | ZH: （让阿斯垂德查看护符和未拆封的信） | SID: 000096

translations.english: By Sithis, you're not joking.
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上，你还真没开玩笑。

translations.english: To kill the Emperor of Tamriel... The Dark Brotherhood hasn't done such a thing since the assassination of Pelagius.
translations.chinese: 刺杀泰姆瑞尔的皇帝……自从暗杀佩拉吉奥斯以来，黑暗兄弟会就没再做过这事了。

translations.english: As a matter of fact, no one has dared assassinate an Emperor of Tamriel since the murder of Uriel Septim, and that was two hundred years ago...
translations.chinese: 事实上，自打尤瑞尔·塞普汀被刺以后，就没人敢暗杀泰姆瑞尔的皇帝了，这都过去两百年了……

translations.english: The letter explains it all. The amulet is for expenses.
translations.chinese: 信里会解释一切。护符就是费用。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCEE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: By Sithis, you're not joking. | ZH: 西帝斯在上，你还真没开玩笑。 | SID: 0068EF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: To kill the Emperor of Tamriel... The Dark Brotherhood hasn't done such a thing since the assassination of Pelagius. | ZH: 刺杀泰姆瑞尔的皇帝……自从暗杀佩拉吉奥斯以来，黑暗兄弟会就没再做过这事了。 | SID: 009012
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: As a matter of fact, no one has dared assassinate an Emperor of Tamriel since the murder of Uriel Septim, and that was two hundred years ago... | ZH: 事实上，自打尤瑞尔·塞普汀被刺以后，就没人敢暗杀泰姆瑞尔的皇帝了，这都过去两百年了…… | SID: 00DFFC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The letter explains it all. The amulet is for expenses. | ZH: 信里会解释一切。护符就是费用。 | SID: 005032

translations.english: You're back. Good. All right, so? Did you meet this Motierre? What did he want?
translations.chinese: 回来了。好。一切还好吧？见过莫提雷了吗？他想干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCF0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're back. Good. All right, so? Did you meet this Motierre? What did he want? | ZH: 回来了。好。一切还好吧？见过莫提雷了吗？他想干什么？ | SID: 00D679

translations.english: You're joking.
translations.chinese: 你开玩笑吧。

translations.english: Motierre wants us... to kill the Emperor.
translations.chinese: 莫提雷让我们……杀皇帝。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCF1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're joking. | ZH: 你开玩笑吧。 | SID: 00FD9D
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Motierre wants us... to kill the Emperor. | ZH: 莫提雷让我们……杀皇帝。 | SID: 00DF9E

translations.english: Rexus. The items.
translations.chinese: 雷萨斯。东西拿来。

translations.english: Oh, wonderful. You don't know how happy I am to hear you say that.
translations.chinese: 哦，说得好。你不知道我听到这话有多高兴。

translations.english: So much has led to this day. So much planning, and maneuvering. It's as if the very stars have finally aligned.
translations.chinese: 为了今天，我们不知费了多少计划和心机。所有的星都连成一线了。

translations.english: But I digress. Here, take these to your, um... superior.
translations.chinese: 我离题了。来，这些给你的，嗯……上级。

translations.english: Leaders rise and fall. Business is business.
translations.chinese: 城头变幻大王旗。对我们而言就是一桩生意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCF2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Rexus. The items. | ZH: 雷萨斯。东西拿来。 | SID: 000D3B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Oh, wonderful. You don't know how happy I am to hear you say that. | ZH: 哦，说得好。你不知道我听到这话有多高兴。 | SID: 001E19
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: So much has led to this day. So much planning, and maneuvering. It's as if the very stars have finally aligned. | ZH: 为了今天，我们不知费了多少计划和心机。所有的星都连成一线了。 | SID: 005071
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But I digress. Here, take these to your, um... superior. | ZH: 我离题了。来，这些给你的，嗯……上级。 | SID: 007D44
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Leaders rise and fall. Business is business. | ZH: 城头变幻大王旗。对我们而言就是一桩生意。 | SID: 003977

translations.english: It is said that the Dark Brotherhood, in recent years, has been in decline. That you lack the power, wealth, and respect of days past. Is it not so?
translations.chinese: 据说黑暗兄弟会近年来一直在没落。你们失去了往日的力量、财富还有尊重。不是吗？

translations.english: Oh, my furtive friend. When Emperor Titus Mede II lies dead, there will be gold... a fortune in gold. But so much more!
translations.chinese: 哦，鬼鬼祟祟的朋友啊。提图斯·迈德二世一死，金子有的是。但还不止这些！

translations.english: If you do this, if you kill the Emperor... Oh, how the masses will fear and respect you.
translations.chinese: 如果你们接下这单，杀了皇帝……不知大众会多么敬畏你们啊。

translations.english: We'll require... significant compensation. Can you pay the price?
translations.chinese: 我们需要……大笔酬劳。你付得起？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCF3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It is said that the Dark Brotherhood, in recent years, has been in decline. That you lack the power, wealth, and respect of days past. Is it not so? | ZH: 据说黑暗兄弟会近年来一直在没落。你们失去了往日的力量、财富还有尊重。不是吗？ | SID: 00A9B3

- INFO:RNAM | EN: We'll require... significant compensation. Can you pay the price? | ZH: 我们需要……大笔酬劳。你付得起？ | SID: 00D376

translations.english: Right, then. You prefer to listen, is that it? Well, you must represent the Dark Brotherhood. I certainly wasn't expecting anyone else.
translations.chinese: 好吧，看来你更喜欢倾听？嗯，你一定是代表黑暗兄弟会的吧。我觉得应该不会是其他人了。

translations.english: I would like to arrange a contract. Several, actually. I daresay, the most important work your organization has had in, well... centuries.
translations.chinese: 我想安排一份契约。准确点说，是一组契约。我敢保证，这是你们组织，嗯……几百年来最重要的差事。

translations.english: So I'll cut right to the chase.
translations.chinese: 那我就开门见山了。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:

translations.english: Rexus. The items.
translations.chinese: 雷萨斯。东西拿来。

translations.english: You must understand. So much has led to this day. So much planning, and maneuvering. Now you're here, as if the very stars have finally aligned.
translations.chinese: 你得理解。为了今天，我们不知费了多少计划和心机。现在你来了，所有的星都连成了一线。

translations.english: It's a shocking request, I know. But it is inside the purview of what you Dark Brotherhood types do. Isn't it? If history is to be believed?
translations.chinese: 我知道这个要求有点震撼。但这也在你们黑暗兄弟会的职责范围内吧？假如历史记载可信的话。

translations.english: But I digress. Here, let me give you these. They are to be delivered to your, um... superior.
translations.chinese: 我离题了。来，给你这些。把它们交给你的……嗯……上级。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
