- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: You must understand. So much has led to this day. So much planning, and maneuvering. Now you're here, as if the very stars have finally aligned. | ZH: 你得理解。为了今天，我们不知费了多少计划和心机。现在你来了，所有的星都连成了一线。 | SID: 0068CD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: It's a shocking request, I know. But it is inside the purview of what you Dark Brotherhood types do. Isn't it? If history is to be believed? | ZH: 我知道这个要求有点震撼。但这也在你们黑暗兄弟会的职责范围内吧？假如历史记载可信的话。 | SID: 00C52D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But I digress. Here, let me give you these. They are to be delivered to your, um... superior. | ZH: 我离题了。来，给你这些。把它们交给你的……嗯……上级。 | SID: 00E0BE
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 00FDDD

translations.english: You think I'd abandon an opportunity to lead my Family to glory?
translations.chinese: 你觉得我会放弃带领家族走向荣耀的机会吗？

translations.english: But this is all so much to take in. I need time to read the letter, and figure out where we go from here. And this amulet. Hmmm...
translations.chinese: 但这还是有点让人难以接受。我需要时间来研究一下这封信，想想接下来的计划。还有这个护符。嗯……

translations.english: You're damn right we'll accept it. If we pull this off, the Dark Brotherhood will know a fear and respect we haven't seen in centuries.
translations.chinese: 说得对，我们接了。事成之后，黑暗兄弟会将受到数百年来未有的恐惧敬畏。

translations.english: So we'll accept the contract?
translations.chinese: 这么说我们接受契约了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCF6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You think I'd abandon an opportunity to lead my Family to glory? | ZH: 你觉得我会放弃带领家族走向荣耀的机会吗？ | SID: 001668
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But this is all so much to take in. I need time to read the letter, and figure out where we go from here. And this amulet. Hmmm... | ZH: 但这还是有点让人难以接受。我需要时间来研究一下这封信，想想接下来的计划。还有这个护符。嗯…… | SID: 00665C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You're damn right we'll accept it. If we pull this off, the Dark Brotherhood will know a fear and respect we haven't seen in centuries. | ZH: 说得对，我们接了。事成之后，黑暗兄弟会将受到数百年来未有的恐惧敬畏。 | SID: 006FC2
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So we'll accept the contract? | ZH: 这么说我们接受契约了？ | SID: 009314

translations.english: That is correct. What I ask is no small thing, of course. But you represent the Dark Brotherhood. This is... what you do? No?
translations.chinese: 没错。当然，我们谈的不是小买卖。但你是代表了黑暗兄弟会的。这是……你该做的？不是吗？

translations.english: You must understand. So much has led to this day. So much planning, and maneuvering. Now, it's as if the very stars have finally aligned.
translations.chinese: 你得理解。为了今天，我们不知费了多少计划和心机。所有的星都连成一线了。

translations.english: Rexus. The items.
translations.chinese: 雷萨斯。东西拿来。

translations.english: But I digress. Here, take these. They need to be delivered to your, um... superior.
translations.chinese: 我离题了。来，这些给你的，嗯……上级。

translations.english: You want us to kill... the Emperor. Of Tamriel?
translations.chinese: 你想让我们去杀……泰姆瑞尔的皇帝？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BCF7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: That is correct. What I ask is no small thing, of course. But you represent the Dark Brotherhood. This is... what you do? No? | ZH: 没错。当然，我们谈的不是小买卖。但你是代表了黑暗兄弟会的。这是……你该做的？不是吗？ | SID: 0002C8
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: You must understand. So much has led to this day. So much planning, and maneuvering. Now, it's as if the very stars have finally aligned. | ZH: 你得理解。为了今天，我们不知费了多少计划和心机。所有的星都连成一线了。 | SID: 0080C0
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Rexus. The items. | ZH: 雷萨斯。东西拿来。 | SID: 009354
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But I digress. Here, take these. They need to be delivered to your, um... superior. | ZH: 我离题了。来，这些给你的，嗯……上级。 | SID: 00E2C3
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You want us to kill... the Emperor. Of Tamriel? | ZH: 你想让我们去杀……泰姆瑞尔的皇帝？ | SID: 00AFAD

translations.english: But first we need to get our hands on some rebel orders to make the forgeries.
translations.chinese: 但首先我们得弄到一些叛军的命令来伪造。

translations.english: I need you to deliver some false orders to the Stormcloak commander in Dawnstar.
translations.chinese: 我需要你去给晨星的风暴斗篷指挥官送些假命令。

translations.english: Reporting for duty.
translations.chinese: 报告。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BD2B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But first we need to get our hands on some rebel orders to make the forgeries. | ZH: 但首先我们得弄到一些叛军的命令来伪造。 | SID: 00DE41
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I need you to deliver some false orders to the Stormcloak commander in Dawnstar. | ZH: 我需要你去给晨星的风暴斗篷指挥官送些假命令。 | SID: 00FB78
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Reporting for duty. | ZH: 报告。 | SID: 00F892

translations.english: You'd better come inside. Quickly now. Thalmor agents have been seen in the Ratway.
translations.chinese: 你最好进来。快点。梭默探子已经到鼠道里了。

translations.english: What's that you said? Dragonborn? Then... there really is hope after all?
translations.chinese: 你说什么？龙裔？这么说……真的还有希望？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BD96]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You'd better come inside. Quickly now. Thalmor agents have been seen in the Ratway. | ZH: 你最好进来。快点。梭默探子已经到鼠道里了。 | SID: 004918
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What's that you said? Dragonborn? Then... there really is hope after all? | ZH: 你说什么？龙裔？这么说……真的还有希望？ | SID: 00ED95

translations.english: What?! No, that's not me. I'm not Esbern. I don't know what you're talking about.
translations.chinese: 什么？！不不，我不是。我不是伊思本。我不懂你在说什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BD97]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What?! No, that's not me. I'm not Esbern. I don't know what you're talking about. | ZH: 什么？！不不，我不是。我不是伊思本。我不懂你在说什么。 | SID: 00527C

translations.english: Delphine? How do you... so you've finally found her, and she led you to me. And here I am, caught like a rat in a trap.
translations.chinese: 戴尔芬？你怎么……你终于找到她了，她让你来找我的吗。我就在这里，像个被夹住的老鼠似的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BD98]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Delphine? How do you... so you've finally found her, and she led you to me. And here I am, caught like a rat in a trap. | ZH: 戴尔芬？你怎么……你终于找到她了，她让你来找我的吗。我就在这里，像个被夹住的老鼠似的。 | SID: 007B3D

translations.english: Go away!
translations.chinese: 走开！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BD99]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go away! | ZH: 走开！ | SID: 00FDAA

translations.english: So, he says to petition Malacath for relief? Interesting.
translations.chinese: 所以他是想向玛拉凯斯请求救赎？有意思。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDBC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, he says to petition Malacath for relief? Interesting. | ZH: 所以他是想向玛拉凯斯请求救赎？有意思。 | SID: 00AB7F

translations.english: Fine, it's your neck.
translations.chinese: 好吧，随你吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDBE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fine, it's your neck. | ZH: 好吧，随你吧。 | SID: 00F33F

translations.english: The kind that curse you, haunt you in the dead of night. There is nothing you can do, nothing anyone can do.
translations.chinese: 那种诅咒你的精魂，在夜深人静时纠缠你的幽灵。任何人都对此无能无力。

translations.english: Shagrol, once the leader of this tribe, unhappy with his demise, has dealt with Malacath himself to curse me, curse us all.
translations.chinese: 沙葛洛，这个部落曾经的首领，不满于自己的死亡，与玛拉凯斯交易，对我，对我们所有人施加了诅咒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDBF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The kind that curse you, haunt you in the dead of night. There is nothing you can do, nothing anyone can do. | ZH: 那种诅咒你的精魂，在夜深人静时纠缠你的幽灵。任何人都对此无能无力。 | SID: 001815
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Shagrol, once the leader of this tribe, unhappy with his demise, has dealt with Malacath himself to curse me, curse us all. | ZH: 沙葛洛，这个部落曾经的首领，不满于自己的死亡，与玛拉凯斯交易，对我，对我们所有人施加了诅咒。 | SID: 0068A9

translations.english: Yes, but he offered it as an idea. Perhaps he hopes it will be helpful, but does not wish to risk personal failure.
translations.chinese: 对，但他提出了这个想法。也许他希望这能帮上忙，但他自己不想冒失败的风险。

translations.english: You should do as he says. Go to Malacath's shrine, northwest of here, and ask for his help. See what happens.
translations.chinese: 你就照他说的做吧。到西北方的玛拉凯斯祭坛，请求他的帮助。看看会发生什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDC0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes, but he offered it as an idea. Perhaps he hopes it will be helpful, but does not wish to risk personal failure. | ZH: 对，但他提出了这个想法。也许他希望这能帮上忙，但他自己不想冒失败的风险。 | SID: 00483E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You should do as he says. Go to Malacath's shrine, northwest of here, and ask for his help. See what happens. | ZH: 你就照他说的做吧。到西北方的玛拉凯斯祭坛，请求他的帮助。看看会发生什么。 | SID: 00E3F8

translations.english: Forgive Ugor's harsh words. She is merely doing as she has been told.
translations.chinese: 原谅乌戈尔的刻薄。她只是在按吩咐做事而已。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDC1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Forgive Ugor's harsh words. She is merely doing as she has been told. | ZH: 原谅乌戈尔的刻薄。她只是在按吩咐做事而已。 | SID: 00A97C

translations.english: Of course you cannot. No one can. It is my lot as Chief of this tribe, and so I suffer quietly.
translations.chinese: 当然不能，没谁受得了。这是我作为部落酋长的宿命，所以我得默默承受。

translations.english: Spirits! Ghosts! I am cursed, haunted, and I can do nothing. Can you fix that?
translations.chinese: 精魂！幽灵！我被诅咒了，缠住了，但我什么都做不了。你能受得了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDC2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Of course you cannot. No one can. It is my lot as Chief of this tribe, and so I suffer quietly. | ZH: 当然不能，没谁受得了。这是我作为部落酋长的宿命，所以我得默默承受。 | SID: 0086F2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Spirits! Ghosts! I am cursed, haunted, and I can do nothing. Can you fix that? | ZH: 精魂！幽灵！我被诅咒了，缠住了，但我什么都做不了。你能受得了吗？ | SID: 00F6BB

translations.english: The ears of the wind?
translations.chinese: 风之耳？

translations.english: This message is for me. I understand now. I have work to do. You, I shall need your help.
translations.chinese: 这消息是给我的。我明白了。我还有工作要做。我需要你的帮助。

translations.english: Malacath himself said this to you? But what does it... Ah! Yes! I see! A ritual is necessary!
translations.chinese: 玛拉凯斯对你说的？但是……啊！对！我明白了！必须进行仪式！

translations.english: I need a Daedra's heart, at once! Quickly, quickly!
translations.chinese: 我需要迪德拉之心，马上就要！快，快！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: The ears of the wind? | ZH: 风之耳？ | SID: 001C12
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: This message is for me. I understand now. I have work to do. You, I shall need your help. | ZH: 这消息是给我的。我明白了。我还有工作要做。我需要你的帮助。 | SID: 00954B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Malacath himself said this to you? But what does it... Ah! Yes! I see! A ritual is necessary! | ZH: 玛拉凯斯对你说的？但是……啊！对！我明白了！必须进行仪式！ | SID: 00E4B5
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I need a Daedra's heart, at once! Quickly, quickly! | ZH: 我需要迪德拉之心，马上就要！快，快！ | SID: 00EF01

translations.english: His shrine lies northwest of Largashbur. I am unsure that he will listen, but it cannot hurt.
translations.chinese: 他的祭坛坐落在拉加施布尔西北。我不确定他会不会回应，但总没有坏处。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDC4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: His shrine lies northwest of Largashbur. I am unsure that he will listen, but it cannot hurt. | ZH: 他的祭坛坐落在拉加施布尔西北。我不确定他会不会回应，但总没有坏处。 | SID: 0006D9

translations.english: Perhaps. But he spoke of this "curse" to you, which means it has deeply affected him.
translations.chinese: 也许吧。不过他既然对你说了“诅咒”的事，就说明那已经深刻地影响了他。

translations.english: Go to Malacath's shrine, southeast of Largashbur. See if perhaps he will aid us after all.
translations.chinese: 去玛拉凯斯的祭坛看看，就在拉加施布尔的西北。看看他会不会帮助我们。

translations.english: It may be worth attempting contact with Malacath after all.
translations.chinese: 还是试试与玛拉凯斯接触吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDC5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Perhaps. But he spoke of this "curse" to you, which means it has deeply affected him. | ZH: 也许吧。不过他既然对你说了“诅咒”的事，就说明那已经深刻地影响了他。 | SID: 00C155
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Go to Malacath's shrine, southeast of Largashbur. See if perhaps he will aid us after all. | ZH: 去玛拉凯斯的祭坛看看，就在拉加施布尔的西北。看看他会不会帮助我们。 | SID: 00DA84
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It may be worth attempting contact with Malacath after all. | ZH: 还是试试与玛拉凯斯接触吧。 | SID: 00FDAD

translations.english: We cannot carry on this way! You know we are doomed if we do not do something!
translations.chinese: 我们不能继续这样下去了！你应该明白，再不做些什么，我们就全完了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003BDC6]
Translations:

translations.english: You? An outsider? I'd sooner slit my own throat than accept help from you.
translations.chinese: 你？一个外来者？我宁可拿刀抹脖子也不会接受你的帮助。

translations.english: To even consider it would be such a sign of weakness that I might as well abandon my tribe now.
translations.chinese: 哪怕只是动动念头，我都会因这懦弱的表现而放弃部落。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Yamarz charged me with keeping outsiders away from Largashbur. You would have me disobey him?
translations.chinese: 亚马兹命我驱离靠近拉加施布尔的外人，你要我抗命吗？

translations.chinese: 告诉我，外来者。你会驱鬼吗？这才是我需要的。

translations.english: Atub! Meddlesome woman... You would help us? Help me?
translations.chinese: 阿图布！真是个爱管闲事的女人……你会帮助我们？帮助我？

translations.english: You were charged with keeping us inside the walls. Have faith, Ugor. I only wish the best for our tribe.
translations.chinese: 你的职责是把我们保护在墙内。有点信心，乌戈尔。我只希望部落好起来。

translations.english: Our chief is weakened. He will not rest, will not sleep. He suffers, and so the tribe suffers.
translations.chinese: 我们的酋长变弱了。不得休息，无法入睡。他受苦，部落也就跟着受苦。

translations.english: He needs someone to confide in. If it will not be one of us, perhaps it will be you. Go to him.
translations.chinese: 他需要对人倾诉。如果不是我们中的人，也许就是你了。去见见他吧。

translations.english: Yamarz is proud, and refuses to see that we need outside help.
translations.chinese: 亚马兹很骄傲，不愿意向外界寻求帮助。

translations.english: There's no honor in being a Jarl's servant. No Sovngarde waits for dust cleaners.
translations.chinese: 做领主的仆人没什么光荣可言。松加德不会等着土簸箕进去的。

translations.chinese: 我愿意为那些愿意和平离开晨星的人提供法术和药水的帮助。

translations.english: The Windpeak Inn features the finest bard in all of Dawnstar. Me.
translations.chinese: 风岳旅店的特色就是全晨星最好的诗人。也就是我。

translations.chinese: 我女儿卡利塔一有空就给客人唱歌。她的声音和她妈妈真像。

translations.chinese: 晨星是独孤城之前最后的港口。该死的叛军拿不下它。

translations.chinese: 别担心，我们不会不战而降把港口拱手让给帝国。

translations.english: Dangerous post, Dawnstar. If the bandits don't get you, the animals will.
translations.chinese: 晨星是个危险的地方。就算不被强盗逮住，也会被野兽赶上。

translations.english: I'm aspiring to earn that title, yes. However, the road ahead is paved with loose cobbles and deadly pitfalls.
translations.chinese: 我正渴望获得那个名号。但前方的路荆棘满布。

translations.english: Master Elgrim says I'm a natural; that I have a unique talent. But I fear his approval masks his intolerance for my mistakes.
translations.chinese: 艾尔格瑞姆老师说我是天才，有特殊的才能，但我觉得他的认可也使得他对我错误的格外严厉。

translations.english: My errant formulas have cost Master Elgrim a fortune in ingredients; some of which are almost irreplaceable.
translations.chinese: 我错误的配方让艾尔格瑞姆老师花了一大笔原料钱，其中一些还是几乎不可替代的。

translations.english: Well, that's just about the best news I've heard all week.
translations.chinese: 这大概是我这周听过最好的消息了。

translations.english: I was going to give this to whomever killed her for me, but I suppose you've earned it by bringing me this information.
translations.chinese: 我本想把这个交给杀了她的人，但我想这是你应得的，因为是你告诉了我这个消息。

translations.english: This key opens one of my drop spots in the basement of the meadery. Take anything inside you like.
translations.chinese: 这把钥匙能打开我在蜜酒庄地下室的一个存储点，想要什么随便拿。

translations.english: Feel free to take what you need from time to time. I'll be refilling it once every few days or so.
translations.chinese: 你可以随时拿你需要的东西。我会每隔几天补充一次的。

translations.english: I feel I owe a bit more than some meaningless coin for all your diligence. Here, this key unlocks my supply chest at Elgrim's Elixirs.
translations.chinese: 我觉得的你的努力不止一堆毫无意义的金币可以报答。给，这把钥匙能打开艾尔格瑞姆灵药店里的补给箱。

translations.english: Yes, Master Elgrim will be pleased I've restored his stock of these rare ingredients.
translations.chinese: 是，艾尔格瑞姆老师会很高兴看到我恢复了他的稀有材料储备的。

translations.english: Last we have deathbell which only grows in marshy tundra terrain. Its inverted bluish-purple flower bunches are unmistakable.
translations.chinese: 最后就是只生长在沼泽苔原地带的丧钟花。它那个倒垂的蓝紫色花朵是认不错的。

translations.english: Nightshade is native to the pine forest and marshy tundra regions of Skyrim and has a distinctive starburst-like violet flower.
translations.chinese: 夜影花产在天际松林和沼泽苔原地区，是一种独特的星状紫色花朵。

translations.english: Nirnroot is the easiest. It grows only by the water and makes a unique chiming noise. The only drawback is it won't regrow after harvesting.
translations.chinese: 奈恩根最简单。只生长在水边，会发出独特的声音。唯一的缺点是收割之后就长不出来了。

translations.english: I mean, I've... taken care of many people for her in the past. What in Oblivion did she expect me to do?
translations.chinese: 我是说，我……按她说的照顾过不少人。她到底希望我怎样？

translations.english: Mother thought I should be taught a lesson for airing the family's dirty laundry in public.
translations.chinese: 母亲认为我应该接受教训，因为我把家里的丑事公布于众了。

translations.english: Ah well. At least I have all the comforts of home during my stay. Well, except the touch of a woman of course.
translations.chinese: 啊。至少在我关在这儿这段时间，和家里一样舒适。就是少了女人的爱抚。

translations.english: She was a young woman... buxom, with long flowing black hair.
translations.chinese: 她很年轻……体态丰腴，一头黑色的飘逸长发。

translations.english: She used to sing the most lovely songs to me when we were courting. I've never heard a voice so beautiful.
translations.chinese: 我们谈恋爱的时候，她常给我唱很动听的歌曲，我从没听过这么动听的声音。

translations.english: All that talent will go to waste when I'm finished with her.
translations.chinese: 等我结果了她，她的才能也就要浪费了。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: She used to sing the most lovely songs to me when we were courting. I've never heard a voice so beautiful. | ZH: 我们谈恋爱的时候，她常给我唱很动听的歌曲，我从没听过这么动听的声音。 | SID: 007D7E

translations.english: Yet if only a single part of our imperfect machine fails, life fails. It makes one realize how fragile... how flawed we are.
translations.chinese: 然而只要我们这个不完美的机器有一个部分出了问题，也就没命了。这让人意识到生命是多么脆弱……我们是多么缺憾。

translations.english: We're made up of thousands of parts with thousands of different functions all working in tandem to keep us alive.
translations.chinese: 我们都是由千万个部分组成的，有千万种不同的功能，所有功能协调工作，以维持我们的生命。

translations.english: It's exhilarating to observe the effects of my potions on the body. Watching the heart stop... the eyes go blind.
translations.chinese: 观察我制作的药剂对身体的影响令人很兴奋。看着心脏停跳……眼睛失明。

translations.english: You ask why I'm so fascinated? The irony... the irony that the same world that gave us life provides us the means to die.
translations.chinese: 你问我为什么这么着迷？讽刺的是……世界给了我们生命也赋予了我们死亡。

translations.english: Am I sensing that you may be interested in gathering these rare ingredients for me?
translations.chinese: 你是不是有兴趣帮我收集这些珍材？

translations.english: To restore Master Elgrim's supply I would need 20 deathbell, 20 nightshade and 20 nirnroot.
translations.chinese: 为了补充艾尔格瑞姆老师的补给，我需要二十朵丧钟花，二十朵夜影花和二十株奈恩根。

translations.chinese: 抱歉，我不知道你在说什么。

agentText:

EDID: [0003C4C5]

translations.english: That means more time for my experiments and less time in the field. Much appreciated.
translations.chinese: 这会让我有更多时间去做实验，少花些时间在田野上。非常感谢。

translations.english: That's the spirit. Find her and I promise you'll be well compensated.
translations.chinese: 就是这样。找到她，奖赏大大的。

translations.chinese: 这把钥匙能打开我蜜酒庄地下室的一个储存点。里面的东西随便拿吧。

translations.english: You've done me a great service, my friend. Allow me to compensate you for the information.
translations.chinese: 你帮了我大忙，朋友。请允许我对你提供的消息稍作补偿。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003C4CF]

translations.english: Cut out the middleman, eh? Shrewd, very shrewd. You sure you don't have some Black-Briar blood in you?
translations.chinese: 省掉中间人了，哈？聪明，真聪明。你确定你不是我们黑棘家的人吗？

translations.english: Dov wahlaan fah rel. We were made to dominate. The will to power is in our blood. You feel it in yourself, do you not?
translations.chinese: 都瓦 瓦兰 法 瑞尔。我们生来渴望统治。对权力的渴望流淌在我们的血脉中。你也能够感受到，不是吗？

translations.english: No day goes by where I am not tempted to return to my inborn nature. Zin krif horvut se suleyk.
translations.chinese: 没准哪一天，我就会受不了诱惑而回归天性。兹尼 克瑞夫 霍瑞乌特 瑟 苏勒耶。

translations.english: What is better - to be born good, or to overcome your evil nature through great effort?
translations.chinese: 生性善良，还是靠努力战胜邪恶本性，这两者哪个更好？

translations.english: I can be trusted. I know this. But they do not. Onikaan ni ov dovah. It is always wise to mistrust a dovah.
translations.chinese: 我可以被信任。我清楚。但外人不知道。欧尼堪 尼 欧夫 都瓦。不相信都瓦是一个明智之举。

translations.english: I have overcome my nature only through meditation and long study of the Way of the Voice.
translations.chinese: 只有通过冥想并长年研习吼声之道，我才能克制自己的本性。

translations.chinese: 我们习惯了残羹剩饭度日，但碎盾想要我们一无所有才好。

translations.english: I heard some of the sailors talking about how they stashed a bottle of Double-Distilled Skooma in the Gnisis Cornerclub. I just need a taste.
translations.chinese: 我听几个水手说他们在格尼西斯街角吧藏了一瓶精炼斯库玛。我想尝一口。

translations.english: No. I'm not. I feel like my scales are clawing into me. Maybe you could help an old Argonian out?
translations.chinese: 不，不好。我觉得我的鳞片都在抓挠我。也许你能帮帮我这个老阿尔贡？

translations.chinese: 我输了。以碎盾氏族的荣誉起誓，阿尔贡会得到和其他工人一样的报酬。

translations.english: You pay those Argonians fairly, or else.
translations.chinese: 你应该给那些阿尔贡应得的报酬，不然要你好看。

translations.english: Torbjorn Shatter-Shield. I wish someone would beat the coin out of his fat fists. He clings to every Septim.
translations.chinese: 托布乔恩·碎盾。我真希望有人从他的胖拳头里把金币抠出来。他把每个塞普汀都拴在身上。

translations.english: He says an Argonian's labor is only worth a tenth of a "proper Nord worker." My people are not slaves!
translations.chinese: 他说，每个阿尔贡工人只值一个“正常诺德工人”的十分之一。我们又不是奴隶！

EDID: [0003F503]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're not worth it. | ZH: 和你较真不值得。 | SID: 0076C4

translations.english: I didn't think you had the stomach for it.
translations.chinese: 我不认为你能承担这个后果。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F504]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I didn't think you had the stomach for it. | ZH: 我不认为你能承担这个后果。 | SID: 00D325

translations.english: Point that somewhere else!
translations.chinese: 往别的地方瞄准！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F505]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Point that somewhere else! | ZH: 往别的地方瞄准！ | SID: 00B131

translations.english: Careful there!
translations.chinese: 小心点！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F507]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Careful there! | ZH: 小心点！ | SID: 009C22

translations.english: The door up ahead will be locked. Klotha, one of the hagravens, will have the key on her.
translations.chinese: 前面的门会被锁上。其中一个叫柯罗莎的乌鸦鬼婆拿着钥匙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F517]

translations.english: Who are you? What do you want?
translations.chinese: 你是谁？你想干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F51E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who are you? What do you want? | ZH: 你是谁？你想干什么？ | SID: 00C2D8

translations.english: You're making me... nervous. Is there something you need?
translations.chinese: 你让我很……紧张。你有什么需要吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F51F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're making me... nervous. Is there something you need? | ZH: 你让我很……紧张。你有什么需要吗？ | SID: 006BFE

translations.english: Yes, yes. What is it? We're all very busy here...
translations.chinese: 是，是。怎么了？我们都很忙的……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F520]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, yes. What is it? We're all very busy here... | ZH: 是，是。怎么了？我们都很忙的…… | SID: 00C41B

translations.english: I'm really not in the mood. State your business, or take your leave.
translations.chinese: 我真的没心情。说明来意，要不然就走开。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F521]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm really not in the mood. State your business, or take your leave. | ZH: 我真的没心情。说明来意，要不然就走开。 | SID: 0087AB

translations.english: Let me guess - you have some "business" to discuss...
translations.chinese: 让我猜猜，你是有“生意”要做吧……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F522]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me guess - you have some "business" to discuss... | ZH: 让我猜猜，你是有“生意”要做吧…… | SID: 00943E

translations.english: Is the line for my next performance starting already? Come on, don't be shy. Plenty of room for everyone.
translations.chinese: 我下次演出的观众已经在排队了吗？来吧，别害羞。每个人都有位子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F523]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Is the line for my next performance starting already? Come on, don't be shy. Plenty of room for everyone. | ZH: 我下次演出的观众已经在排队了吗？来吧，别害羞。每个人都有位子。 | SID: 00156A

translations.english: As for me, I kept from you only what you were not yet ready to know. Are still not ready to know, as your question reveals.
translations.chinese: 至于我，我只是隐瞒了你还没准备好接受的事。你提出了问题，但还没有做好接受答案的准备。

translations.english: Do not be so sure about that. Beware - the Blades may claim to serve the Dragonborn, but they do not. They never have.
translations.chinese: 别那么肯定。你要小心，刀锋会号称服务于龙裔，但他们从没兑现。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F880]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: As for me, I kept from you only what you were not yet ready to know. Are still not ready to know, as your question reveals. | ZH: 至于我，我只是隐瞒了你还没准备好接受的事。你提出了问题，但还没有做好接受答案的准备。 | SID: 004267
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Do not be so sure about that. Beware - the Blades may claim to serve the Dragonborn, but they do not. They never have. | ZH: 别那么肯定。你要小心，刀锋会号称服务于龙裔，但他们从没兑现。 | SID: 00638B

translations.english: If you wish to stand alone, so be it. If you wish for our help, you'll answer my question.
translations.chinese: 你要是想独立也随你的便。如果希望得到我们的帮助，就回答我的问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F881]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you wish to stand alone, so be it. If you wish for our help, you'll answer my question. | ZH: 你要是想独立也随你的便。如果希望得到我们的帮助，就回答我的问题。 | SID: 00D527

translations.english: If the world is meant to end, so be it. Let it end and be reborn.
translations.chinese: 如果世界注定毁灭，那就顺其自然吧。让它结束、重生。

translations.english: Those who overthrew him in ancient times only postponed the day of reckoning, they did not stop it.
translations.chinese: 远古时期推翻他的人只是推迟了清算的到来，却没能阻止它。

translations.english: Perhaps not. But this Shout was used once before, was it not? And here we are again.
translations.chinese: 或许没有。但这个龙吼不是曾经有过一次吗？现在我们又要用了。

translations.english: Have you considered that Alduin was not meant to be defeated?
translations.chinese: 你有没有想过？奥杜因不是注定要被打败。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Those who overthrew him in ancient times only postponed the day of reckoning, they did not stop it. | ZH: 远古时期推翻他的人只是推迟了清算的到来，却没能阻止它。 | SID: 0037F3

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Have you considered that Alduin was not meant to be defeated? | ZH: 你有没有想过？奥杜因不是注定要被打败。 | SID: 00FDF9

translations.english: Keep moving, stay focused on your goal, and you will reach the summit.
translations.chinese: 勇往直前，专注目标，你终将登上顶峰。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F888]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Keep moving, stay focused on your goal, and you will reach the summit. | ZH: 勇往直前，专注目标，你终将登上顶峰。 | SID: 002930

translations.english: I am as my father Akatosh made me. As are you... Dovahkiin.
translations.chinese: 我父阿卡托什创造了我。如你一样……都瓦克因。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F88A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I am as my father Akatosh made me. As are you... Dovahkiin. | ZH: 我父阿卡托什创造了我。如你一样……都瓦克因。 | SID: 008553

translations.english: Drem Yol Lok. Greetings, wunduniik. I am Paarthurnax.
translations.chinese: 旦姆 约 洛克。你好，翁都尼克。我是帕图纳克斯。

translations.english: Who are you? What brings you to my strunmah... my mountain?
translations.chinese: 你是何人？为何来到我的斯特伦玛……我的山上？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F88B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Drem Yol Lok. Greetings, wunduniik. I am Paarthurnax. | ZH: 旦姆 约 洛克。你好，翁都尼克。我是帕图纳克斯。 | SID: 0065EA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Who are you? What brings you to my strunmah... my mountain? | ZH: 你是何人？为何来到我的斯特伦玛……我的山上？ | SID: 00A06A

translations.english: It has been long since I held tinvaak with a stranger. I gave in to the temptation to prolong our speech.
translations.chinese: 我已经很久没有和陌生人汀瓦克。我确实忍不了多谈一会儿的诱惑了。

translations.english: Yes. Vahzah. You speak true, Dovahkiin. Forgive me.
translations.chinese: 没错。瓦扎。你说的对，都瓦克因。请原谅我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F88C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It has been long since I held tinvaak with a stranger. I gave in to the temptation to prolong our speech. | ZH: 我已经很久没有和陌生人汀瓦克。我确实忍不了多谈一会儿的诱惑了。 | SID: 003244
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes. Vahzah. You speak true, Dovahkiin. Forgive me. | ZH: 没错。瓦扎。你说的对，都瓦克因。请原谅我。 | SID: 009A28

translations.english: Perhaps we would have dragon allies against Alduin if the ancient Blades had not acted so arrogantly.
translations.chinese: 如果当年的刀锋会没有表现得如此傲慢，我们或许还能找到龙族盟友一起对抗奥杜因。

translations.english: But stopping Alduin is one thing. Helping you wipe out dragons again is quite another.
translations.chinese: 但阻止奥杜因和帮你重新消灭龙族，两者不可混为一谈。

translations.english: Dragons are part of the natural order of the world. The Blades thought to change the order to suit themselves, by wiping out the dragons.
translations.chinese: 龙族乃世间自然秩序的一部分。刀锋会企图通过灭绝龙族，使秩序适应自己。

translations.english: But again, we see that the natural order will be restored, one way or another.
translations.chinese: 但是，我们会看到自然秩序以其他方式重新恢复。

translations.english: That may be what you are here for, Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 这也许是你来此的原因，龙裔。

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: Perhaps we would have dragon allies against Alduin if the ancient Blades had not acted so arrogantly. | ZH: 如果当年的刀锋会没有表现得如此傲慢，我们或许还能找到龙族盟友一起对抗奥杜因。 | SID: 001120
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: But stopping Alduin is one thing. Helping you wipe out dragons again is quite another. | ZH: 但阻止奥杜因和帮你重新消灭龙族，两者不可混为一谈。 | SID: 0039B4

- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: That may be what you are here for, Dragonborn. | ZH: 这也许是你来此的原因，龙裔。 | SID: 00D99C

translations.english: They see me as master. Wuth. Onik. Old and wise. It is true I am old...
translations.chinese: 他们把我视为老师。乌斯。欧尼克。年长而睿智。我确实年长一些……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F88E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: They see me as master. Wuth. Onik. Old and wise. It is true I am old... | ZH: 他们把我视为老师。乌斯。欧尼克。年长而睿智。我确实年长一些…… | SID: 00A0A8

translations.english: What would you ask of me?
translations.chinese: 你来找我干什么？

translations.english: So. You have made your way here, to me. No easy task for a joor... mortal. Even for one of Dovah Sos. Dragonblood.
translations.chinese: 所以。你来到这里，到我身边。这对约尔……凡人来说很不容易。即使你拥有都瓦 索斯，龙血。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: What would you ask of me? | ZH: 你来找我干什么？ | SID: 0065C8

translations.english: Drem. Patience. There are formalities which must be observed, at the first meeting of two of the dov.
translations.chinese: 旦姆。耐心点。两个都瓦的初次会面有些需要遵守一些礼节。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F890]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Drem. Patience. There are formalities which must be observed, at the first meeting of two of the dov. | ZH: 旦姆。耐心点。两个都瓦的初次会面有些需要遵守一些礼节。 | SID: 0078E0

translations.english: Where did you learn of a Shout used to defeat Alduin?
translations.chinese: 你从哪知道的龙吼能打败奥杜因？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F891]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Where did you learn of a Shout used to defeat Alduin? | ZH: 你从哪知道的龙吼能打败奥杜因？ | SID: 003B3C

translations.english: No. I cannot teach it to you because I do not know it.
translations.chinese: 不，我教不了你，因为我也不会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F892]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. I cannot teach it to you because I do not know it. | ZH: 不，我教不了你，因为我也不会。 | SID: 003D18

translations.english: True... But qostiid - prophecy - tells what may be, not what should be.
translations.chinese: 没错……但是科斯提德，预言，只是说可能发生什么，而不是应该发生什么。

translations.english: Do you have no better reason for acting than destiny? Are you nothing but a plaything of dez... of fate?
translations.chinese: 你就没有比使命更好的理由了吗？你只是德兹……命运的玩物？

translations.english: Qostiid sahlo aak. Just because you can do a thing, does not always mean you should.
translations.chinese: 科斯提德 撒洛 阿克。只是说你能做，而不意味着你该做。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Do you have no better reason for acting than destiny? Are you nothing but a plaything of dez... of fate? | ZH: 你就没有比使命更好的理由了吗？你只是德兹……命运的玩物？ | SID: 007F5B

translations.english: Dreh ni nahkip. Discipline against the lesser aids in qahnaar... denial of the greater.
translations.chinese: 德莱 尼 纳吉普。约束小念有助于洽纳尔……克制大欲。

translations.english: Evenaar bahlok. There are many hungers it is better to deny than to feed.
translations.chinese: 伊文那 巴洛克。有些欲望，与其满足不如克制。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Not until introductions are complete. Zin. Heyv. Test your Thu'um against mine, Dovahkiin!
translations.chinese: 介绍到此为止吧。金，海夫。试着用你的吐'目攻击我吧，都瓦克因！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F9E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not until introductions are complete. Zin. Heyv. Test your Thu'um against mine, Dovahkiin! | ZH: 介绍到此为止吧。金，海夫。试着用你的吐'目攻击我吧，都瓦克因！ | SID: 0016B4

translations.english: You are bold, wunduniik. You dare enter a Dovah's home without permission.
translations.chinese: 翁都尼克，你很勇敢。胆敢擅闯都瓦的家。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003F9E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You are bold, wunduniik. You dare enter a Dovah's home without permission. | ZH: 翁都尼克，你很勇敢。胆敢擅闯都瓦的家。 | SID: 008535

translations.english: Perhaps this world is simply the Egg of the next kalpa? Lein vokiin? Would you stop the next world from being born?
translations.chinese: 或许此世不过是孕育来劫之卵？ 雷恩 沃克因？ 你要阻止下一个世界的诞生吗？

translations.english: Some would say that all things must end, so that the next can come to pass.
translations.chinese: 有人可能会说，只有一切终结，新世才会到来。

translations.english: Pruzah. As good a reason as any. There are many who feel as you do, although not all.
translations.chinese: 如扎。好理由。很多人与你同感，但并不是人人如此。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Krosis. No. I know little of what has passed below in the long years I have lived here.
translations.chinese: 科洛西斯。不。我独居高山，不通世事久矣。

translations.english: You are likely better informed than I.
translations.chinese: 你应该比我了解情况。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003FA3D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Krosis. No. I know little of what has passed below in the long years I have lived here. | ZH: 科洛西斯。不。我独居高山，不通世事久矣。 | SID: 002946
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You are likely better informed than I. | ZH: 你应该比我了解情况。 | SID: 00EAD4

translations.english: This is the most sacred mountain in Skyrim. Zok revak strunmah. The great mountain of the world.
translations.chinese: 这里是天际最神圣的山峰。佐克 瑞瓦克 斯特朗马。世界之最高峰。

translations.english: Here the ancient Tongues, the first mortal masters of the Voice, brought Alduin to battle and defeated him.
translations.chinese: 在这里，古发声者，第一批凡人吼声大师，与奥杜因大战并击败了他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003FA3E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This is the most sacred mountain in Skyrim. Zok revak strunmah. The great mountain of the world. | ZH: 这里是天际最神圣的山峰。佐克 瑞瓦克 斯特朗马。世界之最高峰。 | SID: 009F84

translations.english: Do you know why I live here, at the peak of the Monahven - what you name Throat of the World?
translations.chinese: 知道我为什么住在莫纳文……你们所说的世界之喉的山顶吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you know why I live here, at the peak of the Monahven - what you name Throat of the World? | ZH: 知道我为什么住在莫纳文……你们所说的世界之喉的山顶吗？ | SID: 004486

translations.english: You would not come all this way for tinvaak with an old dovah. No. You seek your weapon against Alduin.
translations.chinese: 你不是大老远赶来和我这个老都瓦汀瓦克的。对，你是来寻找对付奥杜因的武器。

translations.english: Ah. I have expected you. Prodah.
translations.chinese: 啊，我一直在等你。普洛达。

translations.english: Can you teach me the Dragonrend Shout?
translations.chinese: 你能教我“龙魂撕裂”龙吼吗？

translations.english: I was far from here on the day of Alduin's downfall. But all dov felt the... sundering of Time itself.
translations.chinese: 奥杜因落败那天，我离这很远。但所有都瓦都能感觉到……时间本身的撕裂。

translations.english: Yes. There were a few of us that rebelled against Alduin's thur... his tyranny. We aided the humans in his overthrow.
translations.chinese: 没错。我们的一部分起来反抗奥杜因的苏尔……他的暴政。我们帮助人类去推翻他。

translations.english: But they did not trust us. Ni ov. Their inner councils were kept hidden from us.
translations.chinese: 但他们不相信我们。尼沃。他们的内部会议是瞒着我们的。

translations.english: The dov are children of Akatosh. Thus we are specially... attuned to the flow of Time. Perhaps also uniquely vulnerable.
translations.chinese: 都瓦是阿卡托什的孩子。因此我们特别……适应时间的流动。或许也对此特别脆弱。

translations.english: Vomindok. I do not know. Perhaps in the very doing they erased the knowing of it from Time itself.
translations.chinese: 沃米都克。我不知道。或许正是在这个过程里，他们从时间本身抹去了对它的认识。

translations.english: I warned them against such a rash action. Even I could not foresee its consequences. Nust ni hon. They would not listen.
translations.chinese: 我曾经警告他们不要鲁莽行事。连我也无法预见其后果。努斯特 尼 翁。他们没有听进去。

translations.english: I cannot tell you in detail. I never heard it used. Kogaan. It was the first Thu'um created solely by mortals.
translations.chinese: 我也无法详说。我从未听谁使用过。克甘。这是第一个完全由凡人创造的吐'目。

translations.english: It was said to force a dragon to experience the concept of Mortality. A truly vonmindoraan... incomprehensible idea to the immortal dov.
translations.chinese: 据说它能迫使龙体验凡性的概念。一个对正牌都瓦来说，真正沃米多安……难以理解的想法。

translations.english: The Lorekeeper at the College of Winterhold might know.
translations.chinese: 冬堡学院的知识管理者或许知道。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003FA44]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: The Lorekeeper at the College of Winterhold might know. | ZH: 冬堡学院的知识管理者或许知道。 | SID: 0095C2

translations.english: It was the Kel - the Elder Scroll. They used it to... cast him adrift on the currents of Time.
translations.chinese: 他们用了科尔——上古卷轴……把他放逐到了时间的洪流中。

translations.english: Yes and no. Viik nuz ni kron. Alduin was not truly defeated, either. If he was, you would not be here today, seeking to... defeat him.
translations.chinese: 是也不是。威科 努兹 尼 科隆。奥杜因没有被真的击败。不然你也不会在这里，尝试……击败他。

translations.english: The Nords of those days used the Dragonrend Shout to cripple Alduin. But this was not enough. Ok mulaag unslaad.
translations.chinese: 当年的诺德人用龙魂撕裂重创了奥杜因。但是还不够。欧克 姆拉格 安斯拉德。

translations.english: Drem. Patience. I am answering, in my way.
translations.chinese: 旦姆。耐心点。我在，用我的方式回答。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003FA47]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Drem. Patience. I am answering, in my way. | ZH: 旦姆。耐心点。我在，用我的方式回答。 | SID: 00C4E7

translations.english: True. But few now remember that this was the very spot where Alduin was defeated by the ancient Tongues.
translations.chinese: 没错。但现在的人快忘了，这里就是奥杜因被古代发声者们击败的地方。

translations.english: Vahrukt unslaad... perhaps none but me now remember how he was defeated.
translations.chinese: 瓦鲁科特 安斯拉德……或许只有我还记得他如何失败。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Vahrukt unslaad... perhaps none but me now remember how he was defeated. | ZH: 瓦鲁科特 安斯拉德……或许只有我还记得他如何失败。 | SID: 005A6E

translations.english: If you brought that Kel, that Elder Scroll back here... to the Tiid-Ahraan, the Time-Wound...
translations.chinese: 如果你把那个科尔，上古卷轴带回这个……提德-阿兰，时之痕……

translations.english: Tiid krent. Time was... shattered here because of what the ancient Nords did to Alduin.
translations.chinese: 提德 克伦特。因为古诺德人对奥杜因的所作所为，这里的时间是……破碎的。

translations.english: With the Elder Scroll that was used to break Time, you may be able to... cast yourself back. To the other end of the break.
translations.chinese: 上古卷轴可以打破时间，你也许就能……把自己送到时间伤痕的另一端。

translations.english: You could learn Dragonrend from those who created it.
translations.chinese: 你就能从创造者那里学到龙魂撕裂了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Save the niceties for now. I have no intention of getting invested in someone who may be dead tomorrow.
translations.chinese: 废话就不说了。我不打算在明天就可能死掉的人身上投资。

translations.english: If you're still breathing in a few weeks, I'm sure we'll be the best of friends.
translations.chinese: 如果你过几周还能活蹦乱跳，那咱们肯定能成为最好的朋友。

agentText:

translations.english: But who knows? I've been proven wrong before.
translations.chinese: 但谁又知道呢？我以前也被证明犯过错。

translations.english: Ooh, cocky.
translations.chinese: 哦，很自大嘛。

translations.english: I give you three days before you screw up and someone runs a knife across your throat.
translations.chinese: 当你搞砸一切然后被人一刀割喉前，给你三天跑路。

translations.english: That may work for your targets, but you'll find I'm not so easily impressed.
translations.chinese: 这对你的目标有效，但我可没那么容易动摇。

translations.english: Ahh, going for the mysterious and brooding thing, hmm?
translations.chinese: 啊，神秘而深沉啊？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You've got people to kill, my friend. Best get to it.
translations.chinese: 你还有人要去杀呢，朋友。最好赶快去。

translations.english: Wind guide you.
translations.chinese: 愿风指引你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003FAF6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wind guide you. | ZH: 愿风指引你。 | SID: 00E7FC

translations.english: Breath and focus.
translations.chinese: 调整呼吸，精神集中。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003FAF8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Breath and focus. | ZH: 调整呼吸，精神集中。 | SID: 001D7A

translations.english: Morthal used to be a quiet place. But then, the world used to make sense.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔曾经是个安静的地方。但是，那时这世界还是讲道理的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You ask me, we'd be better off without that wizard in town.
translations.chinese: 要我说，如果镇上没有那个巫师，我们会过得更好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0003FE0E]

translations.english: This isn't the time or place for magic, or whatever it is Falion does.
translations.chinese: 对于魔法还有法利昂的所作所为来说，现在都不是恰当的时间地点。

agentText:

translations.english: So the Blades have survived yet another disaster of their own making, and continue to meddle in things they do not understand.
translations.chinese: 刀锋会在他们自己引来的灾难中幸存下来，就又来干涉他们不了解的事情。

translations.english: Looks like the boss is at it again.
translations.chinese: 看来是老大又开始了。

agentText:

EDID: [0004000B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Looks like the boss is at it again. | ZH: 看来是老大又开始了。 | SID: 00E9F3

translations.english: Don't say that to loud, you don't want it getting back to him.
translations.chinese: 别说那么大声，你不想让他听到。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004000C]
Translations:

translations.english: Why? What's he doing now?
translations.chinese: 为什么？他现在在干嘛？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004000D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Why? What's he doing now? | ZH: 为什么？他现在在干嘛？ | SID: 009A0E

translations.english: He's on one of his drunk rants again. Except this time he's challenging everyone to a duel over in the hole.
translations.chinese: 他又在耍酒疯了。只不过这次他要跟所有人在洞里决斗。

agentText:

EDID: [0004000E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He's on one of his drunk rants again. Except this time he's challenging everyone to a duel over in the hole. | ZH: 他又在耍酒疯了。只不过这次他要跟所有人在洞里决斗。 | SID: 00FB3E

translations.english: We've got him locked in there now, but he's still challenging anyone that looks crooked at him.
translations.chinese: 我们已经把他锁在里面了。但他还是要挑战那些敢不拿正眼瞧他的人。

translations.english: Someone should let that cat lose. That'd shut him up real quick.
translations.chinese: 应该赶紧有人把那只猫打败，这样他就能闭嘴了。

translations.english: What in the world was that racket? Is everything all right?
translations.chinese: 刚才是什么声音？一切还好吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00040118]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What in the world was that racket? Is everything all right? | ZH: 刚才是什么声音？一切还好吗？ | SID: 00C2ED

translations.english: Anything! Anything at all that might be of interest. That's why I adore this location... we have no idea what we're going to find.
translations.chinese: 任何东西都可以！任何你感兴趣的东西。这就是为什么我很喜欢这个地方了……我们不知道能发现什么。

translations.english: And if, along the way, my message about the dangers of magic should happen to sink in for a few students, that would be a happy coincidence.
translations.chinese: 而且，如果在过程中，有学生能理解我讲的魔法危险，也不错。

translations.english: You found what?
translations.chinese: 你找到了什么？

translations.english: I suppose you'd better show that to Tolfdir nonetheless. And please, ask before tampering with anything else.
translations.chinese: 我想你最好还是给托夫迪尔看看吧。在动别的东西之前，请先问一声。

translations.english: Hmm. Well now. This is all very fascinating, but I don't recall asking to you to touch anything in here.
translations.chinese: 嗯。好吧。这些东西确实很迷人，但我好像没允许你碰任何东西吧。

agentText:

translations.english: We're particularly interested in the prevalence of magical seals placed on the tombs here. It's rather unlike anything we've encountered.
translations.chinese: 我们最感兴趣的就是这些墓葬上的魔法封印。这和我们见过的都不一样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I'm not exactly built for manual labor. Now come on, you've almost got it.
translations.chinese: 我可不是干体力活的料。快点吧，你快成功了。

translations.chinese: 快点，纳兹尔！我告诉你了，他就在里面！

translations.english: I'm going... as fast... as I can, you stupid she-devil. I don't see you... helping...
translations.chinese: 我……已经……尽可能……快了，你个笨蛋女魔头。你就……不能……帮一把……

translations.english: You're telling me.
translations.chinese: 我知道。

translations.english: Tough luck.
translations.chinese: 真不走运啊。

translations.english: Oh, really? So that Dark Elf took my ring. So typical of his kind.
translations.chinese: 哦，真的？所以是那个暗精灵拿了我的戒指。他们就是这样的人。

translations.english: You deserve something for sniffing out that thief. Here.
translations.chinese: 你揪出了小偷，应该得到报酬。拿着吧。

translations.english: I think the Jarl should hear about this. Maybe double his taxes. No, triple them. That should teach those people a lesson.
translations.chinese: 我觉得应该把这事儿告诉领主。也许该收他两倍的税。不，三倍。让这些人好好涨涨记性。

translations.english: <Alias.ShortName=QuestGiver> gave me this ring. I think it's yours.
translations.chinese: <Alias.ShortName=QuestGiver>给了我这个戒指。我想这应该是你的。

translations.chinese: 有道理。

translations.english: I don't have time.
translations.chinese: 我没时间。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00040358]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I don't have time. | ZH: 我没时间。 | SID: 000F03

translations.english: Oh by Azura, I've made a terrible mistake. I bought a gold ring, and Viola Giordano has been missing a ring that looks just like it.
translations.chinese: 阿祖拉啊，我犯了大错了。我买了一个金戒指，然后维欧拉·乔尔丹诺就正好丢了一个跟它一模一样的。

translations.english: Of course nothing in here is stolen. Only a careless, shameful, idiotic fetcher would do something as stupid as to buy pilfered goods....
translations.chinese: 这里当然不卖赃物。只有粗心、可耻还愚蠢的费彻才会做出买卖赃物这种傻事……

translations.english: Nothing in here is stolen? Nothing at all?
translations.chinese: 这里没有赃物吧？没有吧？

translations.english: Be that as it may, we have no other choice. You need to remain unseen! Now go! Before they meet. And report back to me with whatever you learn.
translations.chinese: 虽然如此，但我们别无选择。你要保持不被发现！现在去吧！赶在他们见面前。有什么发现向我汇报。

translations.english: But that seems so... disrespectful.
translations.chinese: 但这似乎……很不敬啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00040361]

translations.english: You must understand. If Cicero is turning the others against me... against us... Our Family would not survive such division.
translations.chinese: 你必须明白。一旦西塞罗策动其他人反对我……反对我们……那我们的家庭是难以在分裂中幸存的。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

translations.english: So you understand my fear. If Cicero's planning something, and conspiring with one of our own, it would be disastrous.
translations.chinese: 你明白我的担忧就对了。如果西塞罗有什么企图，然后还和我们的人合谋，那就是灭顶之灾。

translations.english: By Sithis, we must stop them!
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上，我们必须阻止他们！

translations.english: Sorry, I thought Skald the Elder sent you. We've got an order to fill, and he's not known for patience.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，我以为是老斯卡德派你来的。我们有个订单，而且他没什么耐心。

translations.english: Look, if you're heading towards Dawnstar anytime soon, can you give the Jarl this note? Let him know he'll get his lumber.
translations.chinese: 那个，如果你最近要去晨星的话，能不能把这张字条交给领主？告诉他，木材肯定会到。

translations.english: "One of the Jarl's men"?
translations.chinese: “领主的手下”？

translations.english: Thank you. Thank you! Azura's Prophecy always guide you to fortune.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。谢谢！阿祖拉的预言会指引你发大财的。

translations.english: Speaking of fortune. Here. Everything I earned from my last shipment. It's yours.
translations.chinese: 说到财富。给，这是我上批货赚的钱。你的了。

translations.english: I placed <Alias.ShortName=Target>'s ring in her house.
translations.chinese: 我把<Alias.ShortName=Target>的戒指放她家里了。

translations.chinese: 谢谢。

translations.english: Sure. I'd be glad to help.
translations.chinese: 好啊。我很乐意帮忙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004037F]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Sure. I'd be glad to help. | ZH: 好啊。我很乐意帮忙。 | SID: 00B5BE

translations.english: It's not that easy. She'd go to the Jarl if she knew I was even remotely involved. You have to get it to her some other way.
translations.chinese: 没那么容易。要是她知道我和这事儿有半点干系，都会去报告领主的。你得想个别的办法还给她。

translations.english: Look, it's dangerous, but if you sneak the ring into her house. Put in a dresser or something. I will make it worth your while.
translations.chinese: 听着，虽然很危险，但你可以把戒指偷偷带进她家。放在类似梳妆台的地方。我不会让你白跑一趟的。

translations.english: I could return the ring for you.
translations.chinese: 我可以帮你把戒指还回去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00040389]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's not that easy. She'd go to the Jarl if she knew I was even remotely involved. You have to get it to her some other way. | ZH: 没那么容易。要是她知道我和这事儿有半点干系，都会去报告领主的。你得想个别的办法还给她。 | SID: 001FE8

translations.english: I'll look over this later. Why don't you take this, for your trouble?
translations.chinese: 我会稍后看看的。要不收下这些算是给你添麻烦了？

translations.english: Ah yes, Adonato's new work. Shorter than I expected, but words must be judged on merit, not length.
translations.chinese: 啊，对，是阿多纳托的新作品吧。比我想象的要短啊，但是评判作品的标准是价值而非长短。

translations.english: That wasn't a fair swing.
translations.chinese: 这根本不公平。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00040396]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That wasn't a fair swing. | ZH: 这根本不公平。 | SID: 005523

translations.english: Don't think I can take you? One hundred septims says I can punch you back where you came from.
translations.chinese: 你觉得我打不赢你？一百塞普汀，看我把你打出去。

translations.english: Don't like it? Too bad. This is our city. Ours!
translations.chinese: 不喜欢？那太糟了。这是我们的城市。我们的！

translations.english: I don't like your attitude.
translations.chinese: 我不喜欢你的态度。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00040397]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I don't like your attitude. | ZH: 我不喜欢你的态度。 | SID: 003C8A

translations.english: My axe is yours, outlander. Just say the word.
translations.chinese: 我的斧子算你的了，外来者。尽管开口就是。

translations.english: You'll come with me, then?
translations.chinese: 那你愿意和我一起去吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00040398]

translations.english: You. You a Dark Elf lover? Get out of our city, you filthy piece of trash.
translations.chinese: 你。你是个暗精灵支持者？滚出我们的城市吧，肮脏的垃圾。

translations.english: You damn gray-skin. Go back to Morrowind!
translations.chinese: 该死的灰皮。滚回晨风去吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004039B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You damn gray-skin. Go back to Morrowind! | ZH: 该死的灰皮。滚回晨风去吧！ | SID: 00E215

translations.english: All right. Fists only. And none of that magic stuff, either. Let's go!
translations.chinese: 好吧。只能用拳头。别用什么花里胡哨的魔法。来吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004039C]

translations.english: I said a hundred gold! Damn broke elves and damn broke elf-lovers.
translations.chinese: 我说的是一百金币！精灵和精灵支持者都是他妈的穷逼吗？

translations.english: Maybe so, but healthy paranoia has saved this Sanctuary before, and my gut's telling me that demented little fool is up to something.
translations.chinese: 或许吧，但有益的偏执曾经拯救过这个圣所。我的直觉告诉我，那个疯子小丑在密谋什么。

translations.english: Astrid, you're being a bit... paranoid.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德，你有点……多疑了。

translations.english: (Remain silent)

translations.english: They'll never think to check it. Who in their right mind would hide inside? Now go. Before they meet. And report back to me with whatever you learn.
translations.chinese: 他们绝不会检查那里的。哪有正常人会躲在里面？去吧。赶在他们见面前。有什么发现向我汇报。

translations.english: Yes, the coffin. It's perfect.
translations.chinese: 没错，棺材。好地方。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes, the coffin. It's perfect. | ZH: 没错，棺材。好地方。 | SID: 00A053

translations.chinese: 你这是问我？她答应说要派个靠谱的人的。

translations.english: If you actually want to get out alive, I'd bring whatever you need to move quietly, and kill quickly.
translations.chinese: 如果你真想活着出来，你就需要给我些能让你安静行动，迅速杀人的东西。

translations.english: So we fought them in the shadows, all across Tamriel. We thought we were more than a match for them. We were wrong.
translations.chinese: 因此我们与他们的争斗遍布泰姆瑞尔的暗处。我们曾自认远胜他们。可我们错了。

translations.english: Our Grand Master saw them as the greatest threat to Tamriel. At the time, that was true. Maybe it still is.
translations.chinese: 我们的大宗师认为他们是泰姆瑞尔最大的威胁。彼时他们名副其实，或许也遗祸至今了。

translations.english: Before the Great War, the Blades helped the Empire against the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 在浩大战争前，刀锋会就在帮助帝国反抗梭默。

translations.english: You'd do that for a stranger? I don't know what to say. Lead on, I suppose.
translations.chinese: 你会为一个陌生人做这些？我不知道该说什么好。那咱们走吧。

translations.english: I understand. Let me help you.
translations.chinese: 我明白。我来帮你。

translations.english: Hello? You! Over here! Please, I need help!
translations.chinese: 喂？那边的！在这儿！拜托，我需要帮助！

agentText:

translations.english: You'd really risk your life for a stranger's honor? I don't even know what to say. Thank you, my friend. I'll wait here.
translations.chinese: 你真的愿意为一个陌生人的名誉去冒生命危险？我都不知道该说什么了。谢谢你，朋友。我会在这里等。

translations.english: Don't be foolish. I'll do it.
translations.chinese: 别犯傻。我去办就好。

translations.english: Thank Kynareth for you, stranger. I'd almost given up hope of walking away from here.
translations.chinese: 愿凯娜瑞丝保佑你，陌生人。我几乎要放弃离开这里的希望了。

translations.english: Greetings.
translations.chinese: 你好。

translations.english: I just need a little to get going.
translations.chinese: 我只需要一点就能走了。

translations.english: I may have a potion to spare.
translations.chinese: 我这里有药水。

translations.english: Then you'll need to find Elenwen's office and search her files. Malborn should be able to point you in the right direction.
translations.chinese: 然后找到爱琳温的办公室，搜索她的文件。马伯恩会给你指路。

translations.english: That's when the fun starts. You'll have to slip away from the party without raising the alarm.
translations.chinese: 有趣的事从那就开始了。你得在不惊动别人的情况下溜出宴会。

translations.english: Inside, my friend, inside! Where only the women and drinks are cold.
translations.chinese: 到里面去，里面去，朋友！那里暖和的很，只有女人和酒是冷的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041030]

translations.english: Awful damn cold up here. And only the guests are allowed inside. Damn foreigners and their inhospitable ways.
translations.chinese: 这里太冷了。而且只有客人才允许进入。倒霉的外地佬就是这么不友好。

agentText:

translations.english: What are you out here talking to me for? Party's inside.
translations.chinese: 咱们干嘛在外头聊？宴会在屋里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004106F]

translations.english: I'm paid to wait to take you home. Enjoy yourself.
translations.chinese: 我受雇送您回家。请享受宴会吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410D2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm paid to wait to take you home. Enjoy yourself. | ZH: 我受雇送您回家。请享受宴会吧。 | SID: 00AB03

translations.english: The lady's already paid the fee. We leave when she gives the word.
translations.chinese: 那位女士已经付过钱了。她一吩咐我们就走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410D3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The lady's already paid the fee. We leave when she gives the word. | ZH: 那位女士已经付过钱了。她一吩咐我们就走。 | SID: 0086CE

translations.english: Let me handle that. You'll have a real invitation, don't worry. As long as you can act the part of a Thalmor toady, you'll get past the guards.
translations.chinese: 交给我吧。别担心，你会收到货真价实的请柬。你只要能演好拍梭默马屁的玩意儿，就能骗过守卫。

translations.english: Since then, they've been working to weaken the Empire any way they can.
translations.chinese: 从那以后，他们就想方设法削弱帝国。

translations.english: They're the high elves that rule the Aldmeri Dominion. Sworn enemies of the Empire and everything it stands for.
translations.chinese: 他们是统治先祖神洲的高精灵。帝国与帝国所代表之一切的死敌。

translations.english: Thirty years ago, they invaded the Empire and came close to destroying it. They smashed the Blades in the process.
translations.chinese: 三十年前，他们入侵并差点摧毁了帝国。在战争中他们消灭了刀锋会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410D7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Since then, they've been working to weaken the Empire any way they can. | ZH: 从那以后，他们就想方设法削弱帝国。 | SID: 002604
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: They're the high elves that rule the Aldmeri Dominion. Sworn enemies of the Empire and everything it stands for. | ZH: 他们是统治先祖神洲的高精灵。帝国与帝国所代表之一切的死敌。 | SID: 00C521
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Thirty years ago, they invaded the Empire and came close to destroying it. They smashed the Blades in the process. | ZH: 三十年前，他们入侵并差点摧毁了帝国。在战争中他们消灭了刀锋会。 | SID: 00E04A

translations.english: What? Something you're still confused about?
translations.chinese: 怎么了？你还在困惑些什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? Something you're still confused about? | ZH: 怎么了？你还在困惑些什么？ | SID: 00E729

translations.english: Not here. Downstairs.
translations.chinese: 不在这。去楼下说。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410D9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not here. Downstairs. | ZH: 不在这。去楼下说。 | SID: 00BE8E

translations.english: Of course. Just bring it to me when you find it.
translations.chinese: 没问题。您找到了交给我就行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. Just bring it to me when you find it. | ZH: 没问题。您找到了交给我就行。 | SID: 00683D

translations.english: Luckily they don't know who he really is, or he wouldn't be serving drinks at the Ambassador's parties.
translations.chinese: 不过所幸他们不知道他的底细，不然也不会安排他在宴会上招待客人了。

translations.english: He's a wood elf - the Thalmor wiped out his family back in Valenwood during one of their purges that we never hear about.
translations.chinese: 他是个木精灵。梭默在一次我们根本没听说过的清洗行动中在威伦森林杀害了他的家人。

translations.english: Don't worry about Malborn. He's not a dangerous character like you, but he hates the Thalmor at least as much as I do.
translations.chinese: 别怀疑马伯恩。他虽然不像你那样危险，但至少他跟我一样憎恨梭默。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Luckily they don't know who he really is, or he wouldn't be serving drinks at the Ambassador's parties. | ZH: 不过所幸他们不知道他的底细，不然也不会安排他在宴会上招待客人了。 | SID: 004EED
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He's a wood elf - the Thalmor wiped out his family back in Valenwood during one of their purges that we never hear about. | ZH: 他是个木精灵。梭默在一次我们根本没听说过的清洗行动中在威伦森林杀害了他的家人。 | SID: 007612
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Don't worry about Malborn. He's not a dangerous character like you, but he hates the Thalmor at least as much as I do. | ZH: 别怀疑马伯恩。他虽然不像你那样危险，但至少他跟我一样憎恨梭默。 | SID: 00B001

translations.english: The Thalmor take the arrogance of high elves to the extreme - they believe they are the rightful rulers of all of Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 梭默把高精灵的傲慢发挥到了极致，他们相信自己是全泰姆瑞尔的合法统治者。

translations.english: For a century or more, the Thalmor had been picking away at the Empire. Valenwood was the first, then the province of Elsweyr.
translations.chinese: 一个多世纪以来，梭默不断蚕食帝国领土，先是威伦森林，接着是艾斯维尔。

translations.english: They're the rulers of the Aldmeri Dominion - what used to be the Imperial provinces of Summerset Isle and Valenwood.
translations.chinese: 他们是先祖神洲的统治者。先祖神洲由原帝国省份的夏暮岛和威伦森林组成。

translations.english: But even the Blades didn't see the Great War coming. We underestimated the Thalmor, and they destroyed us.
translations.chinese: 但即使是刀锋会也没有预见浩大战争的到来。我们低估了梭默，被他们摧毁了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000410FA]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: But even the Blades didn't see the Great War coming. We underestimated the Thalmor, and they destroyed us. | ZH: 但即使是刀锋会也没有预见浩大战争的到来。我们低估了梭默，被他们摧毁了。 | SID: 00E06A

translations.english: So that's your plan, huh? Even if you could survive, by the time you got inside, whatever documents they had would be long gone.
translations.chinese: 你就这点打算？就算你活着进去了，他们的文件也早就销毁了。

translations.chinese: 她带着她所谓的“幻象”躲在里面。我们需要的是领袖，不是神婆。

translations.chinese: 我怎么能够信任呢？

translations.english: And now there's talk of rebellion, and dragons? What help could Idgrod be against them?
translations.chinese: 现在又说有叛乱，还有巨龙？艾德格洛德能帮上忙吗？

translations.english: No, we can only rely on ourselves. You'd do well to remember that.
translations.chinese: 不能，我们只能依靠自己。你最好记住这一点。

translations.english: She never speaks with us. She's allowed this wizard, Falion, to live in our midst practicing gods-know-what.
translations.chinese: 她从不和我们说话。还允许那个叫法利昂的巫师住在我们身边做些天知道的事。

translations.chinese: 没错。我让佛可找你回来就是因为你在召唤仪式上和波特玛建立了联系。你必须去对付她。

translations.chinese: 你自己走吧。我需要一个人静静。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004172D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go on without me. I think I need to be alone for a while. | ZH: 你自己走吧。我需要一个人静静。 | SID: 003F9D

translations.english: You've been at it for five minutes. Here, let me try.
translations.chinese: 你都耗了五分钟了。躲开，换我来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000418F4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've been at it for five minutes. Here, let me try. | ZH: 你都耗了五分钟了。躲开，换我来。 | SID: 007934

translations.english: I think I almost got it.
translations.chinese: 我觉得我快成功了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000418F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I think I almost got it. | ZH: 我觉得我快成功了。 | SID: 0062F5

translations.english: Come on, just open.
translations.chinese: 来吧，打开吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000418F7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on, just open. | ZH: 来吧，打开吧。 | SID: 00015E

translations.english: I can't get it open.
translations.chinese: 我打不开。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000418F8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't get it open. | ZH: 我打不开。 | SID: 005C81

translations.english: Thank you, sir. Go right in.
translations.chinese: 谢谢先生。请进。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041CDD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you, sir. Go right in. | ZH: 谢谢先生。请进。 | SID: 000695

translations.english: Thank you, ma'am. Go right in.
translations.chinese: 谢谢女士。请进。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041CE2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you, ma'am. Go right in. | ZH: 谢谢女士。请进。 | SID: 001FBE

translations.english: Here, I want you to have this. It was my father's but I'm certain you'll put it to good use.
translations.chinese: 收下吧，我想把这个送给你。我父亲留下的，但你一定会好好利用的。

translations.english: I think things are going to be a lot different around here from now on and I have you to thank for it.
translations.chinese: 这里肯定会有很大改观的。多亏了你。

translations.english: Oh I know. Isn't it wonderful? I bet she squirmed like a skeever when you pulled them out of your pocket.
translations.chinese: 哦，我知道了。很棒吧？我敢说你把东西从口袋里拿出来的时候，她肯定紧张得像个恶鼠一样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E09]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here, I want you to have this. It was my father's but I'm certain you'll put it to good use. | ZH: 收下吧，我想把这个送给你。我父亲留下的，但你一定会好好利用的。 | SID: 000970
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I think things are going to be a lot different around here from now on and I have you to thank for it. | ZH: 这里肯定会有很大改观的。多亏了你。 | SID: 0027C1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh I know. Isn't it wonderful? I bet she squirmed like a skeever when you pulled them out of your pocket. | ZH: 哦，我知道了。很棒吧？我敢说你把东西从口袋里拿出来的时候，她肯定紧张得像个恶鼠一样。 | SID: 009F3E

translations.english: Yeah, you're right. Maybe it's not the best idea.
translations.chinese: 哎，你说得对。也许这不是个好主意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E0B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah, you're right. Maybe it's not the best idea. | ZH: 哎，你说得对。也许这不是个好主意。 | SID: 000532

translations.english: Then just confront Haelga with them and the rest works itself out.
translations.chinese: 然后只需要拿着它们跟哈尔嘉对质，一切就迎刃而解了。

translations.english: You need to get the Marks of Dibella from Bolli, Hofgrir and Indaryn. Not sure how you're going to do that, but try your best.
translations.chinese: 你得从波利、霍夫吉尔和印达林手里拿到迪贝拉印记。不知道你该怎么做，但请你努力试试吧。

translations.english: Oh, this is going to be great!
translations.chinese: 哦，太棒了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E0C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Then just confront Haelga with them and the rest works itself out. | ZH: 然后只需要拿着它们跟哈尔嘉对质，一切就迎刃而解了。 | SID: 00164A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You need to get the Marks of Dibella from Bolli, Hofgrir and Indaryn. Not sure how you're going to do that, but try your best. | ZH: 你得从波利、霍夫吉尔和印达林手里拿到迪贝拉印记。不知道你该怎么做，但请你努力试试吧。 | SID: 0084CD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh, this is going to be great! | ZH: 哦，太棒了！ | SID: 00F532

translations.english: I got mine off of a merchant ship in Solitude. Worst mistake I ever made.
translations.chinese: 我是在独孤城的一艘商船上找到的。这是我犯过最严重的错误。

translations.english: The Dunmer came up with the stuff a long time ago. Very illegal and very hard to come by.
translations.chinese: 是丹莫很久前想出来的。属于严重违禁品，很难找得到。

translations.english: I'm not sure what it's made from, but I can tell you that once you've had a taste, you'll never crave anything else.
translations.chinese: 我不确定它是什么做的，但我可以告诉你，一旦尝过，你就再也不想吃其他东西了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E0D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I got mine off of a merchant ship in Solitude. Worst mistake I ever made. | ZH: 我是在独孤城的一艘商船上找到的。这是我犯过最严重的错误。 | SID: 008469
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The Dunmer came up with the stuff a long time ago. Very illegal and very hard to come by. | ZH: 是丹莫很久前想出来的。属于严重违禁品，很难找得到。 | SID: 00FBA6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'm not sure what it's made from, but I can tell you that once you've had a taste, you'll never crave anything else. | ZH: 我不确定它是什么做的，但我可以告诉你，一旦尝过，你就再也不想吃其他东西了。 | SID: 00FF26

translations.english: Good. Now get going.
translations.chinese: 好，现在就走吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E0E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Now get going. | ZH: 好，现在就走吧。 | SID: 001BBF

translations.english: That would be a bad idea. I'd be too likely to attract the wrong kind of attention. But they don't know you at all, yet.
translations.chinese: 这主意不好。我去了会引起不必要的注意。而他们还没认出你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E15]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That would be a bad idea. I'd be too likely to attract the wrong kind of attention. But they don't know you at all, yet. | ZH: 这主意不好。我去了会引起不必要的注意。而他们还没认出你。 | SID: 00C3E0

translations.english: Bolli is a good man, he pays us well and watches out for us.
translations.chinese: 波利是个好人，他付的钱很多，很照顾我们。

translations.english: I used to work at the Black-Briar Meadery, but Indaryn and I never saw eye-to-eye. That elf has no patience at all.
translations.chinese: 我以前在黑棘蜜酒庄工作，但是印达林和我向来看不对眼。那个精灵一点耐心都没有。

translations.english: It's probably for the best anyway; I'm far better at fishing than working in a meadery.
translations.chinese: 反正现在可能是最好的，比起蜜酒庄，我更擅长钓鱼。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E16]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Bolli is a good man, he pays us well and watches out for us. | ZH: 波利是个好人，他付的钱很多，很照顾我们。 | SID: 000EA4
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I used to work at the Black-Briar Meadery, but Indaryn and I never saw eye-to-eye. That elf has no patience at all. | ZH: 我以前在黑棘蜜酒庄工作，但是印达林和我向来看不对眼。那个精灵一点耐心都没有。 | SID: 009D56
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It's probably for the best anyway; I'm far better at fishing than working in a meadery. | ZH: 反正现在可能是最好的，比起蜜酒庄，我更擅长钓鱼。 | SID: 00EC5D

translations.english: A word of advice, keep away from the Keep and the city guards. They follow their own path and have already forsaken Her.
translations.chinese: 给你个建议，离堡垒和卫兵远点。他们走上了自己的路，已经离弃了她。

translations.english: Almost anyone in Riften is in dire need of those missives. Speak to them, child. You will know who will listen and who will sin.
translations.chinese: 裂谷城几乎所有人都急需这些册子。跟他们谈谈，孩子。你会知道谁会倾听，谁会犯罪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E19]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: A word of advice, keep away from the Keep and the city guards. They follow their own path and have already forsaken Her. | ZH: 给你个建议，离堡垒和卫兵远点。他们走上了自己的路，已经离弃了她。 | SID: 00884B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Almost anyone in Riften is in dire need of those missives. Speak to them, child. You will know who will listen and who will sin. | ZH: 裂谷城几乎所有人都急需这些册子。跟他们谈谈，孩子。你会知道谁会倾听，谁会犯罪。 | SID: 00F7AF

translations.english: They can defile our shrine, they can arrest our people and they can silence our voices, but the Empire will never destroy our spirit.
translations.chinese: 他们可以玷污我们的神龛，可以逮捕我们的人民，可以压制我们的声音，但帝国永远不会摧毁我们的精神。

translations.english: Now that the Imperial blight has poisoned Riften, the worship of Talos is strictly forbidden by the terms of the White-Gold Concordat.
translations.chinese: 现在帝国的瘟毒已经毒害了裂谷城，对塔洛斯的崇拜也被白金协定的条款严格禁止。

translations.english: As long as we keep Talos in our heart, his legacy will never die.
translations.chinese: 只要我们把塔洛斯铭记于心，他的遗产就永远不会消失。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E1A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They can defile our shrine, they can arrest our people and they can silence our voices, but the Empire will never destroy our spirit. | ZH: 他们可以玷污我们的神龛，可以逮捕我们的人民，可以压制我们的声音，但帝国永远不会摧毁我们的精神。 | SID: 00124D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Now that the Imperial blight has poisoned Riften, the worship of Talos is strictly forbidden by the terms of the White-Gold Concordat. | ZH: 现在帝国的瘟毒已经毒害了裂谷城，对塔洛斯的崇拜也被白金协定的条款严格禁止。 | SID: 006243
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: As long as we keep Talos in our heart, his legacy will never die. | ZH: 只要我们把塔洛斯铭记于心，他的遗产就永远不会消失。 | SID: 0073DD

translations.english: Very well. I suppose I'll just curl up somewhere until this passes as usual.
translations.chinese: 好吧，我还是找个地方蜷缩起来，直到一切都像往常一样过去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E20]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Very well. I suppose I'll just curl up somewhere until this passes as usual. | ZH: 好吧，我还是找个地方蜷缩起来，直到一切都像往常一样过去吧。 | SID: 0099B4

translations.english: What? How... where did you get these?
translations.chinese: 什么？怎么……你是哪里弄来的？

translations.english: Here, take this and don't mention a word of this to anyone, especially Svana!
translations.chinese: 拿着这个，别跟任何人提，尤其是斯瓦纳！

translations.english: If word got out that I'm practicing my Dibellan Arts in Riften, they'll run me out of town.
translations.chinese: 如果我在裂谷城练习迪贝拉艺术的消息传出去，他们会把我赶出城的。

translations.english: No, don't tell me. I don't want to know. Look, we need to keep this quiet... between you and me, okay. No one else needs to know about it.
translations.chinese: 不，别告诉我。我不想知道。听着，我们得保密……就你知我知，好吗。没必要让别人知道。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E21]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: What? How... where did you get these? | ZH: 什么？怎么……你是哪里弄来的？ | SID: 002C17
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Here, take this and don't mention a word of this to anyone, especially Svana! | ZH: 拿着这个，别跟任何人提，尤其是斯瓦纳！ | SID: 0095E1
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: If word got out that I'm practicing my Dibellan Arts in Riften, they'll run me out of town. | ZH: 如果我在裂谷城练习迪贝拉艺术的消息传出去，他们会把我赶出城的。 | SID: 00E5EF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: No, don't tell me. I don't want to know. Look, we need to keep this quiet... between you and me, okay. No one else needs to know about it. | ZH: 不，别告诉我。我不想知道。听着，我们得保密……就你知我知，好吗。没必要让别人知道。 | SID: 00EA27

translations.english: What, did you suddenly grow a conscience? Suit yourself.
translations.chinese: 怎么，你突然良心发现了吗？随你的便吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E22]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What, did you suddenly grow a conscience? Suit yourself. | ZH: 怎么，你突然良心发现了吗？随你的便吧。 | SID: 00EF72

translations.english: I don't mean to do this to myself, but I can't help it. I tried some skooma a year ago, and ever since then, I can't stop!
translations.chinese: 我也不想这样，但我就是忍不住。一年前我试过斯库玛以后，就停不下来了！

translations.english: If you could give me a healing potion, I could cleanse this poison from my body and get back to my life.
translations.chinese: 如果你能给我一瓶治疗药水，我就能净化体内的毒素，回到原本的生活中去了。

translations.english: My job at the Riften Fishery is in danger. The owner, Bolli, said that if I show up for work in this condition one more time, then I'm out.
translations.chinese: 我在裂谷渔场的工作快要丢了。波利老板说如果我再这种状态去上班，就让我走人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E2C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I don't mean to do this to myself, but I can't help it. I tried some skooma a year ago, and ever since then, I can't stop! | ZH: 我也不想这样，但我就是忍不住。一年前我试过斯库玛以后，就停不下来了！ | SID: 005CE1
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If you could give me a healing potion, I could cleanse this poison from my body and get back to my life. | ZH: 如果你能给我一瓶治疗药水，我就能净化体内的毒素，回到原本的生活中去了。 | SID: 007E08
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: My job at the Riften Fishery is in danger. The owner, Bolli, said that if I show up for work in this condition one more time, then I'm out. | ZH: 我在裂谷渔场的工作快要丢了。波利老板说如果我再这种状态去上班，就让我走人。 | SID: 009754

translations.english: Your kindness will never be forgotten.
translations.chinese: 我永远不会忘记你的善意。

translations.english: Here, take this. It's all I can offer for what you've given me.
translations.chinese: 给，拿着这个吧。你给我这么多，我却只能给你这些。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E2D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Your kindness will never be forgotten. | ZH: 我永远不会忘记你的善意。 | SID: 001241
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Here, take this. It's all I can offer for what you've given me. | ZH: 给，拿着这个吧。你给我这么多，我却只能给你这些。 | SID: 00BDF9

translations.english: If you wish to make a donation to her Benevolence, speak to Maramal and ensure your true love will endure for all eternity.
translations.chinese: 如果你想为她的慈善捐款，请告诉玛拉莫，愿你的真爱与世长存。

translations.english: Mara is the handmaiden of Kyne, the Goddess of the Storm and the Mother of Men.
translations.chinese: 玛拉是风暴女神、人类之母凯娜的侍女。

translations.english: She is the bearer of love and the patron of marriage.
translations.chinese: 她是爱情的承载者和婚姻的守护神。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E2E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If you wish to make a donation to her Benevolence, speak to Maramal and ensure your true love will endure for all eternity. | ZH: 如果你想为她的慈善捐款，请告诉玛拉莫，愿你的真爱与世长存。 | SID: 009760
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Mara is the handmaiden of Kyne, the Goddess of the Storm and the Mother of Men. | ZH: 玛拉是风暴女神、人类之母凯娜的侍女。 | SID: 00D4B1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: She is the bearer of love and the patron of marriage. | ZH: 她是爱情的承载者和婚姻的守护神。 | SID: 00E66F

translations.english: Thank you, my friend.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你，朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E35]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you, my friend. | ZH: 谢谢你，朋友。 | SID: 00EA5A

translations.english: Work? I suppose you can call it that. I call it slavery. I work my fingers to the bone keeping this disgusting place clean.
translations.chinese: 工作？你是可以这么说。我把这叫做奴役。我拼命工作维持这恶心的地方整洁干净。

translations.english: So now I'm stuck living here while those pigs she calls customers grope me and say the most awful things.
translations.chinese: 所以我现在被困在了这里，那些被她称作顾客的猪却抚摸着我，说着最可怕的话。

translations.english: Ever since my parents died and Haelga took me in, it's been a nightmare. How was I to know she was such a wretched woman?
translations.chinese: 自从我父母去世，哈尔嘉收留了我，我就深陷噩梦。我怎么会知道她是个这么卑鄙的女人？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E36]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Work? I suppose you can call it that. I call it slavery. I work my fingers to the bone keeping this disgusting place clean. | ZH: 工作？你是可以这么说。我把这叫做奴役。我拼命工作维持这恶心的地方整洁干净。 | SID: 00138D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So now I'm stuck living here while those pigs she calls customers grope me and say the most awful things. | ZH: 所以我现在被困在了这里，那些被她称作顾客的猪却抚摸着我，说着最可怕的话。 | SID: 009D9E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Ever since my parents died and Haelga took me in, it's been a nightmare. How was I to know she was such a wretched woman? | ZH: 自从我父母去世，哈尔嘉收留了我，我就深陷噩梦。我怎么会知道她是个这么卑鄙的女人？ | SID: 00FE86

translations.english: I should say so.
translations.chinese: 我也觉得。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E3C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I should say so. | ZH: 我也觉得。 | SID: 00B8D8

translations.english: Next time think before you speak.
translations.chinese: 下次说话前想好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E3D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Next time think before you speak. | ZH: 下次说话前想好了。 | SID: 00C91F

translations.english: You've got some nerve.
translations.chinese: 你可真有胆。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E3E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've got some nerve. | ZH: 你可真有胆。 | SID: 005A86

translations.english: Thank you. I'd almost given up hope.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。我都快绝望了。

translations.english: Here, take this. It's all I can offer for what you've given me.
translations.chinese: 给，拿着这个吧。你给我这么多，我却只能给你这些。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E3F]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Here, take this. It's all I can offer for what you've given me. | ZH: 给，拿着这个吧。你给我这么多，我却只能给你这些。 | SID: 00C9C0

translations.english: I have no idea what you're talking about. I'd never sleep with anyone besides my good wife, Drifa.
translations.chinese: 我不知道你在说什么。除了我的好老婆尼维诺尔，我不会跟任何人上床。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 嗯？你在说什么？我听不明白。

translations.chinese: 你疯了！怎么敢这样指责我！

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00041E43]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're crazy! How dare you make such an accusation! | ZH: 你疯了！怎么敢这样指责我！ | SID: 003FD7

translations.english: Do you know she's slept with three different men in the last month alone? What kind of a woman would do such a thing?
translations.chinese: 你知道她上个月跟仨男人上过床吗？什么女人能做出这种事？

translations.english: It's not just the work, it's everything about her. She's disgusting. I think she takes her worship of Dibella a bit too seriously.
translations.chinese: 不只是因为工作，是她的一切。她恶心。我觉得她对迪贝拉的崇拜有点过火了。

translations.english: Just for once, I'd like to see her squirm... to rub her nose in it.
translations.chinese: 哪怕就一次，我也想看到她局促不安的样子……给她点颜色看看。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 事实上，确实有，但我自己做不到，她要是知道会杀了我的。

translations.english: You see, I happen to know after she makes love, she gives her partner a token of her affection called a Mark of Dibella.
translations.chinese: 我碰巧知道她在做爱之后，会给伴侣一种表示爱意的东西，叫做迪贝拉印记。

translations.english: If you confront her with three of the Marks, she'd be so embarrassed... well, I don't know what she'd do!
translations.chinese: 如果你能拿到三个印记跟她对质，她会很尴尬……嗯，我也不会知道她会怎么样！

EDID: [00042846]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Justice can be harsh. But it is still justice. Paarthurnax deserves to die. | ZH: 即使很残酷，但这就是正义。帕图纳克斯必须死。 | SID: 005311

translations.english: There's one more thing. We know about Paarthurnax.
translations.chinese: 还有一件事。我们知道帕图纳克斯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042847]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's one more thing. We know about Paarthurnax. | ZH: 还有一件事。我们知道帕图纳克斯。 | SID: 00E0A0

translations.english: I knew we could count on you! Glad to have you back on our side.
translations.chinese: 我就知道我们能指望你！很高兴你回到我们这边。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042848]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I knew we could count on you! Glad to have you back on our side. | ZH: 我就知道我们能指望你！很高兴你回到我们这边。 | SID: 00262A

translations.english: At long last. An ancient evil is avenged. The shades of many Blades salute you this day.
translations.chinese: 终于，我们向一个古老恶魔发起了复仇。今天无数刀锋会的先烈向你致敬。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042849]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: At long last. An ancient evil is avenged. The shades of many Blades salute you this day. | ZH: 终于，我们向一个古老恶魔发起了复仇。今天无数刀锋会的先烈向你致敬。 | SID: 00E000

translations.english: Paarthurnax. The dragon, that the Greybeards have been protecting for all these years.
translations.chinese: 帕图纳克斯。灰胡子长久以来都在保护这头龙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004284A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Paarthurnax. The dragon, that the Greybeards have been protecting for all these years. | ZH: 帕图纳克斯。灰胡子长久以来都在保护这头龙。 | SID: 00BC20

translations.english: Ah, you're back. I hope you've made some progress on tracking down this Shout we need to defeat Alduin?
translations.chinese: 啊，你回来了。关于对抗奥杜因的龙吼有进展吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004284B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, you're back. I hope you've made some progress on tracking down this Shout we need to defeat Alduin? | ZH: 啊，你回来了。关于对抗奥杜因的龙吼有进展吗？ | SID: 000159

translations.english: I will not lie to you, there is some risk involved. The last time the Torpor was imbibed could have been decades ago.
translations.chinese: 我不骗你。这确实有风险，眠药最后一次被服用是几十年前的事了。

translations.english: But I swear upon Lady Mara that I will do everything within my power to prevent any harm from befalling you.
translations.chinese: 但我向玛拉发誓，我会尽自己所能保你不受任何伤害。

translations.english: Quite amazing, yes. Alchemy and the blessings of a Divine distilled down into a ingestible liquid.
translations.chinese: 没错，是很神奇。炼金术与神之祝福被浓缩为一种可吸收的药液。

translations.english: Sadly, I have yet to see it function in person.
translations.chinese: 可惜我还没看过它生效。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042863]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Quite amazing, yes. Alchemy and the blessings of a Divine distilled down into a ingestible liquid. | ZH: 没错，是很神奇。炼金术与神之祝福被浓缩为一种可吸收的药液。 | SID: 004F33
