translations.english: Yes. The Torpor grants an ability the priests of Vaermina called "The Dreamstride"; using dreams to travel distances in the real world.
translations.chinese: 没错，瓦尔迷纳之眠能赋予一种被祭司们称为“梦中漫步”的能力，利用梦在现实世界中旅行。

agentText:

translations.english: No, all my research points in the opposite direction. This is the exact liquid the priests would drink.
translations.chinese: 不，我所有研究都指向了相反方向。这个药液祭司们都会喝。

translations.english: The only question in my mind is whether you will be granted The Dreamstride. Otherwise, the worst that could happen is a bad aftertaste.
translations.chinese: 唯一问题就是，你是否能实现梦中漫步。最坏结果也就是喝着味道差而已。

translations.english: I swear upon Lady Mara that I would never let any harm befall you.
translations.chinese: 向玛拉起誓，你不会受伤的。

translations.chinese: 可惜我还没看过它生效。

translations.english: I assure you, the Dreamstride is well known in Vaerminian Lore.
translations.chinese: 我向你保证，梦中漫步在瓦尔迷纳的传说中很有名的。

agentText:

translations.english: As a sworn priest of Mara, the elixir won't work for me. The Torpor will only work for Priests of Vaermina, or the unaffiliated.
translations.chinese: 作为玛拉的祭司，这药对我没用。眠药只适用于瓦尔迷纳的祭司还有无明确信仰者。

agentText:

translations.english: The Jarl does little to protect us these days.
translations.chinese: 领主这些日子很少保护我们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042891]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Jarl does little to protect us these days. | ZH: 领主这些日子很少保护我们。 | SID: 00A138

translations.english: All well and good. But did you know that he was Alduin's chief lieutenant in ancient times? Responsible for terrible atrocities?
translations.chinese: 说的没错。但你知不知道他在古时候是奥杜因的副手？要为那些恐怖的暴行负责？

translations.english: It's true that his crimes are long in the past, but justice does not count the passage of years.
translations.chinese: 没错，他的罪行是过去很久了。但正义是不可以时间计量的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: He's a dragon. Not just any dragon, but the right hand of Alduin, responsible for many atrocities during the ancient Dragon War.
translations.chinese: 他是不是什么普通的龙，而是奥杜因的得力助手，在古代的巨龙战争中犯下了诸多暴行。

translations.english: You've discovered... what?
translations.chinese: 你发现了……什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000428D7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He's a dragon. Not just any dragon, but the right hand of Alduin, responsible for many atrocities during the ancient Dragon War. | ZH: 他是不是什么普通的龙，而是奥杜因的得力助手，在古代的巨龙战争中犯下了诸多暴行。 | SID: 00C368
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You've discovered... what? | ZH: 你发现了……什么？ | SID: 00BEAE

translations.english: I'm afraid there's a further problem. A serious one. I've discovered who the Greybeards' leader really is.
translations.chinese: 我看这里还有个更严重的大问题。我已经知道灰胡子的领袖是谁了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000428D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm afraid there's a further problem. A serious one. I've discovered who the Greybeards' leader really is. | ZH: 我看这里还有个更严重的大问题。我已经知道灰胡子的领袖是谁了。 | SID: 00AB59

translations.english: Here's the big picture. He helped Alduin enslave our ancestors. He may have betrayed Alduin in the end, but that makes him worse, not better.
translations.chinese: 重点在于，他帮助奥杜因奴役过我们的祖先。他也许是最后背叛了奥杜因，但这只能让他的形象更加糟糕，而不是更好。

translations.english: We can't afford to give Paarthurnax the opportunity to betray us in turn, and return to his old master.
translations.chinese: 我们不能给帕图纳克斯机会再反过来背叛我们，回到他老主子身边了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Here's the big picture. He helped Alduin enslave our ancestors. He may have betrayed Alduin in the end, but that makes him worse, not better. | ZH: 重点在于，他帮助奥杜因奴役过我们的祖先。他也许是最后背叛了奥杜因，但这只能让他的形象更加糟糕，而不是更好。 | SID: 000C93

translations.english: Paarthurnax was the author of many atrocities during the Dragon War - crimes great enough to be remembered for thousands of years.
translations.chinese: 帕图纳克斯是巨龙战争中许多暴行的始作俑者，罪行之大足以被铭记千年。

translations.english: True, he turned traitor to Alduin and helped overthrow the Dragon Cult, but that does not excuse or expiate his previous deeds.
translations.chinese: 没错，他是背叛了奥杜因，帮助推翻了拜龙教，但这并不能开脱或偿还他以前的罪行。

translations.english: Whether or not he has truly repented, or merely acted to save himself, justice demands that he pay with his life.
translations.chinese: 无论他是真的悔过，还是只为了自保，正义都得要求他偿命。

agentText:

translations.english: Justice demands that he die for his crimes. Until he is dead, I'm afraid my oath as a Blade prevents me from offering you aid and comfort.
translations.chinese: 正义需要他为罪行买单。恐怕在他死前，受限于作为刀锋的誓言，我无法为你提供帮助和安慰。

translations.english: The Blades have been hunting him for centuries, but he was protected by the Greybeards and then the Emperors.
translations.chinese: 刀锋会几百年来一直在猎捕他，但他却被灰胡子和皇帝保护了起来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Justice demands that he die for his crimes. Until he is dead, I'm afraid my oath as a Blade prevents me from offering you aid and comfort. | ZH: 正义需要他为罪行买单。恐怕在他死前，受限于作为刀锋的誓言，我无法为你提供帮助和安慰。 | SID: 006CD2

translations.english: One small detail though - I need all of the gold they gave you. No one skims around here. Come back when you've got every last coin.
translations.chinese: 不过有个小细节，我需要他们给你的所有钱。这里没人偷东西。把钱拿齐了再回来。

translations.english: So I've heard. Thanks to you, this should be the last time they forget to pay.
translations.chinese: 我听说了。多亏有你，这应该是他们最后一次欠钱不还了。

translations.english: A new face! Such a welcome sight in dreary old Morthal. Welcome friend, welcome!
translations.chinese: 新面孔来了！在沉闷的老莫萨尔很高兴能看到这种景象。欢迎你朋友，欢迎！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E30]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A new face! Such a welcome sight in dreary old Morthal. Welcome friend, welcome! | ZH: 新面孔来了！在沉闷的老莫萨尔很高兴能看到这种景象。欢迎你朋友，欢迎！ | SID: 002821

translations.english: Don't fret over the gloom, there's nothing to fear! Old Lurbuk will brighten your spirits -- just lend him your ear!
translations.chinese: 不要为黑暗烦恼，没什么可怕的！老卢布克会让你振奋精神，好好听他唱就行了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E31]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't fret over the gloom, there's nothing to fear! Old Lurbuk will brighten your spirits -- just lend him your ear! | ZH: 不要为黑暗烦恼，没什么可怕的！老卢布克会让你振奋精神，好好听他唱就行了！ | SID: 004E06

translations.english: The good people of Morthal have yet to embrace my talent.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的好人们还没有接受我的天赋。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E32]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The good people of Morthal have yet to embrace my talent. | ZH: 莫萨尔的好人们还没有接受我的天赋。 | SID: 009DB5

translations.english: Try as you may, they won't say "good day," but will just walk away. Worry not, Morthal! Lurbuk is here to stay!
translations.chinese: 不管你怎么努力，他们也不会说“日安”，只会径直走开。不要担心，莫萨尔！卢布克会待在这里！

agentText:

translations.english: The fair Jonna does me a great courtesy by allowing me to entertain the guests of her noble establishment.
translations.chinese: 美丽的乔娜很有礼貌，让我招待她的贵宾们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E34]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The fair Jonna does me a great courtesy by allowing me to entertain the guests of her noble establishment. | ZH: 美丽的乔娜很有礼貌，让我招待她的贵宾们。 | SID: 007D29

translations.english: I, Lurbuk the Great, will win the hearts of the people of Morthal one day, mark my words!
translations.chinese: 我，伟大的卢布克，总有一天会赢得莫萨尔人民的心，记住我的话！

agentText:

translations.english: Welcome to the Moorside. If you need anythin', I'll be 'round. Good to have a customer.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到坞边旅店。如果需要什么，我就在这儿。有客人光顾真是太好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Welcome to the Moorside. If you need anythin', I'll be 'round. Good to have a customer. | ZH: 欢迎来到坞边旅店。如果需要什么，我就在这儿。有客人光顾真是太好了。 | SID: 0058E6

translations.english: There ain't much to offer, but if you wanna place dry to spend the night, I'll rent you a room.
translations.chinese: 没什么可提供的，但如果你想晾晾衣服过一夜，我可以租你一间屋。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E37]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There ain't much to offer, but if you wanna place dry to spend the night, I'll rent you a room. | ZH: 没什么可提供的，但如果你想晾晾衣服过一夜，我可以租你一间屋。 | SID: 007C0A

translations.english: Runnin' an inn weren't my plan. But Falion decided to move here, so I joined him.
translations.chinese: 开旅店不是我的计划。但法利昂决定搬到这边来，所以我也跟来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E38]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Runnin' an inn weren't my plan. But Falion decided to move here, so I joined him. | ZH: 开旅店不是我的计划。但法利昂决定搬到这边来，所以我也跟来了。 | SID: 00B9F8

translations.english: I take what little business I can git. I'm grateful for anyone willin' to spend money here.
translations.chinese: 我能做多少生意就做多少。我很感激愿意在这里花钱的顾客。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I take what little business I can git. I'm grateful for anyone willin' to spend money here. | ZH: 我能做多少生意就做多少。我很感激愿意在这里花钱的顾客。 | SID: 00625C

translations.english: Ignore the Orc. He pays, so I let him stay.
translations.chinese: 无视那个兽人吧。他付了钱，所以我让他留下了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E3A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ignore the Orc. He pays, so I let him stay. | ZH: 无视那个兽人吧。他付了钱，所以我让他留下了。 | SID: 0080A7

translations.english: You'll want to be careful travelin' at night. The marsh is a dangerous place.
translations.chinese: 晚上出行可要小心。这沼泽很危险。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00042E3B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'll want to be careful travelin' at night. The marsh is a dangerous place. | ZH: 晚上出行可要小心。这沼泽很危险。 | SID: 00A533

translations.english: So, life has brought you to Morthal, and to me. What purpose this serves, we will no doubt see. Welcome.
translations.chinese: 所以，人生把你带到了莫萨尔和我这儿。我们毫无疑问将会看到这有什么目的。欢迎你。

agentText:

translations.english: If you're trying to ask if I tend the hall of the dead alone, then the answer is yes.
translations.chinese: 如果你是想问，我是不是一个人看守亡者之厅，那确实。

translations.english: Look, I didn't ask for this job, I got stuck with it thanks to my father.
translations.chinese: 听着，这份工作不是我自己找的，是我父亲逼的。

translations.english: You think anyone around here is going to lift a shovel to help me? Guess again. "Leave the dirty work to old Alessandra."
translations.chinese: 你觉得这里会有人帮我挖一铲子吗？再猜猜他们会说什么。“把脏活留给老亚历山德拉就好”。

translations.english: Yes. Perhaps one day I'll be able to make the journey, but for now I need to tend the dead.
translations.chinese: 是啊，也许有一天我会去旅行，但现在还得照顾死者。

translations.english: And last is the soul gem. I left that one in Windhelm at the White Phial alchemy shop. It was a good trade too. Ah well.
translations.chinese: 最后就是灵魂石了。我落在风舵城的白瓶炼金店了。应该是笔不错的交易。哎。

translations.english: The orichalcum ingot should still be in Winterhold at the Frozen Hearth Inn. I don't know why I didn't just take it with me.
translations.chinese: 山铜铸锭应该还在冬堡的冻炉旅店。我不知道为什么没带走。

translations.english: Let's see. Last time I used the Dwemer Spoon was at my dear friend Boti's house in Ivarstead... Fellstar Farm I believe it's called.
translations.chinese: 我想想。最后一次用锻莫勺子应该是在我伊瓦尔镇的好朋友伯蒂家里……我记得是叫落星农场吧。

translations.english: No, no, no. What I need to do is to reverse that. Draw the harmonic energy into the reagent and then apply it with the proper incantation.
translations.chinese: 不，不，不。我要做的就是扭转这个局面，把谐波能量吸进试剂里，然后用合适的咒语来施展。

translations.english: What was I thinking? It would never work that first way. Why didn't you tell me?
translations.chinese: 我在想什么？第一种方法是行不通的。你为什么不告诉我？

translations.english: You don't have to, because it's utter nonsense. It's never going to work.
translations.chinese: 你不需要懂，因为这就是胡说八道。根本不可能。

translations.english: We've made peace with one another without even uttering a single word and I'm content for the first time in my life.
translations.chinese: 我们一句话没说就和好了，这是我人生里第一次感到满足。

translations.english: I felt a caress on my cheek some time ago... I thought it to be a trick of the wind, but I think it was a message from my father.
translations.chinese: 前段时间我感觉有人在轻抚我的脸颊。我以为是风的恶作剧，但这应该是我父亲给我的信息。

translations.english: I thank you. Here, please accept this as a token of my appreciation for your selfless action.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你。请接受这个吧，作为对你无私行为的感谢。

translations.english: It's a fundamental rule of magic and it would be ridiculous. You can't draw from harmonic energy without a soul siphon.
translations.chinese: 这是魔法的基础规则，可能会很荒谬。没有灵魂虹吸，你就无法从谐波能量中汲取能量。

translations.english: Since you're so well informed I'm certain you've solved the problem with thermic drift, right?
translations.chinese: 既然你这么见多识广，我想你已经解决了热量漂移的问题了吧？

translations.english: I'll tell you why you won't tell me. Because you were absolutely right not to.
translations.chinese: 我来告诉你为什么你不懂。因为你做的完全正确。

translations.chinese: 这一步，让我查查是哪里来的。我得查查我得图书室……然后给你个答案。

translations.english: Umm... what were we talking about?
translations.chinese: 呃……我们刚才在聊什么？

translations.english: What's not to get? It's as simple as Traven's First Axiom of Magic... or was it Galerion's Law of Casting. Hmm.
translations.chinese: 有什么不明白的？简单得就像塔拉文的魔法第一定理一样……或者加里兰的铸造法则。嗯。

translations.english: Well, at any rate, organization is not my strong suit. Not at all. I need as much help as I can get.
translations.chinese: 好吧，不管了，组织人手不是我的强项。我需要更多帮助。

translations.english: In fact, if you could retrieve a few things for me, I could start on my next set of experiments.
translations.chinese: 其实，如果你能帮我找回几样东西，我就能开始下一轮实验了。

translations.english: Yes, I could use some help with that. An assistant perhaps? No, no, no. Maybe a familiar. No, too messy.
translations.chinese: 是的，我需要些帮助。也许是招个助手？不不不。也许得是更熟练的。不对，太乱了。

translations.english: Excellent. I can't wait.
translations.chinese: 太好了。我都快等不及了。

translations.english: Well... why are you still standing here? Oh, right. You need to know where they are! That would help.
translations.chinese: 嗯……你怎么还站在这里？哦，对了，你得知道它们都在哪儿！会帮上忙的。

translations.english: As you can imagine, I tend to forget things often. Leave things around. I really must learn to put these things away.
translations.chinese: 你也知道，我挺健忘的。总是丢三落四。我该学着把东西都收好。

translations.english: Bring those items back to me and I'll be happy to experiment on you. No, no... that isn't right. I'd be happy to reward you.
translations.chinese: 把这些东西带给我，我很乐意在你身上做实验。不对不对……很乐意酬谢你。

translations.english: What I need is my Dwemer Stirring Spoon, my Orichalcum Ingot and my Grand Soul Gem. In fact, I could use them immediately.
translations.chinese: 我需要找的是我的锻莫搅拌勺、山铜铸锭和特大灵魂石。其实，我很急需它们。

translations.english: I never had any friends; who'd want to spend time with "the little weird girl who hangs around dead people?"
translations.chinese: 我从来没有过朋友，没人想跟那个“和死人混在一起的怪小孩”在一起玩。

translations.english: So I grew up with a miserable trade. This is all I know how to do... prepare and inter the deceased.
translations.chinese: 所以我是在一个悲惨的行业中长大的。我只知道……怎么准备和埋葬死者。

translations.english: My father was a Priest of Arkay. All my life was spent around the dead, being forced to learn the proper burial rituals and prayers.
translations.chinese: 我父亲是阿尔凯祭司。我这辈子都在死人身边度过，被迫学习正确的丧葬仪式和祈祷。

translations.english: Be cautious, the pilgrimage to the Shrine is not an easy one.
translations.chinese: 小心点，祭坛的朝圣之旅并非易事。

translations.chinese: 只要你继续遵守我们的法律，随时欢迎你来裂谷城。

translations.english: Someone actually interested in what I'm doing? Amazing! Well, allow me to explain.
translations.chinese: 真有人对我做的事感兴趣？太好了！请允许我解释一下。

translations.english: My experimentation involves a magical construct and a reagent that will allow the construct to maintain a field of permanent harmonic energy!
translations.chinese: 我的实验包括了一个魔法结构和一个试剂，能让结构保持永久的谐波能量场！

translations.english: I'd like to make the journey to the Hall of the Dead in Windhelm and give my ceremonial dagger to Andurs, the caretaker.
translations.chinese: 我想去白漫城的亡者之厅把我的仪式匕首交给那里的管理者安度尔斯。

translations.english: I believe once it's interred with my father's remains I'll be at peace with his memory.
translations.chinese: 我想一旦它和我父亲的遗体一同下葬，他就能安息了。

translations.chinese: 嗯。我不知道你是怎么做到的，但这正是我下组实验需要的。太好了！

translations.english: Well, at least allow me to reward you for your uncanny foresight.
translations.chinese: 嗯，至少我应该奖励一下你那了不起的远见了。

translations.english: Items? What items? Let me see those.
translations.chinese: 东西？什么东西？我看看。

translations.chinese: 朝圣之旅已经完成，我能够感觉到。

translations.chinese: 出发前还有什么事吗？

translations.english: Come to laugh at the grave tender?
translations.chinese: 来笑话看坟人的吗？

EDID: [00043DFA]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 我们有约吗？不是……那是来送东西吗？我不记得了。

translations.english: I understand. But you're being paranoid. I'm inspecting security, not charging off into battle. There's not a lot that can go wrong.
translations.chinese: 我明白。不过你还是多疑了。我只是来检查安全，又不是打仗。不会有什么纰漏的。

translations.english: Son, when the Emperor's safety is concerned, anything could go wrong. Off with you, now. And good travels.
translations.chinese: 儿啊，为了皇帝陛下的安全，万事容不得马虎。去吧，旅行愉快。

translations.english: Farewell, father. I'll return as soon as I'm able.
translations.chinese: 保重，父亲。我很快就会回来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00044047]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Farewell, father. I'll return as soon as I'm able. | ZH: 保重，父亲。我很快就会回来。 | SID: 00D7FA

translations.english: Well, this is it, then. Look after yourself, Gaius. You're doing your duty, and I'm proud of you. But you'd better come back to me. You hear?
translations.chinese: 嗯，就这样吧。照顾好你自己，加留斯。你是去履行自己的职责，我为你感到骄傲。但你最好回到我身边来。听见了吗？

translations.chinese: 哦，菲达。我要去独自旅行了，但你知道我会把你放在心上的。我会很快回来的。

translations.english: No, so your best plan is to follow him after he leaves Dragon Bridge. However, there is one other option...
translations.chinese: 不，所以你最好在他离开龙桥之后就尾随他。不过，还有另一个选择……

translations.english: We know there's an actual written travel schedule, somewhere in the Penitus Oculatus outpost. Securing that would, obviously, be most beneficial...
translations.chinese: 我们知道在洞察眼的哨站有一份书面的行程表。显然，拿上那个最有利了……

translations.english: Do you know Gaius Maro's schedule?
translations.chinese: 你知道加留斯·马洛的行程表吗？

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Do you know Gaius Maro's schedule? | ZH: 你知道加留斯·马洛的行程表吗？ | SID: 0018F3

translations.english: It was established by Commander Maro when he first arrived in Skyrim, several months ago. When he began preparing for the Emperor's initial visit.
translations.chinese: 指挥官马洛几个月前首次来到天际时建立的。他当时在为皇帝第一次出巡天际做准备。

translations.english: It's a small town, with one rather unique feature - it houses Skyrim's only Penitus Oculatus outpost.
translations.chinese: 一个小镇子，但有独特的地方，里面有天际唯一的洞察眼哨站。

translations.english: Tell me about Dragon Bridge.
translations.chinese: 和我说说龙桥吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004404B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It was established by Commander Maro when he first arrived in Skyrim, several months ago. When he began preparing for the Emperor's initial visit. | ZH: 指挥官马洛几个月前首次来到天际时建立的。他当时在为皇帝第一次出巡天际做准备。 | SID: 00D2C1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's a small town, with one rather unique feature - it houses Skyrim's only Penitus Oculatus outpost. | ZH: 一个小镇子，但有独特的地方，里面有天际唯一的洞察眼哨站。 | SID: 00D2C2
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Tell me about Dragon Bridge. | ZH: 和我说说龙桥吧。 | SID: 00D2C0

translations.english: Father, you worry too much. I'll be fine.
translations.chinese: 父亲，你多虑了。我不会有事的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004404C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Father, you worry too much. I'll be fine. | ZH: 父亲，你多虑了。我不会有事的。 | SID: 00D2D0

translations.english: Yes. Do not kill Gaius Maro in Dragon Bridge, or on the road. Kill him in one of the other major cities he'll be visiting.
translations.chinese: 没错。不要在龙桥或者路上杀了加留斯·马洛。等他到了大城市里再杀。

translations.english: Do that, and Astrid has authorized me to grant you a rather unique bonus. It is a special token, to be given to Olava the Feeble, in Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德说了，如果照做，就给你一份特殊的奖励。是一个特殊的标记，可以拿去给白漫城的“软脚虾”奥拉瓦。

translations.english: Olava is an old and dear friend, and a powerful seer. The token entitles you to a reading of your future. It's an opportunity one should not pass up.
translations.chinese: 奥拉瓦是老朋友了，也是一个强大的预见者。这个标记可以让你预知自己的未来。不容错过哦。

translations.english: There, the body will be discovered quickly, as will the letter implicating Gaius Maro and the Stormcloaks in the Emperor's assassination.
translations.chinese: 这样，尸体就能更快被发现，还有那封暗示加留斯·马洛私通风暴斗篷参与暗杀皇帝的信。

translations.english: Is there any way to earn a bonus?
translations.chinese: 有什么办法获得奖励吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004404D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Yes. Do not kill Gaius Maro in Dragon Bridge, or on the road. Kill him in one of the other major cities he'll be visiting. | ZH: 没错。不要在龙桥或者路上杀了加留斯·马洛。等他到了大城市里再杀。 | SID: 0086BF
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Do that, and Astrid has authorized me to grant you a rather unique bonus. It is a special token, to be given to Olava the Feeble, in Whiterun. | ZH: 阿斯垂德说了，如果照做，就给你一份特殊的奖励。是一个特殊的标记，可以拿去给白漫城的“软脚虾”奥拉瓦。 | SID: 00CA89
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Olava is an old and dear friend, and a powerful seer. The token entitles you to a reading of your future. It's an opportunity one should not pass up. | ZH: 奥拉瓦是老朋友了，也是一个强大的预见者。这个标记可以让你预知自己的未来。不容错过哦。 | SID: 00D2C6
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: There, the body will be discovered quickly, as will the letter implicating Gaius Maro and the Stormcloaks in the Emperor's assassination. | ZH: 这样，尸体就能更快被发现，还有那封暗示加留斯·马洛私通风暴斗篷参与暗杀皇帝的信。 | SID: 00D2C8
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there any way to earn a bonus? | ZH: 有什么办法获得奖励吗？ | SID: 00902D

translations.english: I know you will. But all the same, remember everything I said. Stay alert, and when you get to the cities, make your observations and move on.
translations.chinese: 我知道。但不管怎样，牢记我的嘱托，保持警惕，等到达城市之后，进行巡查再前进。

translations.english: Let those that watch from Sovngarde envy us this day!

translations.english: Skyrim will be free!
translations.chinese: 天际将获得自由！

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Skyrim will be free! | ZH: 天际将获得自由！ | SID: 00D2BB

translations.english: Hold, Alduin on the Wing! Sister Hawk, grant us your sacred breath to make this contract heard!
translations.chinese: 停下吧，悬于天上的奥杜因啊！俊鹰姊妹，请赐予神息以完成契约！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I just want to be left alone to do my job, and to enjoy what little free time I have when I have it.
translations.chinese: 我只想一个人待着干活儿，然后享受我仅有的一点空闲时间。

translations.english: Then Ulfric Stormcloak came with his militia. That must have been a sight to see, him shouting folks to death.
translations.chinese: 然后乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷带着他的民兵来了。那肯定很有意思，他的吼声把那些人喊死了。

translations.english: You'd think that'd be the end of it, but those Forsworn are still in the hills, and they're as wild as wolves.
translations.chinese: 你以为一切都结束了？但弃誓者还躲在山里，他们野的像狼一样。

translations.english: That's right. Whole group of the natives called the Forsworn rose up against the Nords. Drove them out.
translations.chinese: 没错。一群被称为弃誓者的土著奋起反抗诺德人，把他们赶了出去。

translations.english: Forsworn had taken over Markarth, and Ulfric and his men drove them out. Empire promised they'd be free to worship Talos afterwards.
translations.chinese: 弃誓者占领了马卡斯，乌弗瑞克和他的手下把他们赶了出去。帝国保证他们以后可以自由信仰塔洛斯。

translations.english: Pity no one told the Elves. Whole group of those Thalmor came and they demanded Ulfric's arrest.
translations.chinese: 可惜没人告知精灵。一群梭默来了，要求逮捕乌弗瑞克。

translations.english: It's the whole reason Ulfric revolted against the Empire. Well, the first reason anyway.
translations.chinese: 这是乌弗瑞克反抗帝国的全部原因。哎，是第一个原因。

translations.english: Old Elven fella named Calcelmo is up in Understone Keep's the one you want to talk to for more about that. Wrote all those books.
translations.chinese: 有个叫卡塞莫的老精灵住在石下要塞，你可以跟他多聊聊。他写过好些书。

translations.english: That's right, at least according to them scholars. Stonework's clearly not Nord, that much is for sure.
translations.chinese: 没错，至少那些学者是这么认为的。这些石雕肯定不是诺德风格，这一点可以肯定。

translations.english: Times have been good and bad since then, but some folks couldn't handle not ruling their own land. Those are the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 自那以后，情况时好时坏，但有些无法接受不能统治自己的土地。那些就是弃誓者了。

translations.english: The Forsworn follow the old ways, but some of those were best forgotten. Blood sacrifices, communing with Daedra. It's the road to ruin.
translations.chinese: 弃誓者遵循古老传统，但其中有些确实应该被遗忘才对。血祭、沟通迪德拉。这是自取灭亡啊。

translations.english: Before the Nords came, we worshipped the old gods, had our own kingdom.
translations.chinese: 在诺德人到来前，我们信仰古神，拥有自己的王国。

translations.english: Finally, the Nords took over around Tiber Septim's time. That bent a few folks' arms the wrong way.
translations.chinese: 最后，诺德人在泰伯·塞普汀时代接管了这里。这使得一些当地人用错误的方式武装起来了。

translations.english: It's an old city. Legends say Dwarves built it first. Then after they vanished, the natives moved in.
translations.chinese: 这城市有年头了。传说是矮人先造起来的。他们消失以后，当地人搬了进来。

translations.english: Here. Take this. For your time and all that.
translations.chinese: 来，收下吧。辛苦你了。

translations.english: I swear, that Aeri and her men would make fine Stormcloak recruits. Pity we can't spare the lumber to conscript them.
translations.chinese: 我发誓，艾里和她的手下能成为风暴斗篷的好帮手。可惜我们不能抛下木材把他们征召了。

translations.english: What's this? Oh, that's right, the timbers from Anga's Mill.
translations.chinese: 这是什么？哦，对了，安佳木材厂的木料。

translations.english: Wasn't surprising he stayed loyal to the Empire. His father helped capture Ulfric Stormcloak after the Markarth Incident.
translations.chinese: 他对帝国忠心耿耿并不奇怪。他父亲在马卡斯事件时帮忙抓获了乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷。

translations.english: That would be Jarl Igmund. Young for a ruler of a Hold, especially the Reach.
translations.chinese: 依格蒙德。对于统治领地来说还是年轻了，尤其是要统治瑞驰这种地方。

translations.english: Since the Stormcloaks took over, Jarl Thongvor is in charge.
translations.chinese: 自从风暴斗篷接手这里，领主就换成松瓦了。

translations.english: Well, look at you, thanks. Take it to Voada, she handles all the dogs for the Jarl.
translations.chinese: 啊，真是谢谢你了。请交给沃达，她帮领主照看那些狗。

translations.chinese: 我可以帮你送过去。

translations.english: My family has been doing it for years. You need one out in the Reach. Don't want to be alone when some Forsworn comes swinging.
translations.chinese: 我们家干这行已经好多年了。你在瑞驰领行走最好也带一条。可别在独行的时候被弃誓者找上。

translations.english: How long have you been training dogs?
translations.chinese: 你训狗多长时间了？

translations.chinese: 你和我很像。我们都在寻求挑战和财富。但对我来说，相似处也就到此为止了。

translations.english: Many years ago I lost my blade, "Grimsever," within a Dwemer ruin. I took it as a sign that I was wasting my days in search of wealth.
translations.chinese: 多年前，我在一个锻莫遗迹里遗失了我的剑，“无情切割者”。我觉得这就是虚度时间寻求财富的警示。

translations.english: You see, Riften is my great beast to be slain and my fortune comes from gratitude and trust.
translations.chinese: 你看，裂谷城就是我要杀死的最强野兽，也是名为“感激和信任”的最大财富。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You and I are alike. We seek challenge and great fortune. But for me, that's where the similarities end. | ZH: 你和我很像。我们都在寻求挑战和财富。但对我来说，相似处也就到此为止了。 | SID: 008126
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Many years ago I lost my blade, "Grimsever," within a Dwemer ruin. I took it as a sign that I was wasting my days in search of wealth. | ZH: 多年前，我在一个锻莫遗迹里遗失了我的剑，“无情切割者”。我觉得这就是虚度时间寻求财富的警示。 | SID: 00ABD8
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You see, Riften is my great beast to be slain and my fortune comes from gratitude and trust. | ZH: 你看，裂谷城就是我要杀死的最强野兽，也是名为“感激和信任”的最大财富。 | SID: 00C342

translations.english: It was only through blind luck that I was able to crawl away from the Dwemer abomination and make my way to the surface.
translations.chinese: 只是因为踩了狗屎运，我才从那个锻莫怪物那里爬了出来，回到了地面上。

translations.english: When the colossus struck, Grimsever was knocked from my grasp and I was wounded badly.
translations.chinese: 当巨像袭来的时候，无情切割者从我手上被打飞了，我也受了重伤。

translations.english: I must have collapsed, because the next thing I remember is Aerin standing over me tending to my wounds.
translations.chinese: 我一定是昏过去了，因为我记得的下一件事就是艾灵在我身边照顾我这个病号了。

translations.english: I was adventuring in the depths of the ruins when I was attacked by a massive construct... like nothing I had ever seen.
translations.chinese: 我在遗迹深处冒险时，被一个巨大的构造物袭击了……从来没见过那种东西。

translations.english: It was lost years ago in a Dwemer ruin.
translations.chinese: 几年前丢在锻莫遗迹里了。

translations.english: Without it, I feel almost as defenseless as a newborn. I don't think I'll ever be able to find a replacement.
translations.chinese: 没了它，我就像个新生儿一样毫无防备。我觉得也没有可以替代它的武器了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00045304]

translations.english: Then there's Ingun Black-Briar. Bright young thing and a worthy apprentice, when she isn't wasting my rare ingredients.
translations.chinese: 还有因甘·黑棘，聪明的小姑娘，只要她不浪费我珍贵的原料，倒是个值得一教的学徒。

translations.english: Hardly! In fact, I don't know how I get anything done with all of the distractions I have to put up with.
translations.chinese: 当然不！事实上，我都知道在这么多让我分心的事情下，我是怎么完成工作的。

translations.english: My wife Hafjorg, well, she's a necessary evil I suppose. Not a lick of talent when it comes to alchemy, but she keeps me fed.
translations.chinese: 我妻子哈乔，她是个躲不开的恶魔。说到炼金术她是一点天赋都没有，但是她养活了我。

translations.english: I couldn't ask you to undertake such a trecherous journey, it would be a fool's errand.
translations.chinese: 我不能让你去冒这个险，这是白费力气。

translations.english: Grimsever rests with the Dwemer ruin of Mzinchaleft. Tread carefully, friend... those same ruins almost took my life.
translations.chinese: 无情切割者就在锻莫遗迹姆津查莱夫特里。小心点，朋友……那些遗迹差点要了我的命。

translations.english: But I see that spark in your eye and I know better than to warn you away.
translations.chinese: 但我看到了你眼中的火花，所以我明白不该劝阻你前去。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Grimsever rests with the Dwemer ruin of Mzinchaleft. Tread carefully, friend... those same ruins almost took my life. | ZH: 无情切割者就在锻莫遗迹姆津查莱夫特里。小心点，朋友……那些遗迹差点要了我的命。 | SID: 007715

translations.english: I see I still have much to learn. Lead on.
translations.chinese: 看来我还有很多东西要学。继续吧。

translations.chinese: 请离我远点，我会忘记我们的讨论的。

translations.chinese: 是，是……再见吧。

translations.english: Yes, quite a shame. It was a fine weapon.
translations.chinese: 是啊，挺遗憾的。那可是件好武器。

translations.english: If it wasn't for Aerin, the young man who saved my life, I think I'd already have given up long ago.
translations.chinese: 如果不是那个救了我一命的年轻人艾灵，我可能早就放弃了。

translations.english: Corruption, lies and deceit are the order of the day here.
translations.chinese: 腐败、谎言和欺诈在这里屡见不鲜。

translations.english: Its been difficult. I've taken the burdens of this city's problems upon myself and I keep running into impossible obstacles.
translations.chinese: 这确实很困难。我把这座城市所有的问题都压在自己肩上，不断遇到不可跨越的阻碍。

translations.chinese: 听说乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷从帝国手里逃走了。战争只会越来越糟了。

translations.english: We've got something of a love triangle here in Riverwood. Faendal and Sven, both vying for Camilla's affections.
translations.chinese: 我们河木镇有段三角恋。法恩达尔和斯万都在争夺凯米拉的芳心。

translations.chinese: 其实……我们没有阁楼间。但我明白你的意思。请吧，别客气。

translations.chinese: 我承认你很漂亮。离我丈夫阿尔沃远点。

translations.english: We're a small village, but we work hard, and take care of our own.
translations.chinese: 我们就是个小村子，但我们会努力工作，照顾好自己。

translations.chinese: 我和我父亲一样，都学习成为吟唱者，我祖父也是。

translations.english: Alduin always was pahlok - arrogant in his power. Uznahgar paar. He took domination as his birthright.
translations.chinese: 奥杜因常帕洛克……自豪于自己的力量。乌兹纳伽 帕尔。他觉得自己生来就该统治。

translations.english: Ni liivrah hin moro. True, this is not the final krongrah - victory. But not even the heroes of old were able to defeat Alduin in open battle.
translations.chinese: 尼 利维拉 亨 摩洛。没错，这并非最终的克隆格拉……胜利。但即使古代英雄也没法正面击败奥杜因。

translations.english: This should shake the loyalty of the dov who serve him.
translations.chinese: 这应该会动摇他麾下都瓦的忠诚。

translations.chinese: 没错……他的盟友可以告诉我们。莫特马胡思……但很难……说服他们中的一个叛变他。

translations.english: Perhaps the hofkahsejun - the palace in Whiterun... Dragonsreach. It was originally built to house a captive dovah.
translations.chinese: 但或许可以去霍夫卡瑟琼——白漫城的宫殿……龙临宫。它最初就是用来囚禁被俘的都瓦的。

translations.english: A fine place to trap one of Alduin's allies, hmm?

translations.chinese: 如果你要杀了我们，我无法保护你了。这是唯一警告。

translations.english: Why, why have you done this to us?
translations.chinese: 为什么，为什么你要这么对我们？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00045C49]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I cannot protect you if you murder us. This is the only warning you will receive. | ZH: 如果你要杀了我们，我无法保护你了。这是唯一警告。 | SID: 003A80
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Why, why have you done this to us? | ZH: 为什么，为什么你要这么对我们？ | SID: 009ABC

translations.english: Then I would be glad to help you with your mad dragon-trapping scheme.
translations.chinese: 那我很乐意帮你完成那个疯狂的捕龙计划。

translations.english: But getting both sides to agree to a truce will be difficult at this point. The bitterness has gone too deep.
translations.chinese: 但这个节骨眼想要双方罢战恐怕很难。仇怨积攒太深了。

translations.english: If the Greybeards were willing to host a peace council... then maybe Ulfric and Tullius would have to listen.
translations.chinese: 如果灰胡子愿意主持一场和平会议……那乌弗瑞克和图留斯将军也许会听从的。

translations.english: Maybe... hmm... what of the Greybeards? They are respected by all Nords. High Hrothgar is neutral territory.
translations.chinese: 也许……呃……灰胡子如何？他们受全体诺德人敬重。霍斯加修道院是中立之域。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00045D03]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: But getting both sides to agree to a truce will be difficult at this point. The bitterness has gone too deep. | ZH: 但这个节骨眼想要双方罢战恐怕很难。仇怨积攒太深了。 | SID: 005515
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: If the Greybeards were willing to host a peace council... then maybe Ulfric and Tullius would have to listen. | ZH: 如果灰胡子愿意主持一场和平会议……那乌弗瑞克和图留斯将军也许会听从的。 | SID: 0071A7

translations.english: No. I can't risk weakening the city while we are under the threat of enemy attack. I'm sorry.
translations.chinese: 不。我不能冒着削弱城市防卫的危险去帮你，我们正面临敌人进攻的威胁。抱歉了。

translations.english: Do you think the Stormcloaks will sit idle while this dragon is slaughtering my men and burning down my city?
translations.chinese: 你觉得在巨龙忙于屠杀我的部下，焚毁我的城市之时，风暴斗篷会袖手旁观？

translations.english: Yes. This was ages ago, you understand. There were more of us then. Before the bruniikke - the Akaviri - came and killed all my zeymah.
translations.chinese: 没错。那是很多年前了。那时我族数量还不少。直到布鲁尼克……阿卡维尔人到来并屠戮了我的泽玛。

translations.english: I do not know how he came to be caught. But the bronjun... the Jarl... was very proud of his pet. Paak!
translations.chinese: 我不知道他是怎么被抓的。但那个布隆琼……领主……很以他的宠物为傲。帕克！

translations.english: I used to visit him from time to time. Nearly crazed by loneliness and captivity. Tiiraz sivaas. He did not even remember his own name.
translations.chinese: 我曾经常去看望他。他快被孤独的囚禁生活弄疯了。提拉兹 斯瓦斯。他快连自己叫什么都记不得了。

translations.english: The hofkahsejun has been known as Dragonsreach ever since.
translations.chinese: 从那时起，霍夫卡瑟琼就以“龙临宫”闻名了。

translations.english: Jarl Olaf One-Eye it was, who later became High King.
translations.chinese: 那时白漫的领主是“独眼”奥拉夫，后来他还成为了至高王。

translations.english: They say he Shouted it into submission in single combat atop Mount Anthor and brought it back to Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 传说他在安索尔山与龙一战，用龙吼将它降服，然后带回了白漫城。

translations.english: Numinex was the dragon's name. That's his skull decorating the main hall.
translations.chinese: 那头龙叫怒米奈科斯。他的头骨就挂在大殿里。

translations.english: According to legend. Although I never thought to put the tale to the test.
translations.chinese: 传说如此。不过我从没想过去验证。

translations.chinese: 他可能不会直接把你囫囵吞了。

translations.chinese: 你真的想帮忙？那就把你自己献给玛拉凯斯，请求他的帮助吧。

translations.english: Perhaps... Perhaps it might. If nothing else, you could be an excellent sacrifice to Malacath.
translations.chinese: 或许……或许吧。如果没有别的，那你会成为玛拉凯斯的绝佳祭品。

translations.english: Are you blind, or just stupid? You think the tribe has not seen you talking to me? You think they would not know?
translations.chinese: 你是瞎了还是傻了？你以为部落的人看不见你和我说话吗？你觉得他们会不知道？

translations.english: Do not mistake our life for one of stupidity. It would be the last mistake you make.
translations.chinese: 别把我们的生活方式看扁了。不然这将是你人生最后一个错误。

translations.english: Hrmph. Breaking a curse is not a simple thing. It is dangerous.
translations.chinese: 哎。打破诅咒哪有那么容易。很危险的。

translations.chinese: 把你自己当祭品献上去的话。

translations.chinese: 你这么坚持？好吧。去告诉玛拉凯斯解除我身上的诅咒。看看他会不会好好听你说话。
